name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: The sky isn’t falling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, Political fundraising is tough. Too many campaigns resort to extremist language and wild claims – like the sky is falling. We’ll never do that. That’s not the type of campaign we’re running. Let me tell you why. Scaring folks into opening their wallets isn’t who we are. It isn’t how we think politicians should act and it isn’t how we’d want to win. We know we can without it. **We’re running a positive campaign focused on Medicare for All, environmental justice, and an end to mass incarceration.** Issues that have a direct impact on the people I grew up with here in Maryland’s 5th District. **[_If that’s the type of campaign you can get behind, we’d love to have your support. Please consider rushing a $10 right now to let us know you’re with us._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlNPoPV6Ev2b4ZJPMAtQ9k5_3c_zLqW2XDQlNABimEcPtVQEG-019Zaz8XfuE4gTSuKyDqGpiNxFpBGMlf6SUYW--AC2ZN2RhFGFKLm6rhHdd-W6dS3ukAmqAIwjPxYNV-mJOnW07z6ROPbb4CZC26kBHIF5-EpNrXHi01dNQ-4Ig9vYFhCquP8447I1CyXOX4rYdrLTkt8wXwliWabkdju_mOkowsJsR8erkiI8ZustIyQoYKgdO4EVtI0Kv6rvvVEUYJ01je0PoVq6pxdVXSmSVMWKt7NyF3hvQgsyiAZQ/3j0/J55HS75ZQ6C3aKNppCGwKg/h0/WHhxdKhUo5WYl9uwUSgjlaEgY5UaOjLIc-iab1DL1sE)** Being a progressive and leading with our values means we have to treat our supporters with respect. We can’t take you for granted and we can’t lie to you. **Every email you get from us will tell you the truth and focus on real goals for our campaign.** But as we said, this is tough. There are some days when lots of people donate to our emails, and some where fewer do. We’re counting on people like you to power our movement. **[_So please, if you can afford it, pitch in to help us reach our fundraising goal for the month. No donation is too small, and each one makes a real difference in this campaign._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlNPoPV6Ev2b4ZJPMAtQ9k5_3c_zLqW2XDQlNABimEcLnW1ziHl4h___ZkXm9kd4esWkNEo9eVjZQ8sl8oIEVqkPswk2uMphXN_xfPFGXvL-Bv8uQMKbBo8Cm5XmXrEasx1YgiwL_S0pKZEhK0r-fV1BfsvRcu-4KzLOQTAhV2EXClVR8YqSgapGynoO-tEbPSmBxMZVrCxbU3z2xM1ZLfvPHTzXNSGKyp2LAnbTwoc9AQL8jZuIDaPMrBbiSECXkA91NP4eqnEXb6To3YwqCM2cQO7CQPU-e64TxjICtBQQ/3j0/J55HS75ZQ6C3aKNppCGwKg/h1/n1NgODs2HfqvBDxssI6oxGcOasg9Q7gUgjDSLM3jQt0)** In solidarity, Team Mckayla | [ DONATE

Fellow American,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c147a96bcbdb49648a26b6084051cce6&_e=t1JV4jIiKEDmXbJHWtSNIm4Nff6SklzibKGHWRmf7YxgZ0-i1iuMMwxH5dS1zftNn5A-fq8RdH3zfvJKf7g0FpYaok4f6wkKhtr2030ugXPCHWzKSav8t8kvGybzH2i_RdWbXEqKdrXIfvebdACyksL13c_tahEUvNWEaLzxFZ641BgygMIn5DXcwCe00AeB3XzvvocftHvdAX2QlusztQwmuWIwinOhbpLAFDnphMo1_oqMoIpB5XMz0RI-9ByUVklq137frN8TQOEe1I7q5WkfY3vsH1MLcIMHLCoBAA1DxmYFlUKZ7seQGTJNsiPpeh3-Q3CTjZmxMMDopDQ_5cqjKow-B-_pp06yi6ObDBvqP21FGkfBk7s9leuhocapvI39xe0_i20RLh7-u9iz7ojG92thOlZp7d0lN_LahHZltf8VZF-WsPRzIX-QY0vXMGJ_geHHXbHYXliPpuqRrQ%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c147a96bcbdb49648a26b6084051cce6&_e=t1JV4jIiKEDmXbJHWtSNIm4Nff6SklzibKGHWRmf7YxgZ0-i1iuMMwxH5dS1zftNn5A-fq8RdH3zfvJKf7g0FpYaok4f6wkKhtr2030ugXPCHWzKSav8t8kvGybzH2i_RdWbXEqKdrXIfvebdACyksL13c_tahEUvNWEaLzxFZ641BgygMIn5DXcwCe00AeB3XzvvocftHvdAX2QlusztQwmuWIwinOhbpLAFDnphMo1_oqMoIpB5XMz0RI-9ByU7tOWKzfeocE1QmuTzr8rA1dVEirT84kzy1ZWNsKM43bJ6vC1sk4wBMBDDNqH6fVNJmOA8dFaPzFWC7r29sQ2dHxZWflvcvgKeQ1X2oT9KFk8rOgD9RXTOfqHv9dndU53X3vxfvyHr9vIOwEW_F7sUqeT50ucbo3gR7dEXLanpIU3ZrNGQQXwox7mL3RvAKUlF1oML0lQeV2kF1l3Lo33YQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Henry Cuellar's home and campaign office. Then a federal grand jury probe issued subpoenas and sought after records from Cuellar and his family to find out if they provided any "work, act, favor, or service" at the behest of foreign companies, government officials, or business leaders. But despite the controversy, Cuellar is continuing his re-election campaign like business as usual. **He launched a new TV ad buy, with $500k donated from his corporate donors to help him do it.** This just goes to show how reliant Henry Cuellar is on his corporate donors and will stop at nothing to stay in Congress, despite the amount of trouble he’s in. [**_South Texans shouldn’t have to wonder whether their representative is looking out for their interests or his own. But with early voting starting in just 21 days, we must do all we can to get voters to reconsider supporting Cuellar. So will you chip in anything you can to help push Jessica Cisneros toward victory?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC_s0hIPamatypsLW-ZE0C5lx1URuH4jSonkI8TLF7H4aNcfi_ayg-H_jNZ_4g2dwt1Xn1cZWeTzcs_QzqM52b1P4ZraI9Cf2FKzQenmb3VmOIc2ZfigjY1FlNARxaxeHubj0D-Q1rh40txOV5strxkvckiyKn7h4SPkUMm4xtAW0yuOLhsuXwXNNiaojicixvE6TP0yRlx6as1vGHAp_ZA0hI_iIr8y09iiGw2gaJydGliVgdRiVSJFRJy1IgDKQ-h015e2X0TtgVLSc6WqAvNjTO6Dchw4ut1IdspmsMxQgc2--eaZahn82KXNyRl1AR/3j0/bJzCpJShSVaiS93LRPhSVQ/h1/ZKbTGiURNAuMuvG6BbJVyeK1y5mkGC5xuyBYnopUtyI) [Contribute Now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC_s0hIPamatypsLW-ZE0C5lx1URuH4jSonkI8TLF7H4ZaCoxSsrIg6eBdADHdTnvnwd_uieZle_SIBQePDmM4c94Ucru3sOSktbFsa_f4aqcR22jgSJcS_r91yku6_EJ3J6K5C-r1zCOImnnnNhXN-h1ZWZ0ctHP9IEX4Na-9zyO2uCHu_VpnhaVJhPofMntaSlvlViYBR3axTKPHI0QoFahw-YfPKy7wwFM4fads_7Jx586Z_-5U-mKs2RlIDAV2NjoSp73QbNZIFVUc2IjOIaJ0BMSyBcdLKMgdwEDMqPUmf3NivL5D6dtnqW9advBF/3j0/bJzCpJShSVaiS93LRPhSVQ/h2/48tanhx0T7LJkGaDcna19Xnap-YPOvNCykgoa-qRu7E) Henry Cuellar has halted progress for South Texas in Congress for too long. For the last 16 years, Cuellar has worked against popular policies, supported by many in our community. **Here’s a quick recap of his voting record:**
* He voted against the Woman’s Health and Protection Act — a bill that would codify Roe v. Wade and make it federal law
* He voted against the PRO Act — a bill that would protect the right to organize so corporations can’t get away with exploiting and abusing workers
* He voted against reform that would make healthcare more accessible

_And so much more._ Our district has had enough of Henry Cuellar refusing to do what’s right for everyday Americans. _And they’re more than ready for a new representative._ [**_Jessica is not accepting a single dime from corporate PACs or special interest groups because she’s ready to put our communities first in Congress. clean_body: Henry Cuellar has halted progress for South Texas in Congress for far too long. | | | Peter, last week the FBI raided Rep. Henry Cuellar's home and campaign office. Then a federal grand jury probe issued subpoenas and sought after records from Cuellar and his family to find out if they provided any "work, act, favor, or service" at the behest of foreign companies, government officials, or business leaders. But despite the controversy, Cuellar is continuing his re-election campaign like business as usual. He launched a new TV ad buy, with $500k donated from his corporate donors to help him do it. This just goes to show how reliant Henry Cuellar is on his corporate donors and will stop at nothing to stay in Congress, despite the amount of trouble he’s in. Henry Cuellar has halted progress for South Texas in Congress for too long. For the last 16 years, Cuellar has worked against popular policies, supported by many in our community. Here’s a quick recap of his voting record: He voted against the Woman’s Health and Protection Act — a bill that would codify Roe v. Wade and make it federal law He voted against the PRO Act — a bill that would protect the right to organize so corporations can’t get away with exploiting and abusing workers * He voted against reform that would make healthcare more accessible And so much more. Our district has had enough of Henry Cuellar refusing to do what’s right for everyday Americans. And they’re more than ready for a new representative. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: It’s going to take all of us to take on Cuellar and fight for more progressive representation in Congress. Thank you for your support. — Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Tim
subject: Can I tell you a story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ][IMG]

Can I tell you a story, friends?

During the Great Depression, my great-grandfather walked miles every
morning to the local steel mill to see if they were hiring any workers.
Along with hundreds of others, my great-grandpa hoped he would be one of
the few to get picked—even if just for a few hours of work.

He was rarely selected. But he still made that walk every single day,
every single month.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: My family taught me a lot about
determination, perseverance, and doing what’s right. I’ll never forget
where I came from or who I’m fighting for.

Because with all the chaos and partisan gridlock happening in Washington,
you need someone who will roll up their sleeves and get to work—no matter
how many miles the walk is.

But right now I’m in the fight of my life. Mitch McConnell is hellbent on
retaking the Senate majority. My GOP opponents are spending more than $40
million to keep Ohio red. And we’re expecting a barrage of attacks to hit
us any day now.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6542?amount=25&t=1007&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ]So, I’m asking for your support. Will you make a contribution
of $25 or
more to help me flip this seat so we can make some progress in the Senate?
If we win here, we can stop McConnell and expand our Democratic Senate
majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6542?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ]Donate
$25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6542?t=1010&amount=50&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6542?t=1011&amount=100&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6542?t=1012&amount=200&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6542?t=1013&amount=250&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6542?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ]Other Amount

I grew up in Niles, Ohio. I was raised by a single mom. I watched my
family and neighbors lose their livelihoods when jobs shipped overseas. I
know the importance of community because I’ve lived it.

I promise I’ve got your back. I hope you’ve got mine too.

— Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2131%2E3611125%2E7T1wGO ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

body:

Fellow American,

The Democrats won the Senate in 2020 **because they spent HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS in red states** and areas, they deemed vulnerable. But their majority is RAZOR-THIN, and they know it can easily be flipped - _so they’re doubling down._

We’ll cut to the chase. DEMOCRATS HAVE DEEMED **YOUR AREA** as vulnerable and is now a TOP TARGET.

name: Team Ronchetti
subject: ALERT: One More Week of Signature Gathering!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
I’m reaching out to thank you for supporting Mark Ronchetti for Governor and to see if you would be willing to help us collect petiti Hello Peter, I’m reaching out to thank you for supporting Mark Ronchetti for Governor and to see if you would be willing to help us collect petition signatures to ensure he makes the ballot! **We have just ONE MORE WEEK of signature gathering so we’re all hands on deck and we need your help!** [**DOWNLOAD MARK'S PETITION HERE**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=ac0fddc71442408cb2c5ad4c4af25444&_e=P5GaEFwHsBZs1sJktkziM9Pvho5aM46CTcpJmBnxZFN18RZxM55QvJjU6uREfGFa8KO1ky_OKtC02nEvF8a-uhIuvT4niXnjd1y2MvsLZlnbWzQO2WieC-r--WuJugXSahYssLueHAvM18CybRskVGk5WrBBlBMyusjerYy71eLlb5puBXJ9x5zQ7EdMPyxg3sGGEDVSJDQH2mdBiRTFkNegbUoWRSY4iuINdthojrllDvz35XA-sh0gAIkQOo55qH7mVkbBE2-tarHRcAjCxlM7ty57Av_fGoZJEPfmnCvozTnoqOUtcKmr9lkpkxASMPc9ywu_hcCIu-hqIyc2PTA-kNBeF60L-1Co1tWmb3NsqYIPjjP39ObmN7txMtNK) **_If you haven’t done so already, we’re asking you to sign and also help collect additional signatures from your friends, family, neighbors, and any other Republicans you know._ **We have several volunteers who have been able to collect signatures at their churches, Bible book stores, and local grocery stores so please keep that in mind for some possible locations. **Of course, even if you can’t collect other names, we’d love to be able to add yours to Mark’s list and every signature helps us meet the required number! ** [This is the link to Mark’s signature page with additional information](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=ac0fddc71442408cb2c5ad4c4af25444&_e=P5GaEFwHsBZs1sJktkziM9Pvho5aM46CTcpJmBnxZFPZTQ0vyKPKUVX8gPxFnh5xEU-lVedmwlfuo5htISrWYoYtfcrT4IcXDjywrr-JVw-iV796zUdvcWBt3Scf26qWCNmvd2uRIwJdHtbWXkr2a3bnLkhUC4cf9lYfixRAh5CEdoBqIJt409FLH_EdFiM6WRGRpLmtmCHbJHFn39WZ9-qtd-Hvb1D8y3FQea3nqzzgARs8PlGyI3p3s-iOWtYULh37sqtExAgcGgTpZBubyig5aMph64GIS9ka2atAaBhVdwzDt7WX-nVZkSSwUqwK) and here is some basic info for you to know: \- Only registered Republicans throughout the state of NM can sign Mark’s petition \- Only original petition forms will be valid so unfortunately, we cannot accept scanned copies \- Please put all **original** forms into the mail **no later than Jan. 27****th****,** to the following address: Mark Ronchetti for Governor 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste- M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87133 \- Albuquerque Friends! Feel free to come by our **New Office** and drop off forms by **Monday Jan 31****st** , at the following address: Mark Ronchetti for Governor HQ 10409 Montgomery Pkwy NE, Suite. 202 Albuquerque, NM 87111 Again, we can’t thank you enough for your help and support! This is a huge task but if we all do our part we know Mark will knock it out of the park! Thank you so much for your help! –TEAM RONCHETTI | |
---

---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s a “dead heat”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77640edddcc64533955d5fbf8f1ab641&_e=Rbkgl6kbt2PhdwYGIhOtB_CLcO3PbYCL9hcdMqJCujyH621f6KblYOJGDWwXbHkr0zhv4SwodIwsoqg14oUIBRG9Z2BnPiDOQFrHP6nH7Mb9wHNWL4H-pSPSrEImHXbs4fH4xrF30KjatcRwXtaTsvvpABroteiCnjvUuRKjouNlOhPfK0ctRxMQpzTLipOZ7-lQSJNSntljJd19l_TUzP-8N_QgY0N02aCl9qf_WV7_qSQ1wbev-PRJOXSbX3iC2Q1It9AGXSH6XhEBR-dmcpbB-6OTfAgWeqYoS63Xz6hDlmzXqxMqk0DuEi-eatvo6ZV8woQIOxdp5-Pz8AQH4JwkhOVZqhYJ3o2cyJwyUToM0nWkRxCS_oSRmIzeEKsLOsnh9_MIJQci4jrHG67mArlBAcBwnWNN60RCj2xHYJVrd_4XSIpt76m2ScJHlhrv0wr-f27qjPM82QH44RCNGg%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Peter, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:

| Friends,

I'm in a tough race against an incumbent Republican.

But I _**know**_ that my opponent - **[Ronny Jackson](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=4c04a46217&e=4712f71bea)** \- is bad for this district, bad for Texas, and bad for the country.

I'm willing to put in the work and give Ronny Jackson the run of his life. I know I can beat him.

[_**I'm humbly asking you to contribute $5 to my campaign.**_](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=a22f5655cf&e=4712f71bea)

It will help us get there, one dollar at a time, one vote at a time.

**_[Can you consider supporting me?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=b389973045&e=4712f71bea)_**

It's important. Really important.

Let's make the country a better place.

Thank you,
Kathleen Brown
Democrat For Congress
TX-13.

But I know that my opponent - \- is bad for this district, bad for Texas, and bad for the country. I'm willing to put in the work and give Ronny Jackson the run of his life. I know I can beat him. It will help us get there, one dollar at a time, one vote at a time. It's important. Really important. Let's make the country a better place. Thank you, Kathleen Brown Democrat For Congress TX-13. | | "Donate Now" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Kathleen for Congress, All rights reserved. subject: re: Justice Sotomayor sounding the alarm

body:

* **First:** Mitch McConnell STACKED the Supreme Court, giving conservatives a **6-3 majority**.

* **Then:** The Supreme Court took up a case that could **OVERTURN _Roe v. Wade_** and strip away reproductive rights from _millions_ of Americans.

* **Now: Justice Sotomayor is sounding the alarm** about this serious threat with her SCATHING remarks about the future of the Supreme Court.

**We MUST stand with Justice Sotomayor** and show that we won’t let Republicans roll back reproductive rights, but **our petition closes at midnight and we’re still missing your name!**

**[Add your name to our massive petition calling on the Supreme Court to SAVE _Roe v. Wade_!](https://go.dscc.org/go/3368?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220124-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuoteRefresh-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220124-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuoteRefresh-Pros-sl1&akid=2729%2E9716520%2EjEjHhh)**

_**Please help us reach 100,000 signatures by midnight!**_

Team DSCC

### **Join us for Virtual Text Banking!**

**Our volunteers made a big impact by texting voters last week about Emily Beach for Congress! It was so successful that our** [campaign will host another virtual text banking session on Wednesday, 1/26/22 from 5-6 PM.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=f3d22ca6b8&e=de8b2615ea) We prioritize your health and safety, so these virtual text banks are a great way to help Emily’s campaign -- from wherever you are around the Bay Area, the country, or the world!

We have thousands of voters to reach with our message before June.**

If you can’t join us, please consider a contribution today to help get more resources in the hands of our volunteers. name: Herschel Walker
subject: This is good news. But we can’t take anything for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=70002efe9ae644e38b14bd1558f2a913&_e=q7YnpqEKfZkfVCRFoeTxz5YxcSIU1ZrOgxoPSUfung91EuPABmygSVylhuu1HkidiEfEX-tvE7CkvuAITsjEEm14bH-XIpFxObfHPIQvfha_-sG9AKs1aVOZdtESJj15ZET54OGrgUX-XOvieKj9kH8R16ujuZL-HPSdrlv6fW1WVAnIX5wbsk6gglp33gJNTJG0QorWcL1vHd2rsBWwLLSPmyLaLonRXLWQ7xjYT2Mot8tGAZMigJGSzWHvuUAadYI6LDFPQpivO5br4HuCdAZqMHHBaBEbzqBWl1gBQnuejnKsLXHWaWor7DHcLysHF0DObMFSRJB6vri45GMusly5nBpp9_YTYAh6zULYGe8awXgjZYww__NWvy1W8TKoz18VVGjjFVuR21cUpv_VcyqIQ_m7S6Takv6HQTQ-p0foNh8yg9oJ1Vryd3nXFjJHsilf1_q0xTxJ_M00iTbn9A%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=70002efe9ae644e38b14bd1558f2a913&_e=q7YnpqEKfZkfVCRFoeTxz5YxcSIU1ZrOgxoPSUfung91EuPABmygSVylhuu1HkidiEfEX-tvE7CkvuAITsjEEm14bH-XIpFxObfHPIQvfha_-sG9AKs1aVOZdtESJj15ZET54OGrgUX-XOvieKj9kH8R16ujuZL-HPSdrlv6fW1WVAnIX5wbsk6gglp33gJNTJG0QorWcL1vHd2rsBWwLLSPmyLaLonRXLWQ7xjYT2Mot8tGAZMigJGSzWHvuUAaJsQ90J9w4LNvskO46SFhSLT4aixSI3kdXL714qERTW62HQWa_vaaUsi6XoSlMRKZFdD0IkcilM5361HhtEORzda6jDH0AVFb4UPKcw0lf2g0SoGxGh3b-1aqJlaU2eFiIKJ3B6lkO19kH--SDLOAHifiiVYWrm1BCs2BHlp26mL8dYbzqGq_Mj6ema0FoxgBPutHAKYVPDerj9pEntau_Q%3D%3D)**

We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. _**[Can we count on you to act now?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=70002efe9ae644e38b14bd1558f2a913&_e=q7YnpqEKfZkfVCRFoeTxz5YxcSIU1ZrOgxoPSUfung91EuPABmygSVylhuu1HkidiEfEX-tvE7CkvuAITsjEEm14bH-XIpFxObfHPIQvfha_-sG9AKs1aVOZdtESJj15ZET54OGrgUX-XOvieKj9kH8R16ujuZL-HPSdrlv6fW1WVAnIX5wbsk6gglp33gJNTJG0QorWcL1vHd2rsBWwLLSPmyLaLonRXLWQ7xjYT2Mot8tGAZMigJGSzWHvuUAai36eq5Lc99uWOXMRg1INRn1z0Q_pIe8jn9zI435QOp7wC7-2dd_RFGu0gDqiGh8MDr9BmdzriYa9fLEkAyBHZTA6D6E6I71E1cwKprOUAt4rNVMpNJmrfKVZ12PjSQ55gylxibG5qFFJyh7K4hYkeKbBpD_fROrvm8Zva8h-OLxyJsUAXgr1qf4VPDw7BWq5SfcppD0uGThLlJQ0UEw_Kw%3D%3D)**_

If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish.

[**Chip in $3 ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=70002efe9ae644e38b14bd1558f2a913&_e=q7YnpqEKfZkfVCRFoeTxz5YxcSIU1ZrOgxoPSUfung91EuPABmygSVylhuu1HkidiEfEX-tvE7CkvuAITsjEEm14bH-XIpFxObfHPIQvfha_-sG9AKs1aVOZdtESJj15ZET54OGrgUX-XOvieKj9kH8R16ujuZL-HPSdrlv6fW1WVAnIX5wbsk6gglp33gJNTJG0QorWcL1vHd2rsBWwLLSPmyLaLonRXLWQ7xjYT2NFgQUS3pmPwqUuggpv8RI5CCM3D9xjxZMeLJFV5r-Myi9-unCzfbjcDu5DJ5GEQgcFOfkpMUSlqq-wyh-Ov5HKQvd8CiqRSP60_ujhfRWT2ulc5_EZax7-3ljz50omt-6Ha4io7cKEM-1euK-kZvYFCqcZygA-AwoPLsTeHo3o_8eEj28GRp5V5qHDQgf143SsrKhbf85a6e2USGPEUdZgwPXX487ejka7ZSWoO4FFJvI7wlJYaEoARtpfUds53p0%3D)
[**HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BUILD EVEN MORE MOMENTUM**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=70002efe9ae644e38b14bd1558f2a913&_e=q7YnpqEKfZkfVCRFoeTxz5YxcSIU1ZrOgxoPSUfung91EuPABmygSVylhuu1HkidiEfEX-tvE7CkvuAITsjEEm14bH-XIpFxObfHPIQvfha_-sG9AKs1aVOZdtESJj15ZET54OGrgUX-XOvieKj9kH8R16ujuZL-HPSdrlv6fW1WVAnIX5wbsk6gglp33gJNTJG0QorWcL1vHd2rsBWwLLSPmyLaLonRXLWQ7xjYT2Mot8tGAZMigJGSzWHvuUAawQxcaNeSTX-NwGvk62LUqc3pGGGpU8Nl9wUhn5tiawoZoOl_27A1Vc-fNYRIS05qLbj16rDEuE_jcBIjtWX7K5oJDd55dZZprJxUpyf57P-vLxL_0angf9JAqDHkU6IIJNoIrXCB66TvQE7LGEGpGJeOexCveBIwz0rD3VSH04Xe0N9QzV6ftrL0zdlXVij5lTQo2dd_B1lX04KD2fbozw%3D%3D)
Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the _MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION._

We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Peter, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Check out the details below! clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” Harriet continues to be the only candidate in this race dedicated to traveling around the state to meet the voters, while also standing up for Wyoming on national news. Check out the details below! For Wyoming, Team Hageman | | Travel Recap Harriet attended the Citizen of the West dinner where she met Miss Rodeo Wyoming, Sierra Butler. Citizen of the West exemplifies the best parts of our heritage by honoring our fellow citizens who have made their mark through philanthropic contributions. | In The News Last week, Harriet was on Sean Hannity, Steve Bannon’s War Room, and Dinesh D’Souza. Harriet’s appearance on Hannity was so notable, it was covered by Real Clear Politics, " click here") for the full article. For Harriet’s other appearances and to get updates on the race, please visit " HagemanforWyoming.com/news"). From Brietbart News: “ "Wyoming Republican Harriet Hageman, endorsed by former President Donald Trump, showed a commanding lead against the Democrat-allied Rep. Liz Cheney \(R-WY\) in a Saturday straw poll full of House candidates"") Supreme Court Ruling on Vaccine Mandate The Supreme Court ruling is a great victory for thousands of working people in Wyoming and brings them the relief of no longer facing the choice between taking a shot that they may not want, and keeping their jobs. Yet, many people who work in health care are still faced with that difficult dilemma, and medical facilities continue to see workforce shortages in Wyoming and across the country because of it. Vaccine mandates are bad public policy, bad for Wyoming, and bad for our workers! One Year of Joe Biden Last week also marks one year of the Biden/Harris/Pelosi Administration. We knew Joe Biden would be a terrible president for Wyoming, but did anyone think he would be this bad? Inflation is nothing but an added tax on all Americans, our energy independence has been erased, the southern border is under siege, we lost 13 American troops in the botched Afghanistan withdrawal while handing the Taliban our military equipment, and COVID continues to sweep our nation. Joe Biden is totally incompetent and solely responsible for these failures. Wyoming has one Congressional seat. Our Representative must pursue a Wyoming First and America First Agenda. Harriet has spent her career fighting for Wyoming, protecting our water rights, property rights, and constitutional rights. She will continue to fight for us when she’s in Congress by pushing back against federal bureaucrats and taking power out of Washington, DC. | | | |

ALL ELEMENTS IRENE!**

I’ll never forget the word “IRENE.” _That was our code to go into battle._ Once you heard it, you knew it was time to go. It was time to fight for America and fight for freedom.

In October 1993, I was the pilot of Super Six Four in Operation Gothic Serpent in Mogadishu, Somalia. I put my life on the line for my country, was held as a Prisoner of War by a Somali General for 11 days, and survived thanks to the heroic actions of my fellow service members. _You might recognize my story from the movie Black Hawk Down._

Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Alabama to take on the new threats to our freedoms head-on. Those threats? The Radical Left and the Career Politicians who don’t care about America anymore.

Greg Stanton is one of Pelosi’s, AOC’s, and Biden’s top allies in Congress. We can stop him. |

Peter,

My progressive opponent, Greg Stanton, is one of Pelosi’s, AOC’s, and Biden’s top allies in Congress.

He was elected to represent progressive and coastal special interests, not the interests of Arizona, or the conservative values that our state holds near and dear.

[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4dd4c6911cd64db6bc844217ff8d66b7&_e=aUXF8ibX2PdDvha_b2ZhaZzqi-XlpK-u5FEXv3HNdgo7TkAh0OKY8ZeGOdajzXOwWbia-8_l57_NZzh4hK9PTwmqYi_VFaZoMIRvTe8Yd3W82tMW_KpXpZtdObdUTeNFHjHiNkqkfy404bkxUDzNAIjXyoT_VKY-cz5ROwcJQl0jf7O1fEGanJKb49pKp4ABVu-gfqUjkyyf7uMTOEjXElLDetzU5P0GEeXDmIRVT1dK_I7zyucFncZWT26gw3ldbRNeu2vYyb4gj3MoIm9M4RIcu-rKWn9wALhKZt6lfSG8sh_qkDvMuJUhbibf1JM5shAYHwIwUNMk2J8skT2NdzDmKzevui1jcCeAGNof_ATES6T4pzD0XEIjKmeZY-Yy9WsJrutLc9ISH1wQ4STfO5x_AAw4cSZo2uk-15IuXI6ynHTx8t5i6-ijQ54t77bLyXWJydFd-wYaJQzBRqwQoKQr8qLpgcaSaP5nENB0jplKA_rjqMVnI21mNeGa6Vpz)

subject: Trump SPOX: “I have a YUUUGE announcement”
body:
Great news for working class Texans! [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-r/) Fellow Patriot, Katrina Pierson here. You may know me as Donald Trump's former spokesperson, but I am writing you today on behalf of another great leader...Don Huffines.**Like you, I believe government should work for us, not the other way around. Elites in Washington and Austin have rigged the game so it 's always "Heads, they win. Tails, you lose."** [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-y/) [Chip-in $5 to defend working-class Texans](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-j/) Donald Trump knows that a small group of connected insiders in government, business, and academia all benefit at the expense of us "average Americans."**So does Don Huffines.** That is why, as a native Texan and a proud MAGA backer, I enthusiastically endorse Don Huffines for Texas Governor. **Unlike our current governor, Don Huffines puts principle over politics and people over privilege.** [Chip-in $5 to defend working-class Texans](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-t/) Greg Abbott likes symbolism...his unenforceable "bans" on masks and mandates, his ineffective border theatrics, and his tough-talking inaction on the Biden administration's hostile policies.Don Huffines prefers results.✅ He WILL eliminate property taxes. (How long has Abbott talked about this?)✅ He WILL secure the border.✅ He WILL enact real bans to protect your medical freedom.But more than anything else...✅✅✅ **Don Huffines will stand up for the working class, regardless of race or party, because that is what creates hope, opportunity, freedom, and prosperity for more Texans!****[Please take a moment to chip in $5 for Don Huffines, an actual Republican for Texas governor!](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-i/)** For America,Katrina Pierson [Chip-in $5 to defend working-class Texans](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-d/) [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cuuihtk-yuddtktydi-b/) | _Copyright(C) 2021 Don Huffines Campaign, All rights reserved._You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. **Our Mailing Address:**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpu2l30qiht1prk8osj2o2jr0nq3gdq9f5dr1mc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chg61ob6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrvqhbcp9rs69fcmaaq3gggr7pbt75bq6toeeco8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chg61ob6c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z08i83em7jsn5lb4kvokpeun3ko8rl7aqss3854g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chg61ob6c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zau19204efadio2adg6m054c1djf8fvqihduuvc0_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5g5efrsbmoaevngu4oh0fj5ppdacsf2a1dfjq48_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chg61ob6c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dr. Bob Lorinser
subject: Jack Bergman votes against bipartisan bill that would prevent Veteran suicide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
, Unbelievable, isn't it? His recent vote went against the interest and advisement of many Veterans advocacy groups. **Yet again, Jack Bergman votes against Veterans - and we don’t know why** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41023097/327022358/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTI2YmIwMy1kMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQUtXfR8adZ5Nr9JndILhct5pwMZyFAm_PbC7iq7T00=) _**I'm taking this morning to share with you my disapproval of a recent vote by Rep. Jack Bergman, which went against the interest and advisement of Veterans advocacy groups.**_ [HELP US REPLACE BERGMAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41023098/327022359/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTI2YmIwMy1kMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQUtXfR8adZ5Nr9JndILhct5pwMZyFAm_PbC7iq7T00=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41023099/327022360/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTI2YmIwMy1kMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQUtXfR8adZ5Nr9JndILhct5pwMZyFAm_PbC7iq7T00=) [DONATE FOR INTEGRITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41023100/327022361/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTI2YmIwMy1kMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQUtXfR8adZ5Nr9JndILhct5pwMZyFAm_PbC7iq7T00=) WASHINGTON, D.C. – The Ensuring Veterans' Smooth Transition (EVEST Act) passed with bipartisan support from the House of Representatives. By automatically enrolling eligible servicemembers in VA healthcare during their transition out of the military, the EVEST Act will simplify the transition process and take critical steps toward preventing veteran suicide. The EVEST Act has the support of Paralyzed Veterans of America, Disabled American Veterans, the Nurses Organization of Veterans Affairs, the American Federation of Government Employees, the Veterans Health Policy Institute, and the American Psychological Association. Veterans Service Organizations and stakeholders have been trying to advance automatic enrollment in VA healthcare for years. But Bergman, the ranking minority member on the Veteran's Affairs Subcommittee on Health, voted "No." I looked for his rationale but couldn't find it. The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) estimates that under the bill, about 58,000 additional Veterans would be automatically enrolled in 2022, and a similar number of Veterans would be enrolled in each subsequent year. CBO estimates that about 250,000 of those automatically enrolled would remain enrolled by 2026. Accounting for a gradual increase in the use of VA healthcare by automatically enrolled veterans, CBO estimates that those veterans would receive care that costs on average $3,900 each year. “We know that the months following a transition out of the military can be very stressful and particularly risky for new Veterans in terms of mental health," said Chairman Takano. "One of the most glaring gaps in accessing high-quality VA healthcare is the enrollment process—with EVEST, we can eliminate that gap.” I agree. For Jack Bergman, it's three strikes, and you're out:
* Despite saying, "Veterans have sacrificed so much for the liberty of our country," despite broken promises that he is working on their behalf, Jack Bergman is abandoning Veterans.
* The duties of a Representative are to educate and explain the legislation and your vote to your constituents. He didn't.
* He voted against the wishes of his First District and yet again chose party over his people.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41023101/327022362/-1718882115?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTI2YmIwMy1kMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQUtXfR8adZ5Nr9JndILhct5pwMZyFAm_PbC7iq7T00=&emci=8ef116e0-a17d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=2126bb03-d07d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427) If this were not what they wanted and needed, I would listen to our Veterans and their advocates. Yet, as I understand it, nearly all Veterans' advocacy groups were supportive of this legislation. It's time to move aside and let Dr. Bob in. Join us, and we will work together. Join **[Veterans for Dr. Bob at votedrbob.com/veterans](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41023102/327022363/584660255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTI2YmIwMy1kMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQUtXfR8adZ5Nr9JndILhct5pwMZyFAm_PbC7iq7T00=&emci=8ef116e0-a17d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=2126bb03-d07d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)**. clean_body: , Unbelievable, isn't it? His recent vote went against the interest and advisement of many Veterans advocacy groups. Yet again, Jack Bergman votes against Veterans - and we don’t know why = I'm taking this morning to share with you my disapproval of a recent vote by Rep. Jack Bergman, which went against the interest and advisement of Veterans advocacy groups. = = = WASHINGTON, D.C. – The Ensuring Veterans' Smooth Transition (EVEST Act) passed with bipartisan support from the House of Representatives. By automatically enrolling eligible servicemembers in VA healthcare during their transition out of the military, the EVEST Act will simplify the transition process and take critical steps toward preventing veteran suicide. The EVEST Act has the support of Paralyzed Veterans of America, Disabled American Veterans, the Nurses Organization of Veterans Affairs, the American Federation of Government Employees, the Veterans Health Policy Institute, and the American Psychological Association. Veterans Service Organizations and stakeholders have been trying to advance automatic enrollment in VA healthcare for years. But Bergman, the ranking minority member on the Veteran's Affairs Subcommittee on Health, voted "No." I looked for his rationale but couldn't find it. The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) estimates that under the bill, about 58,000 additional Veterans would be automatically enrolled in 2022, and a similar number of Veterans would be enrolled in each subsequent year. CBO estimates that about 250,000 of those automatically enrolled would remain enrolled by 2026. Accounting for a gradual increase in the use of VA healthcare by automatically enrolled veterans, CBO estimates that those veterans would receive care that costs on average $3,900 each year. “We know that the months following a transition out of the military can be very stressful and particularly risky for new Veterans in terms of mental health," said Chairman Takano. "One of the most glaring gaps in accessing high-quality VA healthcare is the enrollment process—with EVEST, we can eliminate that gap.” I agree. For Jack Bergman, it's three strikes, and you're out: Despite saying, "Veterans have sacrificed so much for the liberty of our country," despite broken promises that he is working on their behalf, Jack Bergman is abandoning Veterans. The duties of a Representative are to educate and explain the legislation and your vote to your constituents. He didn't. He voted against the wishes of his First District and yet again chose party over his people. If this were not what they wanted and needed, I would listen to our Veterans and their advocates. Yet, as I understand it, nearly all Veterans' advocacy groups were supportive of this legislation. It's time to move aside and let Dr. Bob in. Join us, and we will work together. Join **. Veterans, their families and friends, and supporters are welcome. = = = = PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhmjks08ainflbia3pe2a7vlpn3cft4oqbbctge8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chg61ob5c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zca9a5d8p8fubcqngllemmv6celjb60h390bd6h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chg61ob5c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaqbfcldq73kgdiu56ue1iglm5ir5ti8pc842olg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chg61ob5c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Defense News
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjvc4ej5uq77e4m1gq9dmbq4nbdqekvg4ng3surg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chi60oj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr6mhpm2djk6pqr2db2mcqrco3kmgon8c3ickom3d3gcdrm7c9heop66tlh6srjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljc3g7co366jgb6p77m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi3eklvf69e6t6e09c3p6apas3l3ijsgotpdso18_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chi60oj2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkm30ktcqjseep45ejn6olr8icrj34v1lk42b4qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chi60oj2cjh2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zse676d5jvkpv7g2pgq7qdo3ab9nqj0iqhg7vf60_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chi60oj2cjh2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9i68likbgkrpjmkv2t1gvlaj79rp2sbo7u4p4f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chi60oj2cjh2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu1of8ibpg8876g7ii0dlis5a67gcpj17h3sbp9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chi60oj2cjh2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhgmumdjcf0fu5kcf547lkjrmerrhpaheaviskr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chi60oj2cjh2bs) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjklcsfuujpk169oin49eutg9gagmevt0r8ah4mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chi60oj2cjh2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.

body:
I’m going to let you in on a secret. It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;

I’m going to let you in on a secret. It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year.

See, 2021 was the year where Democrats showed America their true colors. We saw that they are uninterested in addressing the issues that really matter to hard working Americans. Instead, they only want to focus on their far-Left agenda dictated by people like AOC, Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren.

**But, things are about to change in a BIG way.**

2022 is going to be the year of the RED WAVE. The American people have seen ENOUGH from the radical Left, and they are ready to kick the Democrats out of power.

Nowhere is that more important than in the U.S. Senate. The current Senate is divided between 50 Republicans and 50 Democrats. Kamala Harris is the tie breaking vote. **[If Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d0m0-1urmb-4qqlpo8/ "Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks. ")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d0m0-1urmc-4qqlpo9/)
---

The momentum is on our side. The Red Wave is building, but we cannot take anything for granted.

**[That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d0m0-1urmd-4qqlpo0/ "That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?")**

I’m sure you get a lot of emails, but this is so critically important. When I served as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State, we showed that conservatives can actually deliver results for the American people. Now, we just need to put America First conservatives back in power, and your contribution can help me do just that.

---
| | [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d0m0-1urme-4qqlpo1/)
---

**I’m a fighter, and I’m not going to stop fighting for what I believe in.** That’s what I learned at West Point and during my time serving in the Army. It’s exactly what I did as your Secretary of State. Now, I’m bringing that same fighting spirit to my mission to help Republicans retake control of the Senate.

**[We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d0m0-1urmf-4qqlpo2/ "We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED. ")**

With your help, we can change things in a BIG way and turn our country around.

Are you with me?

-Mike

It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year. & nbsp; &nb; sp; Not interested? | | | | | I’m going to let you in on a secret. It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year. See, 2021 was the year where Democrats showed America their true colors. We saw that they are uninterested in addressing the issues that really matter to hard working Americans. Instead, they only want to focus on their far-Left agenda dictated by people like AOC, Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren. But, things are about to change in a BIG way. 2022 is going to be the year of the RED WAVE. The American people have seen ENOUGH from the radical Left, and they are ready to kick the Democrats out of power. Nowhere is that more important than in the U.S. Senate. The current Senate is divided between 50 Republicans and 50 Democrats. Kamala Harris is the tie breaking vote. "Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks. " | The momentum is on our side. The Red Wave is building, but we cannot take anything for granted. "That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?" I’m sure you get a lot of emails, but this is so critically important. When I served as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State, we showed that conservatives can actually deliver results for the American people. Now, we just need to put America First conservatives back in power, and your contribution can help me do just that. | | I’m a fighter, and I’m not going to stop fighting for what I believe in. That’s what I learned at West Point and during my time serving in the Army. It’s exactly what I did as your Secretary of State. Now, I’m bringing that same fighting spirit to my mission to help Republicans retake control of the Senate. "We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED. " With your help, we can change things in a BIG way and turn our country around. name: Ashley Ward
subject: Thank you for joining us!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
]Hi Peter,

We've had a wonderful beginning to our campaign, and it is growing! Thank you! I am so excited about what is happening. The enthusiasm around my candidacy is building as voters in NC06 are learning more about me and my priorities. They agree. We need more everyday people with practical experience in Congress.

I'm not a career politician with funds to roll over or with big donor friends. A grassroots campaign like mine depends upon supporters like you. Small donations of $30, $50, or $100 are critical. Can you donate today to continue the work of the campaign and help get my name out? Every donation counts.

Thank you for your enthusiasm and support. It really means so much.

Ashley
