name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Thanks for signing up
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Thank you so much for joining my team, friend. I know we can win in November if we all work together.

Emails are the primary way my team and I will keep in touch and ensure that you are updated on the work that I am doing for all Michiganders. With that in mind, let me share our top priorities and plans for this year.

In 2020, we conducted the most secure election in our state’s history. Michigan's voter ID laws, absentee ballot process, and paper balloting served as models for states around the country. And yet, partisans are now attacking our hard work and spreading falsehoods about the security of the election. But most of it is coming everyday, in rhetoric and legislation, from politicians who seek to undermine our nation’s democracy.

Among our top priorities between now and election day must be to protect the sanctity and security of our elections. My team and I will be working tirelessly through the year to ensure that every Michigan citizen knows the truth about our election process and how they can exercise their voting rights. This means overcoming political differences, working across party lines and uniting for a non-partisan coalition of truth.

To that end, I’m asking you to take a pledge today, friend. Securing our elections and protecting democracy from those who would wish to destroy it is going to take all of us. You know I’ll do my part. Will you do yours? Will you speak up when friends, relatives or neighbors repeat misinformation? Will you organize if an election official in your area is forced out of their job because they refused to go along with the Big Lie? We cannot let the partisans operate in silence. America’s democracy is at stake.

There will be more to do this year, but it starts with all of us keeping our eyes and ears open. Sharing that our elections are safe and secure. You can always see the facts at Michigan.gov/elections. Every Michigander needs to see this resource.

Defending our democracy is not something we can leave to other people. It has to be every one of us taking on the challenge. Will you join me in this vital work? Take the pledge now. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lnx3L7joV0mplVUv8L2oMg2]

Our second goal may not be national front-page news, but it is just as important to maintaining public faith in government. That goal is to continue the work that we are doing every day to make Secretary of State services more convenient and more efficient for every Michigander despite a global pandemic. Voters elected me to make our services easier to use, reduce wait times at branch offices, and even make it possible to skip office trips altogether. We did just that in 2021 – reducing the average office visit to 20 minutes or less. Now 60 percent of transactions are done online without office visits at all after we doubled our online services and added convenient self-service stations at grocery stores around the state.

This year, you’ll hear more from me and my team about what we’re doing both to safeguard our democracy AND keep improving Secretary of State services. It’s up to all of us to make sure we spread the truth, and I hope you’ll help me do so, because we have more work to do. In November, I’ll be the only incumbent Democratic Secretary of State up for re-election in a battleground state.

That means I’ll be the only one who experienced the attacks on our democratic elections in 2020, and who can stand up and ensure fair and accurate elections in the years ahead. For this reason, you already know that millions are going to be spent by far-right groups to try to defeat me. But I firmly believe that what we’ve built so far – both in terms of growing our movement to defend democracy and the work we’ve done to help Michiganders – is second to none. And when voters know the truth, the choice will be an easy one to make.
Are you with me, friend? Let my team and me know you’re ready to help now. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lnx3L7joV0mplVUv8L2oMg2]

These are our goals for 2022. They’ll take hard work from all of us, but we can do it if we work together, and nothing is more important than saving our democracy.

Onward,
Jocelyn

subject: dereliction of duty

Hello,
Sometimes I get advice from political pundits to leave criticism of Donald Trump out of my campaign speeches. They worry that by calling out Trump when he’s still so popular among some voters in Iowa could be an election misstep. But I can’t do that. It would be a dereliction of duty.
Donald Trump and his cohorts helped plan and execute an insurrection – a coup – at the highest level of our government. To be silent would be complicit in condoning political violence and the evil outcomes of today’s GOP fringe.
**I’m running against Senator Chuck Grassley, one of Trump’s biggest supporters.** Donald Trump came to Iowa just to hold an event with Grassley and give him his full-throated endorsement. And Grassley took it, swooningly.
The polls show the race will be extremely close: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley! The challenge is going up against Grassley’s $3.7 million campaign war chest of corporate PAC and special interest money (not to mention McConnell’s Super PACs).
**Here’s where you come in: I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give to my campaign today if we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.**
[**We need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight to win. Please, will you chip in $5 or more to my campaign now – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue in ‘22, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41028986/327035221/-42398318?refcode=em20220125am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdiMTIxNS1lNzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfmGsbLGxA_CvnRrmLZe7yHubTEtho4qH_re9S0cO90=)

I’ll never be afraid to speak the truth in the United States Senate.

They worry that by calling out Trump when he’s still so popular among some voters in Iowa could be an election misstep. But I can’t do that. It would be a dereliction of duty. Donald Trump and his cohorts helped plan and execute an insurrection – a coup – at the highest level of our government. To be silent would be complicit in condoning political violence and the evil outcomes of today’s GOP fringe. I’m running against Senator Chuck Grassley, one of Trump’s biggest supporters. Donald Trump came to Iowa just to hold an event with Grassley and give him his full-throated endorsement. And Grassley took it, swooningly. The polls show the race will be extremely close: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley! The challenge is going up against Grassley’s $3.7 million campaign war chest of corporate PAC and special interest money (not to mention McConnell’s Super PACs). Here’s where you come in: I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give to my campaign today if we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It shouldn’t take “political courage” to say Donald Trump is attacking our very democracy with the Big Lie. You’d think a senior Senator would do his part, but only crickets from the Grassley camp. I’ll never be afraid to speak the truth in the United States Senate. Thank you for helping me get there, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

| | Folks, I’m about to ask you to **[chip in $25 or more towards my end-of-month goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41029256/327036033/-1950105558?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220125_FR_EOM2Bio_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDdiMTIxNS1lNzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sr5y5JQYSiVuJGc__Qb5uxs2tqkl6EpSyp36LU23XK4=)** , but first I want to explain why representing Coastal Virginians in Congress matters so much to me. I’m by no means a career politician, but at a young age I knew I wanted to pursue a career in service to my country. That’s why I joined the Navy when I was 17 years old – at a time when, just 17 years prior, women weren’t even _allowed_ to serve. I went on to be one of the first women _ever_ accepted into the Naval Academy’s nuclear power program. And in the two decades that followed, I was deployed to the Middle East, overseeing eight nuclear reactors and the training of all 700 nuclear operators onboard. When I retired, I wanted to focus on being a mom and managing my small business, but I couldn’t shake the desire to do more for the country I had served for the past two decades. I couldn't sit idly by as the country I loved sank into a terrible rut of political divisiveness, inaction, and contempt for our fellow Americans. That’s why I first ran for Congress in 2018. The odds were stacked against me, but thanks to my grassroots team I was able to narrowly defeat my Republican opponent. I’ve now served two terms in Congress, but my work is still unfinished. Republicans have made it increasingly difficult to pass meaningful legislation on protecting the right to vote, combating climate change, or raising the federal minimum wage. My race for VA-02 is the most competitive in the nation, and it could very well decide the fate of the Democratic House majority. So to stay in Congress fighting for you, I need your help. **Today is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day and[I want you to sign up!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjUtMmI2MzU4ZWViMTA1NDQ2Y2IyMTUxOTYxZWQzNTI1Y2MiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL3BvbGwtd29ya2VyLWRheS8_bWlkPTQ0ODU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ZTkiNzHsa57aAVCxnIEfKg)**

You and I both know that one of the direst problems our country faces is corrupted elections. Well, the solution to corrupt elections is transparency, but that won’t happen unless you and other patriots are in the room and part of the process, and the way you can be a part of the process is to [**sign up to be a poll worker!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjUtMmI2MzU4ZWViMTA1NDQ2Y2IyMTUxOTYxZWQzNTI1Y2MiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL3BvbGwtd29ya2VyLWRheS8_bWlkPTQ0ODU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Vh0gxNiM_BHKWtjn-xXrZA)

You might be wondering why you have to sign up so early in the year. The reason is because many states and/or counties require you to go through training, and in order to have that training done on time, you have to sign up pretty early.

For decades, the people who want to take over and destroy America are the ones who stepped up and filled these positions, so they have been the ones to oversee the counting of votes or the ones who should be reporting problems.

If patriots are not in the room, we cannot be sure things are being handled honestly.

Please sign up today and even better, sign up with family or friends! Sometimes people want to sign up, but there is an obstacle. For instance, you might have young children. One idea is to get together with other parents who have young kids and designate one or two of you as the childcare, while the others serve as poll workers.

Another note – some states and counties allow teens as young as 16 to serve as poll workers. If you have a teenager that is interested and able to miss school or is homeschooled, get him or her to sign up too!

This is a critical need! Please make this a priority this year and sign up to protect the integrity of our elections today!
[SIGN UP TO BE A POLL WORKER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjUtMmI2MzU4ZWViMTA1NDQ2Y2IyMTUxOTYxZWQzNTI1Y2MiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL3BvbGwtd29ya2VyLWRheS8_bWlkPTQ0ODU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/3a_ZJxwzToDRmTq-tJm2cQ)
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

Hey, friends —
Madison Cawthorn does not represent millennials. It’s a shame we even have to say that, but it’s important because he’s one of _only 31 millennials in the House of Representatives right now._
**That means that millennials, who make up about 22% of the American population, are represented by less than 6% of Congress.** It’s an absolute travesty that Cawthorn is one of the most prominent members (for literally ALL the wrong reasons) of this far-too-small generational bracket in Congress.

Peter, as this year begins and I plan my 2022 goals, I need to know: **What priorities are most important to you and your loved ones this year?**
My mission as the People’s Lawyer has always been to defend the concerns of every last New Yorker – but I can’t effectively accomplish that without understanding what issues you consider most urgent. That’s why we created this quick priorities survey so we can gain your valuable insight.
**[Will you take a moment now to complete my 2022 Priorities Survey and let me know what matters most to you this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41032072/327045131/-1862592387?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk276-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDI4NjRmOC1lYjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05AOJ1ZFlJ5IQ9EwEQZ9vyboJvK3CuUbp1f2uQYUTJ4=&emci=44fffc3d-3276-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=502864f8-eb7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41032073/327045132/-1862592387?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk276-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDI4NjRmOC1lYjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05AOJ1ZFlJ5IQ9EwEQZ9vyboJvK3CuUbp1f2uQYUTJ4=&emci=44fffc3d-3276-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=502864f8-eb7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)
I won’t sugarcoat this: We're going to have to put up a hard fight in 2022. With COVID-19 continuing into another year and special interests continuing to run rampant in New York, healing our state is going to take every last one of us.
**But I know that, together, we _can_ turn things around in 2022. Our circumstances may be tough, but New Yorkers are tougher. **
**And to win this difficult fight, I need your help – including your unique and irreplaceable voice – every step of the way.[_So please, take 60 seconds to complete my 2022 Priorities Survey. We’re counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to respond to our survey before midnight tomorrow._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41032074/327045133/-1862592387?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk276-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDI4NjRmOC1lYjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05AOJ1ZFlJ5IQ9EwEQZ9vyboJvK3CuUbp1f2uQYUTJ4=&emci=44fffc3d-3276-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=502864f8-eb7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)**

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: We Need to Lower Energy Costs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, energy costs are continuing to skyrocket during the coldest months of the year. This is especially difficult for seniors and low income families.
Hi Peter,The Biden administration's policies have caused energy prices to skyrocket, putting pressure on Americans as their energy costs rise during these cold, winter months. Americans saw energy prices rise nearly 30% since last December. Gas prices are almost 50% higher. With decreasing temperatures and increasing energy prices, it will be much harder for families to heat their homes and afford their commutes to work. **Instead of pursuing energy policies that will increase our production and decrease our reliance on foreign countries, many that are hostile to the U.S., the Biden administration has decided the best thing to do during a supply chain crisis is to import our energy.**[**Please donate to our campaign if you agree we need to pursue policies that will lower our energy costs and improve the lives of Americans.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztipjk-idtjvlhlh-r/) Thank you,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztipjk-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztipjk-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztipjk-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztipjk-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-ztipjk-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

body:
Gov. DeSantis is attacking the right to vote |
---

| | Friend,

It’s no secret that elections in Florida come down to the wire. Most races are decided by just a few tenths of a percentage point.

**So every vote matters.**

And that’s precisely why Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a voter suppression bill into law – and why he continues to attack Floridians’ right to vote. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41038812/327057935/-1871837506?refcode=20220124_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTRjZDcyNy1mMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTFpytFwdFLzuVy-690VY5cVLLJuwH4xWhgPJ_Xx0SA=)

We need to defeat him in November so we can protect voting rights for every Floridian. It’s not just wrong, it’s _**cowardly.**_

**As governor, I pledge to protect every Floridian’s right to vote. And that’s all there is to it.**

– Charlie Crist

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: The Problem with Big Tech and Big Government
body:
The government knows that it cannot censor those who speak the truth. Big Tech does the dirty work for them.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00187uKnUFXq0SOftqxlEPka7i1tZwyg-6DqFUdk4Nvr660XekZsQFrou9Hx3ySQuGXqoOUTXlWRTWE9kr7WTgsFyCxyv8SEQQGEvgt8c-Ih2M1R92jGgLcZzjTlR5L3ArRzmMP2ur1Vr9JEDvWf2rdmPYYCvVIw82zrujETD4cnXQ96YAgdjDxBA==&c=6_c2vfBcLcdMkCmX7TDYL79G9BiBtScxU98uTc-WyZtFNKfIxym7bA==&ch=6Pxug0c8JSeVXHiuZV7PA_tGJ4sNIeWJaNYM40dUWrNdp-x0MAGy_g==)
---
| Peter,
The government knows that it cannot censor those who speak the truth. Big Tech does the dirty work for them.
When elected officials are banned on social media platforms and their content is censored, freedom of speech is no longer a guarantee.
Those who speak the truth will have their free speech destroyed by Big Tech unless real American leadership stands up.
America cannot wait until 2024 to take back power, real American leadership needs to take back the Senate in 2022. We don't need Radical Leftists nor phony Republicans.
I'm a businessman, not a politician. I know how to get our country back on track and I won't cower to Big Tech.
Peter, my race for Senate is the most important race in the country. We cannot wait until 2024 to save the country. If you support me I can put a stop to Big Tech censorship.
[Click below to support my campaign and end Big Tech censorship](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00187uKnUFXq0SOftqxlEPka7i1tZwyg-6DqFUdk4Nvr660XekZsQFrou9Hx3ySQuGXqoOUTXlWRTWE9kr7WTgsFyCxyv8SEQQGEvgt8c-Ih2M1R92jGgLcZzjTlR5L3ArRzmMP2ur1Vr9JEDvWf2rdmPYYCvVIw82zrujETD4cnXQ96YAgdjDxBA==&c=6_c2vfBcLcdMkCmX7TDYL79G9BiBtScxU98uTc-WyZtFNKfIxym7bA==&ch=6Pxug0c8JSeVXHiuZV7PA_tGJ4sNIeWJaNYM40dUWrNdp-x0MAGy_g==) clean_body: The government knows that it cannot censor those who speak the truth. Big Tech does the dirty work for them. | | | | | | == | Peter, The government knows that it cannot censor those who speak the truth. Big Tech does the dirty work for them. When elected officials are banned on social media platforms and their content is censored, freedom of speech is no longer a guarantee. Those who speak the truth will have their free speech destroyed by Big Tech unless real American leadership stands up. America cannot wait until 2024 to take back power, real American leadership needs to take back the Senate in 2022. We don't need Radical Leftists nor phony Republicans. I'm a businessman, not a politician. I know how to get our country back on track and I won't cower to Big Tech. Peter, my race for Senate is the most important race in the country. We cannot wait until 2024 to save the country. If you support me I can put a stop to Big Tech censorship. == == == == == == == == Thank you, Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Why I'm Always Ready
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and watch the Left destroy our country, which is why I launched the my organization: Champion American Values (CAVPAC).
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3d2hs--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utb4-4qqlpo7/)
---
When I served in the Army’s Second Squadron, Seventh Cavalry Regiment, our motto was **“Always Ready.”** It embodied the spirit of our mission. At every moment of every day, we had to be prepared to do our job.

At a time when our core American values are under attack, it is important that conservative patriots are Always Ready to stand up for what is right. I’m doing everything I can to champion our American values, including launching an organization - CAVPAC - to help us advance the conservative agenda and elect more principled leaders all across the country.
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utb5-4qqlpo8/)
---
I had the honor to serve our great nation as **President Trump’s Secretary of State**. Working alongside President Trump, we crafted policies that put America first. We stood up to China, Iran, North Korea and other rogue countries that pose a threat to Americans and our values.

But now, the radical Left is quickly undoing all our hard work and moving America in the WRONG direction. **Our values—the very values that I championed as an Army Cavalry Officer and as your Secretary of State— _are under attack_**.

I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and watch the Left destroy our country, which is why **I launched the my organization:[Champion American Values (CAVPAC)](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utb6-4qqlpo9/ "Champion American Values \(CAVPAC\)")**.

**We’re devoted to flipping control of the House and the Senate back to Republicans and advancing the America First agenda**.

See, a lot of people talk about the America First agenda or what they would do. I’ve actually talked the talk and walked the walk. I’ve traveled the world as President Trump’s chief negotiator to champion our American values and stand up against rogue regimes that threaten our freedoms and way of life. I know what it takes to actually advance and defend our American values.

We can’t let up now and allow the Democrats to take our country in entirely the wrong direction. I know that I can count on proud patriots like you to help us Champion American Values. That’s why I’m reaching out -- _**[can I count on you to become a Gold Member in our CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utb7-4qqlpo0/ "can I count on you to become a Founding Member?")?**_
---
**[<< Become a Gold Member >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utb8-4qqlpo1/ "<< Become a Founding Member >>")**
We are only going to be successful at winning back control from the Democrats and saving our country if dedicated patriots like you join our cause. We can’t do it without you.

Do your part to protect our American values and to advance the America First agenda!

Always Ready,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utb9-4qqlpo2/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utba-4qqlpo2/)
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utbb-4qqlpo3/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utbc-4qqlpo4/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d2hs-1utbd-4qqlpo5/ "DONATE NOW")
---

Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC!
Add **[info@email.cavpac.com](mailto:info@email.cavpac.com)** to your address book!

subject: Stacked Against Us

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: TONIGHT at 6pm PT -- Join Speaker Pelosi’s Grassroots Update: Our Fight For Our Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

While Democrats have been working to deliver results on behalf of the American people, Republican officials across the country have continued a coordinated attack on voting rights and on our elections.

TONIGHT: Please join me and my Special Guest for a grassroots visual gathering Tuesday evening, Jan. 25th, at 9:00 p.m. ET/ 6 p.m. PT to discuss the critical issues in our ongoing fight for our democracy and what we can all do together to win that fight.

Register here:
https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_je52RkCuR3aMpzfQIDYA7Q

As we keep fighting to restore the vote and defend our democracy, know that Democrats are not backing down from this fight because – simply put – we can’t. Too much is at stake for us to stop fighting for what we know is right.

Onward to victory For The People,

NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25]
SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]

Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c5b59d78-f07d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/5249d3db-fc7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjQ5ZDNkYi1mYzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cGMFww03-glix3YN80MT7ReygHpP_LGwPHNZzwa4oY=&id=117907000 .

Nancy Pelosi for Congress
700 13TH STREET NW
Suite 800
Washington, DC 20005
United States

name: Hannah G.
subject: Hi there!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
My name is Hannah, and I’m thrilled to join Team Castelli!
| Hi there!

My name is Hannah, and I’m thrilled to join Team Castelli!

As Matt’s new Campaign Manager, I will be working everyday to expand our campaign efforts and ensure we elect Matt as NY-21’s next Congressman.

I’m proud to join Matt’s team — as a fellow New Yorker from NY-21, for too long I’ve watched our District be represented by the wrong people who do not put the needs of our communities first. I know that Matt has dedicated his life to not only protecting our nation, but uplifting the voices of our district. His commitment to paving a path for our district is inspiring, and I’m determined to help him win.

**In order to ramp up our campaign, we need to expand our grassroots team. I’m ready to hit the ground running, but I could really use your help.**

[**Will you make a donation now to help us raise $5,000 before tomorrow at midnight? name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Will you please support Geoff by being a delegate at the Republican Convention?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Here's a list of steps you need to take to become a delegate.
| | | |
---

Calling all Geoff Diehl supporters!
We need you to help Geoff by signing up to be a delegate at the Massachusetts Republican State Convention on May 21.
It's easy to become a delegate, but you must follow a specific series of steps. Here's what you need to do:

* Delegates are elected from each community by Republican Town and Ward Committees. If you're not already in contact with your local ward or town committee, please check [this list](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F7UaELCOYCiEo1zI8EgmSyIqDbZelKZ3LMVYI1hTcunSxF8Xy8V_alEz0ImZf5PGJLaSu054qZg_VoBDlHOr67BQdNyxyB02tNUwABRY4zOybJMZqC3oAhyDv2-WUo9ha2iKuEnPEbtkAgizh1Aw8ynL4Jn6ZAuYXRBEbL6pbb0=&c=iHpazSUZEcxqNiwLS3unrSrdsSVpQOd4q9PhOzsHihqu6ec7JgisSA==&ch=zyV7tG23ma2eR30H9bmTzscNIG75qx9cDF8vv0euccSR1U5P-lJPww==) for information.

* Town and Ward Committees will hold a caucus sometime before the end of February to elect delegates. Be sure to find out when your local caucus is scheduled and attend the meeting.

* Once you're elected to be a delegate, you'll receive further instructions from the MassGOP.

* To attend the Convention, you must register as a delegate and pay a delegate fee. If the fee is paid before March 15th, it will be $125 per person. After March 15th, it will be $150 per person.

* The MassGOP will publish a list of hotels with reduced rates in the event that you wish to arrive in Springfield on the night before the Convention.

* The Convention will take place on Saturday, May 21, 2022. Make sure you attend the Convention and vote for:

---
---
---
City, Town, and Ward Committee Chairs, please take note of the following rules for the holding of caucuses and registration of delegates from your community:

* Each Republican Town/Ward Committee in Massachusetts MUST hold its caucus before the last day of February, 2022.

* The Republican Town/Ward Committee MUST post mail a letter to each of its members, informing him/her when and where the caucus will be held. This letter must be postmarked 7-10 days prior to the date of the caucus. (Failure to mail this letter to each member of the committee may result in the delegates from your town being disqualified from attending the convention). The same notice must be sent to the MassGOP at 400 West Cummings Park, Suite 5650, Woburn, MA, 01801, and to the Committee's elected State Committee representatives.

* The Republican Town/City Committee may publicize the caucus to all registered Republicans in the town/city, via the newspaper, social media, email, or other means.

* Check with the MassGOP as to how many delegates your town is allotted for the convention.

* Many Republican elected officials in your town may serve as "ex officio" delegates. You can obtain a list of these elected officials from your town clerk (selectman, school committee, city councilor, state representative, state senator, etc.) These individuals do not take spot of a delegate because they are already an elected official.

* The meeting must be only a caucus and no other items of discussion may be on the agenda.

* At the conclusion of the caucus, fill in the Elected Delegate Report provided to you by the MassGOP, and return it to the MassGOP:

Attn: Report of Convention Delegates 400 West Cummings Park, Suite 5650 Woburn, MA 01801
---
---
We'll see you in Springfield!
---
---
|
---
|
---
| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F7UaELCOYCiEo1zI8EgmSyIqDbZelKZ3LMVYI1hTcunSxF8Xy8V_aiTFZfsHJpbwPmThlUCqBxypqjqL78xt3XhoY8vsjWqOb-LfoZTXNz-b7nsrRsvrqFpUA8o9dzeiGUwrmNBGUpedqAutH5bF052Q9ujHp8JKbtSp8_PeMKR83ttPTSlOwQ==&c=iHpazSUZEcxqNiwLS3unrSrdsSVpQOd4q9PhOzsHihqu6ec7JgisSA==&ch=zyV7tG23ma2eR30H9bmTzscNIG75qx9cDF8vv0euccSR1U5P-lJPww==)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41045437/327090099/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjU5ZTUzNS0wMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5CEAQHTSLgRoSw8JVFYUci1pRWe-8w8ILws3oZbLJKA=)
Friends — Recently, Governor Chris Sununu of New Hampshire decided not to run for Senate. Now that’s not really _news_ but the reason why he decided not to run is. A recent article confirmed that Sununu decided not to run because **“virtually every GOP senator he chatted with [confirmed] that they plan to do little more with the majority they are fighting to win this November than obstruct President Joe Biden until, “hopefully,” 2024 ushers a Republican into the White House.”** This sadly says all you need to know about the GOP playbook. They aren’t focused on COVID relief, they couldn't care less about our crumbling infrastructure, and they have no plans to support Americans through one of the worst public health crisis in decades. Instead, they would rather sit on their hands and do nothing for two years (or more!) while they wait for a Republican president. Every day, Democrats are fighting for our families whether it's through the increased Child Tax Credit in the _American Rescue Plan_ or through the monumental investment made in the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_. [_**Senate Democrats need our help to hold this majority so they can continue to deliver results like this that improve people’s lives — instead of Republicans who are hell bent on doing nothing. clean_body: | = Friends — Recently, Governor Chris Sununu of New Hampshire decided not to run for Senate. Now that’s not really news but the reason why he decided not to run is. A recent article confirmed that Sununu decided not to run because “virtually every GOP senator he chatted with [confirmed] that they plan to do little more with the majority they are fighting to win this November than obstruct President Joe Biden until, “hopefully,” 2024 ushers a Republican into the White House.” This sadly says all you need to know about the GOP playbook. They aren’t focused on COVID relief, they couldn't care less about our crumbling infrastructure, and they have no plans to support Americans through one of the worst public health crisis in decades. Instead, they would rather sit on their hands and do nothing for two years (or more!) while they wait for a Republican president. Every day, Democrats are fighting for our families whether it's through the increased Child Tax Credit in the American Rescue Plan or through the monumental investment made in the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for all that you do, Defend the Senate Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. SMP 700 13th St NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States

subject: In case you missed this update →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| Peter,

In case you missed the news, Virginia has brand new Congressional boundaries, and **Abigail is already hard at work alongside community members and leaders in the new portions of the district.**

Our campaign team is also working hard to ensure Abigail wins re-election this year and can continue serving the people of Virginia - working to expand broadband, improve access to health care, and prevent stock trading from inside Congress.

[_**Will you contribute to our campaign today so Abigail can continue leading with her service-minded approach in Congress?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/a5m2BuIlYZpUYlRSiHcqg83cvR7kl-pyea9SpINWxEc=/4PRk_eIc_SVp7qH_IJ8Ekq_iE36yDjBZmlF2T7Rko2s=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220125-1-EM&amount=25)

Thank you for your support,

Whitney

Peter,

From the moment new Congressional boundaries were finalized here in Virginia, I've been working tirelessly -- **connecting with officials who work in many of these communities and hearing about their concerns.**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/a5m2BuIlYZpUYlRSiHcqg83cvR7kl-pyea9SpINWxEc=/4PRk_eIc_SVp7qH_IJ8Ekq_iE36yDjBZmlF2T7Rko2s=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220125-1-EM&amount=25)

I'm sincerely grateful for the opportunity to continue representing VA-07, and **I 'm looking forward to many more conversations and visits with community members and leaders across the district to inform my work in Congress.**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Join the Hostile Takeover of the GOP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
This past Saturday, I walked into the swanky lobby of the Ritz Carlton in Key Biscayne, Florida.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g) This past Saturday, I walked into the swanky lobby of the Ritz Carlton in Key Biscayne, Florida.

Earlier in the week, a donor invited me to attend the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) Donor Retreat as his personal guest.

I knew that as soon as I walked in, alarm bells would go off and the Establishment leadership of the Republican Party who was in attendance would start convulsing and go into DefCon 1.

**I was right.**

They know I'm leading the HOSTILE TAKEOVER OF THE GOP. And they know that you and millions of patriots around the nation are ready to join me.

[**Chip in today and join my movement so you can help me win a seat in Congress so I can take this fight directly to the halls of Congress.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g)

When I arrived at the Ritz Carlton, I introduced myself to Kevin McCarthy and shook his hand firmly. **I didn 't let go of his hand until I was done speaking . . . and continued to clench it harder and harder as I looked deep into his eyes and told him, "I look forward to serving in Congress next year."**

When Kevin asked me why I'm primarying Dan Webster, I returned a question, asking, "You know that Dan Webster didn't support President Trump in the second impeachment, right?"

McCarthy didn't seem to care, and excused Webster's lack of support for President Trump and his chronic absenteeism.

McCarthy then laughed away my concerns about the GOP ignoring the America First movement in favor of back-stabbers like Liz Cheney. And when I brought up Election Integrity and Big Tech Censorship, McCarthy all-but rolled his eyes at me with a look of disdain on his face.

He then let go of my hand and walked away to speak to a big-wig donor.

From there, Kevin McCarthy and "Team McCarthy" proceeded to give a presentation about the 2022 Mid-Term Elections to the attendees.

During the talk, Team McCarthy showed a slideshow titled "2022 Top Targeted Incumbent List."

This list included the only 10 Congressional incumbents that the NRCC plans on challenging in 2022.

Guess who was missing from the list of incumbents the GOP wants to knock out?

**Liz Cheney and the other nine turncoat RINOs who voted to impeach President Trump!**

From there, Team McCarthy messed up!

**With me in the room, they opened up a question-and-answer session, and of course I got ahold of the microphone!**

[**You can watch here:**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g) | [**WATCH NOW**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g)
---

After I asked why the NRCC is continuing to support Liz Cheney, and the other nine RINOs who voted to impeach President Trump, and after I asked them whether they care about the fact that millions of Americans are upset about the stolen election, I was beginning to ask my second question about why Kevin McCarthy's presentation included nothing about Election Integrity, Big Tech Censorship and the America First agenda, I was shouted down by NRCC Chairman Tom Emmer who said, **" We don't talk about that here!"** and he mocked me for wanting to "make a difference."

Given that the room was full of big-wig donors and corporate lobbyists, they enthusiastically applauded Emmer and defended Liz Cheney, and the other nine RINOs who impeached President Trump.

**THIS is our Republican Party folks.**

They are self-serving politicians who could not care less about the America First base, and they are completely out of touch with reality.

We need to rid the Republican Party of these globalist, Country Club RINOs and their "let them eat cake" mentality.

**They embrace turncoats and protect RINOs every chance they get, and they actively stab President Trump in his back and disrespect the America First base, along with the everyday working class voter!**

These RINOs are the same politicians who have, year after year, promised to repeal Obamacare and Section 230, while raising hundreds of millions of dollars to do so . . . but then they walk away from their promise like clockwork as soon as they are re-elected.

America is on life support, which is why it's time to **REPEAL and REPLACE Republicans who have turned their back on us!**

**And that 's exactly why I'm running against RINO incumbent Daniel Webster in Florida.**

**He 's one of them, and I'm one of you . . . [are you in?](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g)**

[**Donate here and join the Hostile Takeover of the GOP!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[**DONATE NOW**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bLXAe6e763Vox6R0tRPv3F892w/CrvNoaa1t8wy7iJDcWfC892g)
---

name: Stan Foushee
subject: forty four years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lwoyIJR_dv8k1I53Yht4JPZvmfMi_QzZtaZur4snyA0=/dT6Gs32wvRwBDUPzPzC4sHH3heR04y3HOTObZ5VIjac=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220125-1-EM)
---
| Hi Peter, it's Stan here, Valerie's husband.

Did you know that my wife and I met when we were just kids? It wasn't long after I met Valerie at Chapel Hill High School that we started dating. After forty-four years of marriage, we are still happily together.

I've seen Valerie do amazing things in her life. I've seen the compassion she brings as a mother and grandmother to our two sons and grandson. I've seen the determination she has as she worked multiple jobs to pay for her education (at UNC-Chapel Hill!). And I've seen the commitment to every role she's held as a public servant. **She tirelessly fights to make her community a better place, and that is one of the many reasons I am so proud to be her husband.**

Valerie is not done working to support others, though. Now, she's running for Congress. I want to ensure Valerie has the support necessary to win this race, so I'm asking for your help today.

[_**Will you pitch in what you can today to support Valerie 's campaign for Congress?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/lwoyIJR_dv8k1I53Yht4JPZvmfMi_QzZtaZur4snyA0=/dT6Gs32wvRwBDUPzPzC4sHH3heR04y3HOTObZ5VIjac=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220125-1-EM)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/lwoyIJR_dv8k1I53Yht4JPZvmfMi_QzZtaZur4snyA0=/dT6Gs32wvRwBDUPzPzC4sHH3heR04y3HOTObZ5VIjac=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220125-1-EM)
---
[_**Whether you can contribute $5, $50, or $500**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/lwoyIJR_dv8k1I53Yht4JPZvmfMi_QzZtaZur4snyA0=/dT6Gs32wvRwBDUPzPzC4sHH3heR04y3HOTObZ5VIjac=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220125-1-EM), I deeply appreciate that you are backing my wife's campaign. I know what a stellar member of Congress she will be. In Congress, Valerie will be a champion for working families, a leader to reform our criminal justice system, and a fighter to protect our environment and address climate change.

Thank you for your support,

Stan Foushee

Here at Build Local Power, we believe in teaching history rooted in facts—there is no room to play politics with students’ education. But Ron DeSantis’ political ambition has reached a new low—instead of allowing school boards to ensure our students are learning actual American history, he is hawking legislation that would allow parents to sue teachers and local school boards if they teach anything remotely critical of America’s past.
Friend,

Here at Build Local Power, we believe in teaching history rooted in facts—there is no room to play politics with students’ education. But Ron DeSantis’ political ambition has reached a new low—instead of allowing school boards to ensure our students are learning actual American history, he is hawking legislation that would allow parents to sue teachers and local school boards if they teach anything remotely critical of America’s past.

DeSantis is taking the extreme step of calling for parents to have vigilante justice, by allowing parents to sue local school districts, if teachers teach anything a parent disagrees with.

**[Critical race theory has been a hot-button issue across the country, and now state Republicans are trying to use the same bad-faith playbook to manipulate Florida voters. Click here to sign our petition and tell Desantis to stop playing political games with our children's education.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41047225/327098534/85822441?contactdata=esh5mcxWeTvZ%2FeHjkEGwairlk9Kh2pg6asais2fYtOc%2FzLO9SQ7Q2haGuRHPybtV%2BtcKgo%2F3P%2FuLay5HyrjxF%2BP%2FC3%2B84%2B9qk63n0YRHCk4GJsleNCodCG%2F9MUyXGHt4zlOIlxNXJUFcDe8NASpdIw%3D%3D&refcode=012522-es-rs-crt-petition-ia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTkzMDE2MS0wNzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygOhpm--tiRFWnYyGg3WgZQYSgmoGcanUJdeEEQVz_w=&emci=bc339484-027e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=85930161-077e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9814644)**

We know this is yet another ploy in DeSantis’s culture wars to throw red meat to his conservative base ahead of the 2022 elections, because we’ve seen him in action over the last three years. DeSantis has consistently pushed dangerous and anti-democratic legislation—like preventing schools and businesses from mandating Covid-related safety precautions, and punishing peaceful protesters who demonstrate about racial justice and police brutality.

Our educators deserve the right to teach history faithfully and truthfully without fear of repercussions. If you stand with teachers, parents, and students across Florida, I hope you’ll sign our petition and support Build Local Power as we seek to elect leaders who fight for the freedom of Florida schools.
[SIGN THE PETITION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41047226/327098535/85822441?contactdata=esh5mcxWeTvZ%2FeHjkEGwairlk9Kh2pg6asais2fYtOc%2FzLO9SQ7Q2haGuRHPybtV%2BtcKgo%2F3P%2FuLay5HyrjxF%2BP%2FC3%2B84%2B9qk63n0YRHCk4GJsleNCodCG%2F9MUyXGHt4zlOIlxNXJUFcDe8NASpdIw%3D%3D&refcode=012522-es-rs-crt-petition-ia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTkzMDE2MS0wNzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygOhpm--tiRFWnYyGg3WgZQYSgmoGcanUJdeEEQVz_w=&emci=bc339484-027e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=85930161-077e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9814644)
Thank you for speaking out.

Margaret Good
Chair, Build Local Power

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: First Look - McSwain for Governor 2021 Campaign Finance Report
body:
A first look at our end-of-year campaign finance report. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/first-look-mcswain-for-governor-2021-campaign-finance-report?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| | **A Message From Bill McSwain **
---
| Friend,

On September 13, I officially [announced](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=a1525549c2&e=b1ec95759b) my candidacy for Governor of Pennsylvania at an event in my hometown of West Chester. Since then, I have worked tirelessly to share my vision for a freer, safer, more prosperous Pennsylvania.

The success of this vision would not be possible without the many friends and supporters who share my dedication to fighting for a Pennsylvania free from government overreach, empowered to excel in business and economic growth, and with safe neighborhoods and educational choice for all Pennsylvanians.

To that end, I wanted to give you a first look at our fundraising numbers to date. These numbers will become public in early February, but as contributors and members of Team McSwain, I wanted to make sure you saw them first.

As of end of year 2021, my campaign had raised**$1,545,000. ** I am honored by the outpouring of support and growing momentum that this strong result represents.

This includes:
* The support of **8,920** individuals, including **8,481** supporters who gave $100 or less
* Donations from **65 of 67** counties, or 97 percent of all counties across Pennsylvania
* **4,290** online contributors

As a first time candidate and political outsider, I am incredibly grateful to the many friends who have joined me at dozens of wonderful fundraising events, contributed online, and who helped grow Team McSwain by sharing our message of freedom and prosperity with friends and family members.

This robust and enthusiastic response has been visible in the warm welcome I have received throughout my travels across our state. And this is only the beginning!

[Officially announced](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=aadb87cf27&e=b1ec95759b) on January 20, we are kicking off 2022 with the endorsement of [Commonwealth Partners Chamber of Entrepreneurs](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=442132b6ac&e=b1ec95759b). With their support, we are in an even stronger position now to share our message across the Commonwealth.

Together, driven by our shared dedication to a robust economy, public safety, school choice for all families, and a reinvigorated energy industry, we will work towards victory this year and a freer, safer, more prosperous Pennsylvania for years to come _**.**_

I'm glad you're on our team!

Yours in the fight,

Bill McSwain
_Republican Candidate for Governor
U.S. Marine Commander
U.S. Attorney appointed by President Trump_
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=5be2897358&e=b1ec95759b)
---

Our grassroots campaign made huge strides last year, especially considering that we launched a bit late in the game. This year, with Election Day and the primary right around the corner, we must keep our momentum going and close out this race on a high note – with Michele in office representing FL-13! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = There is so much riding on this race, Peter. If we want to preserve a House majority and prevent Republicans from regressing all the progress we’ve made, we need to help Michele rise far above our Trump-puppet opponents. Michele’s people-first values and progressive vision are what we need in Congress, and if we work together, we can achieve a Florida that works for all of us. Plus, every dollar you contribute goes directly into strengthening our grassroots campaign. From hiring canvassers to creating digital ads to get the word out to voters,not a single cent goes to waste. = = Thank you, Peter. I’m proud to be starting the new year with such an incredible team. Talk soon. Chip Finance Director Michele for Florida *

| Dear Peter, Saturday was both National Sanctity of Human Life Day and the day that Roe v. Wade was adopted into law 49 years ago.
If you were on social media this weekend, I'm sure you saw countless posts from voices on the Left celebrating the day, recounting their "abortion stories", and trending #roevwade #abortionishealthcare on Twitter.
It breaks my heart and motivates me to fight everytime I read of a precious life being taken, especially when there is no remorse - but celebration - for the life lost.
---
| | | [IT'S TIME TO OVERTURN ROE V WADE AND PROTECT INNOCENT LIFE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gAzIk_wY1eQQCoVCj6yFXZp48T_HOAtJ4IEXb1jpgudp5d09aF0vTvqmIQbaqSwdeIKqMERRd7QG0114v2BLctG-XJnVO4lSGUmqa5mPqTKl8nprCJEIEd0K6xrtDHoiTt7Ord75g-SVs41grJsmdXJrAjmSOI1eT_Y4RQ80q1a2_JglxMT3xkhrUE3u6sdkAz3-Z49SmQr5EYJwREPLVFdv61IX_aQsxgx2DzoXBQShvf-lD2RyQtHMS_42xq8QMsY2PTzbA4jTpoS7Fi9fLutr18N9nL9iy_HChJcYFdyIoMRYzZby7MDEJ14EMJFE0xA8QMEYaVzg6hdode2TlNJ4G2h1EXHJ&c=Ekwcb7n6kG74_5cKBocs1xDGEDi398cHWyjHzq_YNsCQEu4Cjj0wGg==&ch=h2cFVDJCAozuDvuSNYnlZICHNjxT_EdyCi_0YBdI8jLC74Hj161Rag==)

name: Conservative Direct
subject: MELTDOWN: Biden Calls Fox Reporter a 'Stupid Son of a B****'
body:
\-- President Joe Biden would love to pretend that he cares more about freedom of the press when compared to his predecessor, but his latest spats with Fox News reporters have proven otherwise. The president called Fox News White House correspondent Peter Doocy a “stupid son of a b*tch” after he asked Biden a question about inflation. “Do you think inflation is a political liability in the midterms?” Doocy asked. “It’s a great asset—more inflation. What a stupid son of a b*tch,” the president snapped back. Seconds later, Biden’s microphone was cut, according to Voice of America. Even though the press was leaving the room at the time, did he seriously think it was appropriate to say that about a reporter while talking directly into the microphone? Unfortunately, this is not the first time the president has acted out at a Fox News reporter. Doocy’s colleague Jacqui Heinrich was told that her question was “stupid” by the president when she asked about Russian President Vladimir Putin last Friday. While what happened to Heinrich was arguably milder, expect Biden or Press Secretary Jen Psaki to issue a faux apology for his comments. Mr. Norms and Civility will find a way to make this public relations nightmare magically disappear. When former President Donald Trump criticized reporters, it was considered an attack on the First Amendment. In this case, the liberal media will probably stay silent or laugh at the situation. For example, CNN’s Jake Tapper seemed rather amused: Doocy is one of the few reporters in the room representing a right-of-center news outlet, so the White House and the rest of the media view his concerns as inferior to theirs. |

clean_body: \-- President Joe Biden would love to pretend that he cares more about freedom of the press when compared to his predecessor, but his latest spats with Fox News reporters have proven otherwise. The president called Fox News White House correspondent Peter Doocy a “stupid son of a btch” after he asked Biden a question about inflation. “Do you think inflation is a political liability in the midterms?” Doocy asked. “It’s a great asset—more inflation. What a stupid son of a btch,” the president snapped back. Seconds later, Biden’s microphone was cut, according to Voice of America. Even though the press was leaving the room at the time, did he seriously think it was appropriate to say that about a reporter while talking directly into the microphone? Unfortunately, this is not the first time the president has acted out at a Fox News reporter. Doocy’s colleague Jacqui Heinrich was told that her question was “stupid” by the president when she asked about Russian President Vladimir Putin last Friday. While what happened to Heinrich was arguably milder, expect Biden or Press Secretary Jen Psaki to issue a faux apology for his comments. Mr. Norms and Civility will find a way to make this public relations nightmare magically disappear. When former President Donald Trump criticized reporters, it was considered an attack on the First Amendment. In this case, the liberal media will probably stay silent or laugh at the situation. For example, CNN’s Jake Tapper seemed rather amused: Doocy is one of the few reporters in the room representing a right-of-center news outlet, so the White House and the rest of the media view his concerns as inferior to theirs. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dig Deeper... clean_body: Our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign is the protection voting rights need | | Team: Last fall, we launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign — a $5 million dedicated effort to protecting direct democracy and ballot initiatives. Extremist politicians and special interests have launched an all-out attack on voting rights across the country. It started with voter suppression and redistricting... but now they’ve seen the social and economic progress we’ve been able to make with ballot measures, and now they’re coming after this core part of our democracy. = = = = Extremists are trying to use ballot measures in states like South Dakota and Missouri to restrict this very same democratic tool — but team, we won’t have it. Where we need to bring litigation, we will litigate. Where we can stop bad laws from being passed, we will run aggressive “No” campaigns to stop anti-democratic bills. And where the legislature refers suppressive measures to the ballot, we will fight to beat those ballot attempts. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = — Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. body:

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots – you were of them.

Did you get his message?

\--------Forwarded Message---------
Subject: This isn’t a fair fight
From: Gov. Ron DeSantis
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d3m6-1uvhb-4qqlpo6/ "%%Email__c%%")**

---
I cannot stress this enough – electing strong GOP leaders is crucial to defending our states from the Left’s liberal takeover. Look at what’s happening in blue states – businesses are shuttering, rights are being revoked, and Americans are fleeing to states like freedom-loving Florida.

**[I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in _ANY_ state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d3m6-1uvhc-4qqlpo7/ "I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in ANY state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.")**
---
| | | [>> RESTORE GOP STATE MAJORITIES <<](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d3m6-1uvhd-4qqlpo8/ "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
I won’t lie to you, it’s not going to be easy.

We’re fighting against the entire liberal machine – the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Fellow Conservative.

This isn’t a fair fight – they’ve got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left’s tyrannical agenda, and we’ve never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d3m6-1uvhe-4qqlpo9/ "Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.")**

If you can, please chip in today to fuel our fight before the Left’s policies destroy any more states.
---
| | | [>> RUSH $14 NOW <<](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d3m6-1uvhf-4qqlpo0/ "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
Thank you for stepping up,

Ron DeSantis
---

name: Congresswoman Demings
subject: last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I hope I can count on you
| | |
---
I'll be honest, friend – things aren't looking great. My Election Year membership campaign expires in just a few hours, but I'm still 513 members short of my goal.
Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it costs.
**Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now:**

[Please, activate your Election Year membership by donating $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me win in Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41048218/327103256/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2255-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmZjMmI0ZC0wOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O2dNo990ZFAyeT5riS2d-7mKEKIaUDTMLSIS5mz-BHk=)

Thanks,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41048219/327103257/1320837545?refcode=jtk2255-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmZjMmI0ZC0wOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O2dNo990ZFAyeT5riS2d-7mKEKIaUDTMLSIS5mz-BHk=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. But it’s about more than just winning an election. What we decide in this next election could determine the outcome for our entire country.

The thing is, if we don’t win this race, Democrats will lose the House of Representatives. And if Republicans take control, all of the progress we’ve made could be ended.

Look, this election will really be a battle -- but the thing about battles is that they are not won alone. You are a critical part of this fight.

So I'd like to humbly ask you to do something today to help us win this race and defeat our Capitol Insurrectionist opponent.

body:

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbb4d1apsg06cc6vhmd6ith1cstmgl2snsh3f1p0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj62or7cjh2bs)

Thank you,

name: Tobias Read
subject: Failure
body:
For ten years Speaker Kotek led Oregon's legislative agenda. Time after time, growing jobs in our high tech industry has been left off the agenda.
---
| | Dear Peter, For ten years Speaker Kotek led Oregon's legislative agenda. Time after time, growing jobs in our high tech industry has been left off the agenda. On Friday we saw the unhappy result: Intel announced they would make their $20 billion investment for a new manufacturing plant... in Ohio. And here’s the gut punch: **[Intel didn’t even seriously consider building this facility in Oregon.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41048898/327106664/490937333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGFlNDMwZS0wZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_7wjaiUjb4_QUan9M57XVnJY9KT5vRbeQqIFDzUMUrE=&emci=06f59a07-0e7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=2dae430e-0e7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=30662126)** For years, we’ve been warned that Oregon’s semiconductor industry and Intel were looking to other states to build, hire and grow. Intel’s decision last year to invest $20 billion in _another_ plant in Arizona should have been a wake up call. We can’t keep missing out on economic development and growing good jobs. Intel’s new plant would have been the single biggest economic development project in Oregon in decades. The average salary at the new Ohio plant will be $135,000 _per year_. This is the kind of once in a generation investment that can transform regional economies. **I would have moved mountains to keep this investment in Oregon.** We know what it will take to create these high-paying jobs in Oregon. Shovel-ready development sites, skilled workers and the pipelines to train more of them, and a business environment that supports innovation and drives growth. And the leadership to see it through. Oregon can’t afford to fall further behind. Thank you,

---

---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We must renew our fight to protect reproductive rights.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41049014/327107503/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220125Roe_N_SB_30DO_4_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2U2NzdjZC0wZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oFVx3FuJGP2oF1VcHTqiBgcnAToIm71TZXoQukVVvwM=) Peter — On January 22, we recognized the 49th Anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ and renewed our fight to protect abortion access.

**Republicans have been setting up political battles in the courts for decades in an attempt to overturn 1973’s Roe v Wade, betraying women everywhere in the U.S.**

Roe v. Wade protects a woman’s reproductive rights. In its absence, conservative lawmakers will restrict the control women have over their own bodies and health. **We cannot depend on the Supreme Court to uphold Roe v. Wade. Congress must act now to protect women everywhere.**

[**_If we’re going to protect women’s rights, we must hold and expand our Democratic majority in Congress. In honor of the Anniversary of Roe v. clean_body: We must renew our fight to protect reproductive rights. = Peter — On January 22, we recognized the 49th Anniversary of Roe v. Wade and renewed our fight to protect abortion access. Republicans have been setting up political battles in the courts for decades in an attempt to overturn 1973’s Roe v Wade, betraying women everywhere in the U.S. Roe v. Wade protects a woman’s reproductive rights. In its absence, conservative lawmakers will restrict the control women have over their own bodies and health. We cannot depend on the Supreme Court to uphold Roe v. Wade. Congress must act now to protect women everywhere. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = I can’t do this alone, Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. body:
| |

---
| | |
# Ciscomani (AZ-06) Announces Key Campaign Staff
_As Election Year Kicks-Off, Ciscomani Names Campaign Manager and Other Staff_ **TUCSON** **–** Juan Ciscomani [announced today](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=c6a5c0c561&e=659fba240e) the hiring of key staff members who will lead his campaign to represent Arizona's new 6th congressional district in the United States Congress.

At the helm is campaign manager **Becky Freeman** , a Tucson native who has extensive operational experience leading the efforts for the State of Arizona in the southern counties for the last 7 years.

Managing all field operations will be field director **Jonathan Bleacher** , a field operative who most recently led efforts for the Republican National Committee (RNC) in Virginia to elect Governor Glenn Youngkin and has also worked in Florida, Georgia, and Colorado on numerous campaigns and initiatives.

"I am thrilled to welcome Becky and Jonathan to Team Ciscomani," said Ciscomani. "Their individual expertise will lead this campaign to victory in August and November. I've worked with Becky for over a decade, and the operational knowledge and community relationships she brings to the team are invaluable. Under her leadership, Jonathan's experience to reach and connect with voters will serve our team well. I am excited to welcome them!" [](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=a1779c0f06&e=659fba240e)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Prosecutor Endorses Michael Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli has endorsed Michael Brown in his campaign for Governor. | | | |
---
| | |
### Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli
Endorses Michael Brown for Governor
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter:

I’m proud to announce the endorsement of Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli.

We have known each other and worked together for many years. He is an instrumental part of keeping criminals off the streets in Berrien County.
---
|
---
| “I have worked as an assistant prosecutor and prosecutor with Captain Brown for many years,” Pierangeli stated. “I have seen his dedication to making the community a better place. I believe Captain Brown has the experience, work ethic, and, most importantly, the integrity to lead this state as the next Governor."

Pierangeli’s endorsement comes on the heels of Sheriff Mark Lillywhite’s support for my campaign. I'm immensely grateful for their support and confidence.

As a lifelong Michigan resident, I've spent the past thirty-three years on the streets protecting our communities from violent criminals. Public safety will always be a top priority for me, especially in this day and age when people like our Governor attack the police and promote the “defund the police” movement.

I'll never cave into the demands of the “defund the police” crowd.

See you on the campaign trail!

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---

clean_body: Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli has endorsed Michael Brown in his campaign for Governor. | | | | | | | Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli Endorses Michael Brown for Governor | | | Peter: I’m proud to announce the endorsement of Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli. We have known each other and worked together for many years. He is an instrumental part of keeping criminals off the streets in Berrien County. | | “I have worked as an assistant prosecutor and prosecutor with Captain Brown for many years,” Pierangeli stated. “I have seen his dedication to making the community a better place. I believe Captain Brown has the experience, work ethic, and, most importantly, the integrity to lead this state as the next Governor." Pierangeli’s endorsement comes on the heels of Sheriff Mark Lillywhite’s support for my campaign. I'm immensely grateful for their support and confidence. As a lifelong Michigan resident, I've spent the past thirty-three years on the streets protecting our communities from violent criminals. Public safety will always be a top priority for me, especially in this day and age when people like our Governor attack the police and promote the “defund the police” movement. I'll never cave into the demands of the “defund the police” crowd. See you on the campaign trail! subject: McSwain for Governor - 2021 Campaign Finance Report
body:
A first look at our end-of-year campaign finance report. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/mcswain-for-governor-2021-campaign-finance-report?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**January 25, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# McSwain for Governor: 2021 Campaign Finance Report

**West Chester, Pa.** **\--** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, today released his campaign's 2021 end-of-year fundraising numbers. This is the first time that the campaign has publicly shared financial information since McSwain announced his candidacy on September 13.

As of December 31, 2021, McSwain for Governor had raised $1,545,000.

This includes:
* The support of **8,920** individuals, of which **8,481** (95%) were grassroots supporters who gave $100 or less
* Donations from **65 of 67** counties, or 97 percent of all counties across Pennsylvania
* **4,290** online contributors

McSwain expressed his gratitude for the supporters and friends who contributed to this strong result and the campaign's growing momentum:
---
|
> **_"_****As a first time candidate and political outsider, I am incredibly thankful for the tremendous number of people who have joined our cause, helped grow Team McSwain, and promoted our message of freedom and prosperity with their communities. Success would not be possible without their shared dedication to a freer, safer, more prosperous Pennsylvania. Together, we will work towards victory and make that vision a reality."**
---
| McSwain also [announced ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=25ea4a8b84&e=b1ec95759b)on January 20 that he had received the endorsement of Commonwealth Partners Chamber of Entrepreneurs:
---
|
> _**"****As a limited government, free market, law and order, constitutional conservative, I am grateful to receive the endorsement of Commonwealth Partners Chamber of Entrepreneurs. Together, driven by our shared priorities of a robust economy, public safety, school choice for all families, and a reinvigorated energy industry, we will work towards victory this year and a freer, safer, more prosperous Pennsylvania for years to come."**_
---
| The complete financial report filing will be publicly available in early February via Pennsylvania Department of State's [campaign finance website](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=505fd5b811&e=b1ec95759b). A list of 2022 Campaign Finance Reporting deadlines is [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=a9f7b5cc73&e=b1ec95759b).
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=8460e9d771&e=b1ec95759b)
###
