Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our midnight deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41049470/327110114/-42398318?refcode=em20220125mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM3MjdmZS0xMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G2oKd9sY7W0YbMf7Rxc7ZHMB-4anT4CqIEXMGn_olB0=)

We were brainstorming how our digital donors could make the biggest impact in keeping the House blue in the crucial 2022 midterms, and we’ve come up with an idea.

Last quarter, our average digital donation was **_$43_**. That’s a solid number, and we’re so grateful for everyone whose contributions helped us get there.

But there’s a way that our grassroots supporters – you! – can make a bigger impact. Here’s how.

**_A monthly gift of just $10 from now until Election Day_** would not only have a bigger impact by the time Election Day rolls around, it will also help us plan ahead while knowing how much money we can expect to have at certain points of the election year.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Do you have a few minutes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs-email?refcode=2021_Welcome1 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs-email?refcode=2021_Welcome1]
You're receiving this email from Senator Kirsten Gillibrand becauase you've expressed an interest in electing Democrats up and down the ballot and progressive policies. Not interested in enacting President Biden's agenda or saving our House and Senate majorities? You can unsubscribe here [http://https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1123f3f0-637c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992/fee7d44f-117e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWU3ZDQ0Zi0xMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHsxO1QaybTgmd0jaeuKBwIX7HU-As4dqgZhj7uSVJ8=&id=108267856] .
Friends, I like to say I come from a long line of strong, fearless women who didn’t know the meaning of the word “impossible.”
My grandmother, Polly, was a force of nature. She organized women into a political force in Albany—well before most women had any political power.
My mother was one of just three women in her law school class—and a black belt in karate. I remember her baking cookies with my friends and me, all the while emptying the dishwasher and talking on the phone to file the details of an adoption case she was working on.
http://twitter.com/sengillibrand [http://twitter.com/sengillibrand]
When I first ran for Congress back in 2006, my mom was one of the only people who thought I could win. I was told my purple, Upstate New York district had more cows than Democrats.
But I believed then—as I do now—that the toughest fights are always worth taking on. We won that race, and it’s been the honor of my life to serve New York ever since.
I’ve always said: Government only works when people raise their voices and demand change. It’s a pretty simple premise, really. But with Washington so overrun by corporate lobbyists and special interests who trade money for access, it doesn’t happen enough.
But together, I believe that we can effect real, meaningful change in Washington. I believe we can pass a Green New Deal and fight global climate change. I believe we can ensure that every American has quality, affordable health care. I believe we can get money out of politics, make paid family and medical leave a reality for all Americans, enact meaningful gun safety laws, and build a more just and equitable economy.
http://twitter.com/sengillibrand [http://twitter.com/sengillibrand]
I also believe that, as Americans, so much more unites us than divides us. Together, we can root out corruption and finally make progress on the most urgent issues facing our communities. I’m so, so grateful to have you on this team.
I’ll be sharing regular updates on my work in Washington, along with opportunities for you to raise your voice on the issues that matter most. I’ll also ask you to support some of the candidates and causes that are close to my heart. Because I believe that when we elect more progressive leaders that reflect the diversity of our country, the outcomes are better for all Americans.
In the meantime, though, you can follow my work on social media:
TWITTER [https://twitter.com/sengillibrand] FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/KirstenGillibrand] INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/kirstengillibrand/?hl=en]
With love and gratitude,
Kirsten
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs-email?refcode=2021_Welcome1]

Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate

Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand for Senate are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand for Senate does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

Gillibrand for Senate
126 C Street NW
Washington, DC 20001

We’d hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, you can unsubscribe here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1123f3f0-637c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992/fee7d44f-117e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWU3ZDQ0Zi0xMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHsxO1QaybTgmd0jaeuKBwIX7HU-As4dqgZhj7uSVJ8=&id=108267856

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: The closest race in 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hey friend — I’ve spent my career taking on big fights and getting things done for Pennsylvanians. But to win this November and prevent a Republican takeover here in Pennsylvania, I need you on my side. In 2016, Donald Trump barely won this state by just 44,292 votes. When we flipped it blue in 2020, Joe Biden won Pennsylvania by just one point. So if history is any indication, this election will be one of the closest in the country — and one of the most important. It’s no exaggeration to say the fight to protect democracy in this country could hinge on our success or failure in preventing a GOP takeover of Pennsylvania. [**I know this is going to be a tough race, and I need you with me. That’s why I’m asking: can you chip in $25, or whatever you can afford, to help us take on our extremist Republican opponents?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41049877/327111614/429448647?refcode=email_22_pawelcome1intro&amount=25&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmFlMjc3MS0xMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3zwbXqZ-7AHN41QXFtsMJZ6UNsErCsVyDtb8K9IxOs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41049878/327111615/429448647?refcode=email_22_pawelcome1intro&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmFlMjc3MS0xMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3zwbXqZ-7AHN41QXFtsMJZ6UNsErCsVyDtb8K9IxOs=)

My opponents want to gut access to affordable health care. They want to make it harder for workers to organize. They want to ban abortion. They want to make it harder to vote — using the Big Lie as their pretext.
That’s not what I want Pennsylvania to look like. As Attorney General, I fought in court dozens of times to protect our democracy from Donald Trump and Rudy Giuliani when they tried to undermine and overturn our election — and I won.
Over a year later, Trump and his allies are continuing to spread dangerous misinformation and outright lies in Pennsylvania — and enablers like Kellyanne Conway and Michael Flynn are actively supporting my far-right Republican opponents, hoping to spread Trump’s dangerous agenda in the most important swing state in the country.
I’ve spent my life taking on the big and powerful on behalf of those who’ve been wronged — and now I’m running to be Pennsylvania’s next Governor to keep taking on those big fights. But listen, I need you with me now more than ever.
[**Will you chip in $5 today and help us keep Pennsylvania blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41049885/327111622/429448647?refcode=email_22_pawelcome1intro&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmFlMjc3MS0xMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3zwbXqZ-7AHN41QXFtsMJZ6UNsErCsVyDtb8K9IxOs=)
As always, thanks for your support.
Josh Shapiro

clean_body: Hey friend — I’ve spent my career taking on big fights and getting things done for Pennsylvanians. But to win this November and prevent a Republican takeover here in Pennsylvania, I need you on my side. In 2016, Donald Trump barely won this state by just 44,292 votes. When we flipped it blue in 2020, Joe Biden won Pennsylvania by just one point. So if history is any indication, this election will be one of the closest in the country — and one of the most important. It’s no exaggeration to say the fight to protect democracy in this country could hinge on our success or failure in preventing a GOP takeover of Pennsylvania. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = My opponents want to gut access to affordable health care. They want to make it harder for workers to organize. They want to ban abortion. They want to make it harder to vote — using the Big Lie as their pretext. That’s not what I want Pennsylvania to look like. As Attorney General, I fought in court dozens of times to protect our democracy from Donald Trump and Rudy Giuliani when they tried to undermine and overturn our election — and I won. Over a year later, Trump and his allies are continuing to spread dangerous misinformation and outright lies in Pennsylvania — and enablers like Kellyanne Conway and Michael Flynn are actively supporting my far-right Republican opponents, hoping to spread Trump’s dangerous agenda in the most important swing state in the country. I’ve spent my life taking on the big and powerful on behalf of those who’ve been wronged — and now I’m running to be Pennsylvania’s next Governor to keep taking on those big fights. But listen, I need you with me now more than ever. = As always, thanks for your support. Josh Shapiro | PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA Thank you for supporting Josh Shapiro's campaign to become the next governor of Pennsylvania. name: Patty Murray
subject: Let’s make history in North Carolina, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Cheri Beasley needs our support.
#
Peter,
Right now, Democrats have a razor-thin majority in the Senate – and to make progress on the issues we care about, we’ve got to defend and expand our Democratic majority in 2022. That’s why I want to introduce you all to Cheri Beasley from North Carolina.
As a judge and Chief Justice in North Carolina, Cheri stood up for justice and fairness. She’s running to fight for many of the same things that I know the people of Washington state care about: combatting the climate crisis, lowering essential costs for working families, and making child care more affordable.
**[CNN ranked North Carolina as one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip, and if we’re going to defend and expand our majority, it could all come down to Cheri Beasley’s campaign. Will you rush in $5 today to both of our campaigns?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41049956/327111973/-706420357?refcode=pm_em_220125_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFlMjc3MS0xMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i61yvGeK8ZYCRJ7sJvFg9NI1CcqMUq6SA1F70Ggt34E=)**
**Trump has already hosted fundraisers for Cheri’s opponent at Mar-a-Lago and dark money corporate PACs are rushing in millions to this race because they know that Senate control hinges on North Carolina.**
If Cheri Beasley is going to take on Ted Budd and the national attention of Republican donors and corporate PACs, she’s going to need grassroots supporters like you, Peter. With your help, we can elect a fierce advocate, North Carolina’s first-ever African American Senator, and win in 2022.
**[We have the opportunity to make history in North Carolina and elect another woman to the Senate. Your support is going to make a difference in this race – will you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41049957/327111974/-706420357?refcode=pm_em_220125_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFlMjc3MS0xMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i61yvGeK8ZYCRJ7sJvFg9NI1CcqMUq6SA1F70Ggt34E=)**
Thank you,
Patty** **
** **
** **

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5gc28bbm12c8mcs2ukoevdlvv1s9ll2apkokv98_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj2clh2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn9d2k5it87erj0qorhdtq1gig22nn1dbf4sqo7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj2clh2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs4relmggfvln0ohb1ivqveorrloi922m74kjf5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj2clh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4nkcnq7hbchsuadostmcoh82e9egajmv9u323n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj2clh2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znph1r0rilgp6kc6sl0rhl3sjr8tca0ejjstebvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj2clh2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I'm embarrassed to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlvtqs7ce2fc57cbgeacmbrdtbog4ipglptob2hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onicdpr6ojk6tge8pplegr68cdke4r6bdhj6moj8srkeopbepj0mopn6dblehrm1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mdge0slncoqeeddicuobapbi4no)
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z78rc63ildh7idt2dubb974gg4k53jbj5dpqed40_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj1c5h2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdsso0uq71mrcij3jg0rusjhv773bcr2o51di8mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj1c5h2bs)

---

---
[**RUSH $250**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3tgp3mfvoive6c2kkkcs0psegprgrs28hpkk9og_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj1c5h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $500**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo8g98sod4r4ctoiukk1a0t6e1a5re9v578cki0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj1c5h2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv00jut6rftpeakupfl67og85j6lcu7c2a0tsae0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chj6eoj1c5h2bs)

| | **Hello friend,** **My campaign for Colorado’s First Congressional District is picking up steam! Last week our campaign received endorsement from The Working Families Party, Blue America, and the Denver chapter of the Progressive Democrats of America!

[I need your help to keep this momentum going! Can I count on you to make a donation today?](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=3bb2840dad&e=e67cbb3f92)**

******I am proud to have the support of these organizations because it means that they have put their trust in me to uphold their values as a candidate and Representative of this country. It is not enough to just have Democrats in these positions anymore. We cannot look to the same people that helped create the problems our country is facing, to solve them. We need a new generation of leadership. We need leaders who live the struggles of the working people that they will be representing so they can fight to fix them. I look forward to being that leader for CD1.** [**If you feel the same way, can I count on you to donate $25,$50, $100, or $250 today?**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=1cf9192416&e=e67cbb3f92) **Hope is not lost for the change we want to see for our community. This fight isn’t about my opponent as a person, it is about the system that they uphold and benefit from. The system will not disrupt itself so we need to do it. Thank you for being in this fight with me.** In Solidarity,
Neal Walia
Candidate, CO First Congressional District
www.nealwaliaforcongress.com

Team -

This past week marked one year of full Democrat Control in Washington. How does our country look now compared to a year ago?

**Inflation** which is a tax on every American and disproportionally effects the poor and working class is at a 40-year high. Hard-working Americans are paying more at the pump and in stores, and many of the shelves in those stores are barren.

**The** **Border **is a crisis that is claiming American lives. According to the CBP, border apprehensions were as high as they have ever been and fentanyl, the drug that is the number one cause of death for people between the ages of 18-45 is flowing across the border in record amounts.

**Crime** has hit decade-high numbers across the nation, while Democrats continually put criminals before victims. Right here in Philadelphia, DA Larry Krasner said there was no crime wave after the deadliest year on record.

**Afghanistan** is in shambles after President Biden surrendered it on a national stage. He has proven time and again that we are becoming more unreliable to our allies, and even to our own brave men and women serving this country culminating in the tragic and avoidable loss of 13 of our finest.

Joe Biden said at a recent press conference that he doesn't know what Republicans are for. Well let me tell you what I am for-
* Stop the war on American Energy
* Reign in Government Spending
* Restore the Hyde Amendment and foster a culture that cherishes life
* Secure our Southern Border and stop the tidal wave of fentanyl coming into our Country
* Safe Communities
* The right education for our children
* Love for this country

Looking back at this unprecedented tumultuous year, it is more apparent than ever that Republicans need to take back leadership in Washington. The left's one-party rule has failed the American people.

-Lisa
|

clean_body: This past week marked one year of full Democrat Control in Washington. How does our country look now compared to a year ago? Inflation which is a Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Team - This past week marked one year of full Democrat Control in Washington. How does our country look now compared to a year ago? Inflation which is a tax on every American and disproportionally effects the poor and working class is at a 40-year high. Hard-working Americans are paying more at the pump and in stores, and many of the shelves in those stores are barren. The Border is a crisis that is claiming American lives. According to the CBP, border apprehensions were as high as they have ever been and fentanyl, the drug that is the number one cause of death for people between the ages of 18-45 is flowing across the border in record amounts. Crime has hit decade-high numbers across the nation, while Democrats continually put criminals before victims. Right here in Philadelphia, DA Larry Krasner said there was no crime wave after the deadliest year on record. Afghanistan is in shambles after President Biden surrendered it on a national stage. He has proven time and again that we are becoming more unreliable to our allies, and even to our own brave men and women serving this country culminating in the tragic and avoidable loss of 13 of our finest. Joe Biden said at a recent press conference that he doesn't know what Republicans are for. Well let me tell you what I am for- Stop the war on American Energy Reign in Government Spending Restore the Hyde Amendment and foster a culture that cherishes life Secure our Southern Border and stop the tidal wave of fentanyl coming into our Country Safe Communities The right education for our children Love for this country Looking back at this unprecedented tumultuous year, it is more apparent than ever that Republicans need to take back leadership in Washington. The left's one-party rule has failed the American people. -Lisa | PETITIONS! In the coming weeks, we will need to collect 1,000 petitions to get Lisa on the ballot. To do this, we will need all hands on deck! If you are interested in carrying a petition or setting up a signing party, please email mailto:billy@schellerforcongress.com?subject=Help%20with%20petitions "billy@schellerforcongress.com" | Sit Down with Scheller! Our third sit down with Scheller with Bill Wright of | Photos from the Campaign! Meet and Greet at Pizza Chef in Easton Berks County Patriots Meeting in Hamburg Penn State Extension's 2022 Crops Conference Duke's Delites Visit Evergreen Farm Visit** | | Check out our Facebook for future events! Onward to victory, Team Scheller | Check out our Social Media Pages! | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

Chris has been hard at work building a broad coalition in PA-17 that can win in November. One thing he hears over and over again on that trail: folks are worried about the future of American democracy and our leadership has failed to address the most critical challenges facing the Commonwealth.
That's why Chris stepped up to run for Congress, to continue fighting for democracy the same way he’s done throughout his life. And that’s exactly what he’ll do for the people of Western PA if elected.
Thanks for everything you do.
Team Deluzio

_ _ | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. body:
That's what Democrats want you to believe, but I'm here to tell you that opportunity exists for everyone ... if one works hard enough ... |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_t=qJnLIhxqeQeH7uTgNryI3l_cZFK27nyV4NkySZNPhp6lsR50HTVhs5QgwwmH3v9J1kUqqWM1C3yULg61ronnjCSH40nD7k66cjWvxw7QUkpSkbsVFaLkmq5bpI357kXhTVVu54IkcCbekZDlr-GK9z1Koc4Qpw_Rt-isuURGp4k%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqmaMdIVkfhahBLejvW1dhZ-QQjpYojTx-65qctIIytHhTQKAfhaRHQ0IQXwjrzZ7XYPcntrr_v315Rc-q2xBL7FW0muYpY13pxXQHx1eUTpTBFASwl-nysYT4yqb7UQixTVu-7q6KCDN3hS_pwUUFDM_bgJzjZpn1Lv4Tg4upXRAa25BuRv5Ns0KoHN1xR67GH7w2OimI0NwhC6xtw-huXmpjaAXQ_TQOmG-0Qpv13BzAc%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqmaN0YziV3gfCW2OxG3ddVE8XPz-007XolG9SIDRc0iuBTIUntTgrsPy500EeE9ys1r1aTrMUVveCaT0jrzQ_bhhvWt7X4qMBveMOw6O1md_f_NB0iUNZ3BaS2BXUvbJlunwcV3vfTwB8qljPja3IMljAZC5JINnKjXpGUweOpWOJL5Z7kvvNQDY1na_wNHWTdSNERfH2OujGT4pM0U-6G8ETQUklSxCgo7SWFD6BmDTbA%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqmafGv3_1_YoPDqWQ-kARMe8r06-_zTPp2tofyn_czJ94dZybKNuKdaFIauOnk0O3LQs_Oy8OW0l8RrJAAPAMS92sEgOunZRq1QssdeOvlNEON4qf1Tzd_1TpmYPrQ_ZroWWXYtC8JFY_8Xa_-EM7kvVT2vuRD9FtAT63H4erFvr-KIR72Nzl8RupQpZWhEHT63EYZQrJs9K_7rjoARyjhEv4lZmXQjsuJMF1GW_15MrO8%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqmaLvRkjJSvkMOe_8izJz4g6Y3ov5vF5xcZXaay6BMKkA0QLMCmq1BWIVbH_eC9MSYlGjHA9lcg71YucYDPspboXLvLw2r2lOyvay5kN17zz0JNPca8jkzp6q6ZS9kQeXmSu2hbKZ7jyZnJ1HycOfTCv-tyyMCeetu8a4Vb1093n056Fyt9kslynvsDIEiwMAVAa2NJbaenJKmJF8cLOxJuUriY6petbIXLlHZTOZ5vh1I%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqmarBG0CXmFdIDmKXdOefVFUXX0WBRR9sfjV9NFbkd9DYcbeu2_vRtK3XG9wYYXS_LVBJPGsFO5PtjILNuTYDWuf9SYEXSNpiJfrLyIjkw67gIk7ugtGYNex1FS7F4pbLmLVJ5umKf3YR9JdvlmDhN1GwAUhtcbaEQDt1N_rVH6nEBjkfgo-5-ejPmiMxy_LfPtW73zVDZ-RSQSN45sImgz_OkUt0nDNnRbpAZLn5MJ74g%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqma8yWVxv5MIF9JiDMJEKMIAZWOLXJROMMrmdhWdj2gd5Eej6kAzNZbuPzHTpBftuBZ-5rDf5Q5yYQ8E98gkGEuOfqKn50k10svD4YCEs9jMxKtYA12fxS6qjgkDIobvkmRdKWUedcEvzwPDHHZMnKP93GksLJoAgC16Zt7gdKf13u93ukZ0PyJwmXpx6dmr7cS3ye8FoyEN7yPTFFy65PxbziQe9F0bfxeNAaYQEBIIDc%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqma_d6E29tvWtCffs_KjddEtHBwt0OY5Kcz-WGyB1Ku2uvgLnbV-bDOg2G9sxml0nxKYwYeBIKFcg5mMq7YVo1Sb76PcGqAwi98uG0E2hGH_z9P6lBzAHEiC0YZOL_F-eA0W3eu0pTy3lXnLYoDgS3BHpSMOoiaZepBs2lO4olNGw9plz5A2fkhKqS-0njux9lYM9X4b6vFH1vgzzmcPrTYM7K5WslPN8HmCW7VCtOn2g8%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqma92xXJ1QTJ8hcU3zqx7zY4shc5ZDOPE_BjaPC6GM5wB1gJq71fWvs2mep1fiDQ1Lt9o31KsDc3aFPMVX0STCGEVbxGfiia6jJT2epb01j4mpWeGakT4y-HUHiwyHSJWE_F05yRlSQcJ4GhM38cj0olnhTWqjDbohtY8OIYOUWISnzSMn8CbXDozQAS2oLrP1h2srIIJqLDrcOgpTtb3rFL8Vxb6Q6J23Ri9NQKd3Jajk%3D)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqmaN7ljcd1Pt-vSzbRskd7SLQWManwKHx8XWmwBbGdHAE5fK_gLtMTYGkG4Me1xS1yTKar5Aox8RB4rEblXR001_n2Q7Lo_mZW-JQjADV3HSd1siQAuFIEFqkqVXG42jEgV4u-9Z0qByOp5zxzLjTHQD3Btpbfy1DXnpKwhEVVJxXXzgt-klhiec23t7d6E9WxAiu2fpXkSnFsrGfT9yPnlgXvqWZJXD1JG6JfOYzOp5_w%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_e=wuXKQJF4adPDt2E1NGApduDhpPKvFv0zpO4Co6vFB9t-OLLaRmAfu7g8ANv-IYzFeykBxjLC37gHQLcwuoTyIj7irwqy6XoLcCvL2QRvvM42CefWLjual_x_JqxP01okbekO1HK4hyDDNQNngvtYgzMnM4Us97d19YoBxXSIpoB43z4r5aCh4IHb2HAqZ_eO8n7cAiYW3F477BjaS_NN4m7RViftdyJlMGgNgIO2IJGhUSDNh-xUXK1MzTUGGqmaMakPnSnSuwJ4WuDDChkx4zaPghrmEEXEbUOJBYrh7BUn3QPxi2FEpQKM1rBb7G1qK-eIR1fcqA74-3fg2cPtX6zYBCra5jON_V0ZfeL7djrIs_LtufhycihYAifNWJNkPU08CkHd3U_wNY--O8qX7RNO5uwUlpo0CetqpbjKmwnQQTAMCutOyH3tQ_SjE6DfZ-Q_Xhfh6caBpU0LgNgggKD8PAheDJZGaxl2mikMNOM%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=d732e7a0a7a145438607a32a79685c12&_t=qJnLIhxqeQeH7uTgNryI3l_cZFK27nyV4NkySZNPhp6lsR50HTVhs5QgwwmH3v9J1kUqqWM1C3yULg61ronnjCSH40nD7k66cjWvxw7QUkpSkbsVFaLkmq5bpI357kXhTVVu54IkcCbekZDlr-GK9z1Koc4Qpw_Rt-isuURGp4k%3D).

Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

name: Great America Update
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6777%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=rTXixcmjLc%2fM%2fk3SGHL5yg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69727%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0wLYq%2fAUWeeaktw9Aoczew&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69727%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0wLYq%2fAUWeeaktw9Aoczew&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69728%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jCyunLy0nGmrJR1%2bIBqgNA&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69728%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jCyunLy0nGmrJR1%2bIBqgNA&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69729%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s3fvlEhBaxIMNVQl8IJOFA&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6777%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=rTXixcmjLc%2fM%2fk3SGHL5yg&sysid=1)_

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: He needs our support, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress
body:
Peter:

I'm proud to let you know I'm endorsing 100%
pro-Life, 100% pro-Second Amendment, and 100% pro-Trump Bo Hines
for Congress in North Carolina.

Ever since I entered Congress, I've been the
number one target of the hate-America left that wants to turn our
great country into a socialist nation.

Nancy Pelosi kicked me off my committees and
tried to expel me from Congress because I refused to play the
swamp's games.

And right now, I need some backup.
STAND WITH BO HINES
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY!
If Republicans lose this next election, the
Jihad Squad, Joe Biden, and the rest of the Democrats will slam
the pedal to the mettle on imposing their communist agenda on
America.

Radical Democrats will grant amnesty to tens
of millions of illegal aliens, pack the Supreme Court with
lunatic leftist judges, and ram the $93,000,000,000,000 Marxist
Green New Deal into law.

You and I cannot afford to blow the 2022
midterm election by nominating a bunch of Liz Cheney and Adam
Kinzinger-style RINOs that just want to impeach Donald Trump and
parrot Nancy Pelosi talking points.

So please join me in supporting Bo Hines's
campaign for Congress in North Carolina by chipping in your most
generous contribution right away.

Bo Hines is the type of America First fighter
you and I need in Congress.

Bo saw firsthand how woke fascists took over
college campuses imposing cancel culture to silence anyone that
stood up to their socialist agenda.

When Democrats, their allies in Silicon
Valley, and the fake news media rigged the 2020 election Bo Hines
called out the fraud.

Bo Hines is not afraid to take on the tough
fights.

And Bo Hines knows putting America First
means always going on offense.

Polls show a red wave building across the
country.

But the pro-Trump movement can only take our
country back by electing conservatives dedicated to the America
First agenda.

That's why I need your help to send the 100%
pro-Second Amendment and 100% pro-Trump Bo Hines to Congress by
chipping in a contribution right away.
SUPPORT BO HINES
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY
You and I need fighters in Congress now more
than ever.

Establishment RINOs sat in silence when the
Big Tech censors banned President Trump and me from social media.

Elites just want to maintain their membership
in the club.

Big Tech really isn't after me.

You are the true target.

Party leaders won't fight for you.

But I know Bo Hines will.

That's why I'm asking the Donald Trump
movement to support Bo Hines for Congress by chipping in your
most generous contribution right away.

The Biden regime declared parents that
protest abusive mask mandates and Marxist critical race theory as
domestic terrorists.

Adam Schiff, Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and
the rest of the Pelosi puppets on the Stalinist January 6 witch
hunt committee want to shred the rights of Trump supporters by
seizing their phone records and locking them up in prisons for
committing the "crime" of voting for Donald Trump.

I ran for Congress because I was sick of weak
Republicans that refused to fight for President Trump's America
First agenda.

I won because of your support.

And I'm asking you to join me in helping Bo
Hines become the latest America First Patriot to join Congress.

If Bo Hines wins in 2022, I know I can count
on Bo Hines to help me:

*** FINISH building Donald Trump's wall;

*** DEFEAT the Democrats massive power grab
to rig elections by injecting massive levels of fraud into every
election;

*** DEFEND the lives of the unborn by
defunding Planned Parenthood;

*** FIRE Dr. Fauci and hold him accountable
for funding coronavirus research in Communist China and;

*** SUPPORT the Second Amendment and oppose
every unconstitutional gun grab.

Bo Hines is the 100% pro-Life, 100% pro-gun,
and 100% pro-Trump candidate in his race for Congress in North
Carolina.

Saving America and stopping socialism starts
by electing an America Frist majority in 2022 that will always
fight for you.

That's why I'm asking for you to support Bo
Hines in his campaign for Congress by chipping of $10, $25, $50,
$100, $250, $500, $1,000, or what ever you can afford today.

Sincerely,

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress

name: MorganHarper.org
subject: YES, YES, YES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The only way we’ll pass the agenda
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220125-555-footer-ak&t=2&akid=555%2E90090%2ElxJLfH)
It’s been a little over a year since President Biden was sworn into office, but obstructionist Democrats have joined with the GOP to block huge parts of the President’s agenda.
Electing more moderate Senators won’t be the way we get progressive policies like voting rights legislation, climate investments, paid family leave, or canceling student debt through Congress. We can’t solve this by electing an opportunist, Manchin Democrat like Tim Ryan, who ran as anti-abortion and pro-NRA for much of his career.
**Sending more progressives like Morgan Harper to the Senate is the only way we’ll pass Biden’s agenda** and generate more opportunities for all Americans, especially the working families here in Ohio who need it most.
**[If you agree, will you chip in to our campaign to elect Morgan before our end-of-month deadline? We’re $8,915 behind our end-of-month goal and right now every grassroots dollar counts.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22141?t=3&akid=555%2E90090%2ElxJLfH)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22147?refcode=em20220125-555&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=555%2E90090%2ElxJLfH)**
If we flip this Senate seat blue and expand our Democratic majority, we can abolish the filibuster and finally pass needed changes and investments in our people.
Morgan will be a YES on voting rights, a YES on Biden’s economic agenda, and a YES on abolishing the filibuster to make the Senate work again.
**[That’s why we’re on Team Morganize – and if you’re with us, chip in whatever you can so we can reach our goal before our end-of-month deadline.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22141?t=23&akid=555%2E90090%2ElxJLfH)**
Thank you,
MorganHarper.org

name: Val Demings
subject: That's me [photo attached]
body:
Derek,

That's me you're looking at.

I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you.

What I did believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson of my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to being representative of my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.

My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will never tire in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans . I will never tire in continuing to do more good for you and your family.

But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election ever – and with just a .12% margin in Florida's last Senate race, every dollar will count tremendously. I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.

I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you split a $25 donation today between my campaign and CommonGood to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220125_CGVA_Demings

Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings

(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

name: Defeat Ron Johnson
subject: Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41050894/327116165/1691506499?refcode=EM_FR_220125FR_N_drj_90DA_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzEwNTI0Ny0xNzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2kTHOQbbVtdLloO0zXR0M65ou0mgWIXX3Dfk1cTrjA=)
---
Peter,

It’s been just over a week since Ron Johnson announced his reelection campaign, breaking his promise to only be in the Senate for two terms.

**But Ron Johnson is no stranger to breaking his promises.**

Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. Instead, he fought for his wealthy donor friends by pushing for a tax break for the ultra-wealthy. And his own net worth has doubled while in office.

He promised to stand up to China. Instead, he led the charge to kill the U.S. Innovation and Competition Act, a landmark piece of legislation to hold China accountable.

He promised to lower healthcare costs. Instead, he calls healthcare “a privilege” and continues to attack the Affordable Care Act.

Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate – **and it’s time to send him packing.**

**[Alex Lasry will fight for you and work day and night in the Senate to put money back in the pockets of hardworking Wisconsinites. Help us defeat Ron Johnson in November by making a donation of $10 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41050895/327116167/1691506499?refcode=EM_FR_220125FR_N_drj_90DA_7_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzEwNTI0Ny0xNzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2kTHOQbbVtdLloO0zXR0M65ou0mgWIXX3Dfk1cTrjA=)** clean_body: Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate. | | = Peter, It’s been just over a week since Ron Johnson announced his reelection campaign, breaking his promise to only be in the Senate for two terms. But Ron Johnson is no stranger to breaking his promises. Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. Instead, he fought for his wealthy donor friends by pushing for a tax break for the ultra-wealthy. And his own net worth has doubled while in office. He promised to stand up to China. Instead, he led the charge to kill the U.S. Innovation and Competition Act, a landmark piece of legislation to hold China accountable. He promised to lower healthcare costs. Instead, he calls healthcare “a privilege” and continues to attack the Affordable Care Act. Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate – and it’s time to send him packing. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. | | Dear Friend,
I wish to invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I prepared with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale College. It is called **“American Citizenship and Its Decline,”** and the online course is based on my latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

**[Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a5d0e634fcdf46a29e54ac3226ebae12&_e=C77QWFJ4GSuAHHjBiCMhjo9lhZ3zIEJ-BMKXVytb8-pPvwyD3x7SWDrMg5nZ3zGaxfl5nIVbCz0sAyyv7QcgniWCq3zIi4yxA-Riwbl4m-e7pOeftZJLXoykNjIdq2v3Z5TupZ0ALqfJlmdsS20SjHJMIa0LQgklC1CA3cr0xQzocHXJjh6_A7j_wQ7DM8J2vQllaHSoGN0K3hV1VU9snGe1FcavQf5wupiQvCWDiSTOte6gYOwofk_BetRhbwGOQlvvz-Ddo9e4HBHMXejVE0PeMz8i1INg5c7Pz6z1msDW-UzIJWOmhbO-HpLrr5Yv1sIotphLsFkancrX7tQHBkgGU_miqkiymS-8edbC4XeBlnXIHPe_rGAETOFcxEtXX9p3NsD4mFS93XAi3BucK3xKZsa7yndJYVrIzkZ4t7JbY97xSXQhJvuFVu_nH3niSoX17pvESnEiNdn2cJ5DfhoXR7YfMey32T3IGqc1QWg%3D)**

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class—currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism—identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values—is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new changing and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

**“American Citizenship and Its Decline”** is free to enroll in, and you can begin the course today by clicking on the secure link below.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/american-citizenship-and-its-decline**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a5d0e634fcdf46a29e54ac3226ebae12&_e=C77QWFJ4GSuAHHjBiCMhjo9lhZ3zIEJ-BMKXVytb8-pPvwyD3x7SWDrMg5nZ3zGaxfl5nIVbCz0sAyyv7QcgniWCq3zIi4yxA-Riwbl4m-e7pOeftZJLXoykNjIdq2v3Z5TupZ0ALqfJlmdsS20SjHJMIa0LQgklC1CA3cr0xQzocHXJjh6_A7j_wQ7DM8J2vQllaHSoGN0K3hV1VU9snGe1FcavQf5wupiQvCWDiSTOte6gYOwofk_BetRhbwGOQlvvz-Ddo9e4HBHMXejVE-KSTqIQOyLVtF4SVVm1ThUhiE6OlXjeH5lyTR8vTkr8z4Y_6tyNyDgAZbuwptUZTXfvrQl4ApzUCTP2FXE6W70619kMldAaI8Z8F-spIiGkCpIeirWKKNvsnOtsiOqG0sphN3LZ9fZrLU7pakTdCQSbI4vftai3s_sg6lgWAMLRXgi-N3At3kCMKOUxA6YKwfNlThspYTb08xWTdNKQFvw%3D)

Best wishes,

Victor Davis Hanson
Wayne & Marcia Buske Distinguished Fellow in History
Hillsdale College

name: America First Alerts
subject: Another attack on our elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| Democrats in New York gave the green light to allow nearly 1 MILLION foreign nationals to vote in American elections.
That's not hyperbole - the city council of our country's largest metropolis literally voted to allow people who aren't even citizens of this country to dictate how we make and enforce laws.
And these are the people who are telling us they care so much about democracy?!
---
| | | [DEFEND OUR ELECTIONS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yFDl1UowGKMpootY_koi49Lwrhawg8_u1eSb7Sd-jTBhjHJw9tc1WlWWtWyfkjaef3wwpLqivpoGgxIrwxNxMJYphfRitrsz5T5Fii48FtVmlhYSoIqTQWnZbnzcmKKJlOPJJXSv0NNcMHfC2nSskxiS_LGcJUeBwrXAgCRx_gCJPAMdSO7EROX6IXk12LzFfwP--NFQP_A=&c=hTYECDoAKmSPMT33hPfzDx9SV1AcEWxOSp6RAFc1O_JlAekvqdsEDQ==&ch=Pm-RvZk-M-7P9Jn-adJhJu2hOwUip44IpXKXDL5wKAMVMo2Gz_u4kg==)
---
| This is not a headline we should be seeing in America:
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yFDl1UowGKMpootY_koi49Lwrhawg8_u1eSb7Sd-jTBhjHJw9tc1WlWWtWyfkjaef3wwpLqivpoGgxIrwxNxMJYphfRitrsz5T5Fii48FtVmlhYSoIqTQWnZbnzcmKKJlOPJJXSv0NNcMHfC2nSskxiS_LGcJUeBwrXAgCRx_gCJPAMdSO7EROX6IXk12LzFfwP--NFQP_A=&c=hTYECDoAKmSPMT33hPfzDx9SV1AcEWxOSp6RAFc1O_JlAekvqdsEDQ==&ch=Pm-RvZk-M-7P9Jn-adJhJu2hOwUip44IpXKXDL5wKAMVMo2Gz_u4kg==)
---
| | |
---
| We're not going to pretend like this is going to stop at local elections in just one city...
The Left has now set us on the slippery slope towards DESTROYING the sacred right of 'one citizen, one vote' by allowing non-citizens to drown out their voice in ALL elections nationwide!
It's no wonder why they've been so adamant about throwing the Southern Border wide open:
If they give every criminal migrant that comes over the right to vote, that's their ticket to establishing PERMANENT, ONE-PARTY CONTROL over the United States of America.
That's why this grave election scheme needs to be stopped dead in its tracks right now. [Will you help save the republic before Democrats destroy it?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yFDl1UowGKMpootY_koi49Lwrhawg8_u1eSb7Sd-jTBhjHJw9tc1WlWWtWyfkjaef3wwpLqivpoGgxIrwxNxMJYphfRitrsz5T5Fii48FtVmlhYSoIqTQWnZbnzcmKKJlOPJJXSv0NNcMHfC2nSskxiS_LGcJUeBwrXAgCRx_gCJPAMdSO7EROX6IXk12LzFfwP--NFQP_A=&c=hTYECDoAKmSPMT33hPfzDx9SV1AcEWxOSp6RAFc1O_JlAekvqdsEDQ==&ch=Pm-RvZk-M-7P9Jn-adJhJu2hOwUip44IpXKXDL5wKAMVMo2Gz_u4kg==)
---
| | | [YES, I'LL TAKE A STAND](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yFDl1UowGKMpootY_koi49Lwrhawg8_u1eSb7Sd-jTBhjHJw9tc1WlWWtWyfkjaef3wwpLqivpoGgxIrwxNxMJYphfRitrsz5T5Fii48FtVmlhYSoIqTQWnZbnzcmKKJlOPJJXSv0NNcMHfC2nSskxiS_LGcJUeBwrXAgCRx_gCJPAMdSO7EROX6IXk12LzFfwP--NFQP_A=&c=hTYECDoAKmSPMT33hPfzDx9SV1AcEWxOSp6RAFc1O_JlAekvqdsEDQ==&ch=Pm-RvZk-M-7P9Jn-adJhJu2hOwUip44IpXKXDL5wKAMVMo2Gz_u4kg==)
---
| Thanks for taking a stand before this gets worse,
-America First Alerts

name: Eden at Barrier to Entry PAC
body:
😭❤️😭❤️😭❤️

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41052087/327124342/1300596418?refcode=220125_FR_RecurringDonations
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5MDE4YWJlLTFiN2UtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HiAyhZ7jQDLXFbXG5rv6-VqeMRbTbumcpE7tqe1Tr3g=)
---
Peter,

Last week, something so pretty huge happened: **A donor contributed $5,000 to support Barrier To Entry PAC candidates.**

This is the most a single person has ever given to our PAC and we are floored.

A donation of $5,000 to a scrappy organization like ours goes far— we can produce a beautiful advertisement fit for the airwaves for just $2,500.

Don’t believe us? We already did it! Just watch:
[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IS7wpEbOTz8?refcode=220125_FR_RecurringDonations_IMG) With $5,000, we can cover the cost of an internship program, knock doors, pay for office space for our candidates, the list goes on.

We have a plan in place for who we want to support in 2022 and this gift ensures that we are on track to provide funds to progressive candidates in need of campaign resources.

So now we are aiming high. **We are setting a goal to match the $5,000 in the next four weeks. This is the momentum we need to pack a harder punch and serve more candidates in 2022.**

We have no doubt our supporters can come together to meet our goal by February 25th, but we need your help. _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE TODAY!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=220125_FR_RecurringDonations
_btn1)** Recurring donations are so valuable to the ongoing sustainability of this organization. We have 98 recurring donors who give just $5 a month – that’s the cost of a latte – which is a great, consistent stream of funding for us.

**[Could you join that list and become a recurring donor of $5 a month?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41052088/327124343/-2038882143?refcode=220125_FR_RecurringDonations_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5MDE4YWJlLTFiN2UtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HiAyhZ7jQDLXFbXG5rv6-VqeMRbTbumcpE7tqe1Tr3g=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[MAKE $5 RECURRING DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41052089/327124344/1300596418?refcode=220125_FR_RecurringDonations
_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5MDE4YWJlLTFiN2UtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HiAyhZ7jQDLXFbXG5rv6-VqeMRbTbumcpE7tqe1Tr3g=)** Your support in the last 8 months has allowed us to make a huge impact. We are so grateful. Sincerely, **Eden McKissick-Hawley** **_Founder, Barrier to Entry PAC_**

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space.** _****Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >>****_ **______[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41052094/327124349/1300596418?refcode=220125_FR_RecurringDonations

We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. **Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> ____ biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5MDE4YWJlLTFiN2UtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HiAyhZ7jQDLXFbXG5rv6-VqeMRbTbumcpE7tqe1Tr3g= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: One Year Ago 💙
body:
One year ago, Peter. That's when the Tennessee Democratic Party's State Executive Committee entrusted me with the responsibility of leading our State Party as Chair.
It's been an amazing journey, but we're just getting started. Here's a recap of what we've been able to accomplish so far 👇

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ya6-5Bm5Q5M [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ya6-5Bm5Q5M]

We are in this for the long haul. My team and I understand that this isn't a "get blue quick" scheme, which is why we've invested our efforts into building a Party that's here to stay, and that can scale to compete with the Republican machine.

And this year, we are rolling out an ambitious Coordinated Campaign that includes a goal of registering over 200,000 Tennesseeans to vote. We are ready to organize a statewide effort on a scale that hasn't yet been seen in Tennessee.

I want to thank you, Peter. Your support means the world to me, we truly couldn't do this without you. If you're able, chip in to help propel us through 2022 so we can get some Democrats elected who will fight for working Tennesseans.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

But as importantly, we need boots on the ground. It's going to take all of us to organize our way to victory — take action with us now by signing up to volunteer.

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dviSsrmOjkqq8Hckg8c0iA2]

Leading the Tennessee Democratic Party has been the joy of a lifetime, and I can't wait to see what we can accomplish together over the next year. Thank you for sticking with us — let's continue to Build Back Blue!

Yours in the fight,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
https://www.facebook.com/tndem [https://www.facebook.com/tndem]
https://twitter.com/tndp [https://twitter.com/tndp]
https://www.instagram.com/tndems [https://www.instagram.com/tndems]

CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Team Gearing
subject: #BetterTexas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

We are working hard everyday to help Charlie reach voters throughout the 114th House District, and we need your help to get our #BetterTexas message out!
We’re quickly approaching an important fundraising deadline and we need your help to stay on track. Can you chip in $25 or $50 today to help us close the gap on our fundraising goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Early voting is only a few weeks away (it starts on Valentine’s Day!) and your donations help us pay for the remaining campaign literature, yard signs, direct mail, and digital advertising we need to win. Anything you can contribute makes a difference in helping us reach our goal. Chip in here >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

We also need your help with block walking! We are out knocking doors every day to spread the word about Charlie’s campaign and the fighter he will be for us in Austin. Charlie needs your help reaching our neighbors and making sure they vote for reproductive rights, Medicaid expansion, and our public schools!

This past weekend alone we knocked on more than 700 doors because of supporters like you. Can you join us this weekend? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/exMiHT4940qHQ_ffbwbq9w2] Sign up to volunteer here! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/exMiHT4940qHQ_ffbwbq9w2]

Together we can win this race,

- Team Gearing

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.
Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41052597/327126770/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQ4NzY3ZC0xZjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfWJ5TDUZjdwy5I1oWX11hsuFbOZGnesgsqdMQRwA0c=)

Hey team,

It's been a busy start to the 1st month of the new year for Team Hahn, and things will only continue to pick up from here.

At Team Hahn, we're working on expanding our outreach, building on our past success, and engaging new voters. **That's how we'll win and flip New York's District 1st blue.**

But since you're such a big part of this movement, I want to thank you and everyone who has supported Kara, including those who have joined us in this new year.
**Here are some things you may have missed this month, team⬇⬇**
* * *
**First, let me start by introducing you all to one of our newest additions to Team Hahn: Our Finance Director Zach Shenkman!** Since coming onboard, Zach has been pivotal in helping our team reach our fundraising goals and keeping our momentum going.
Here's where we're at for the month | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41052598/327126771/1150476578?refcode=em22_220125_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQ4NzY3ZC0xZjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfWJ5TDUZjdwy5I1oWX11hsuFbOZGnesgsqdMQRwA0c=)

name: Jessica Mason
subject: Friends, what do you think of free public transportation?
body:
Let’s make this a sustainable model.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41052755/327127431/-1288899752?refcode=220125_FR_freepublictransit_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkwYWYxNC0yMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWFs_62uYSJegE6O6tM4D5IZ-L4ap4LDl5jly-AbU5w=)
---
Hi Team New Deal!

Yesterday, a pilot program for free public transit kicked off in Dallas with a new bus schedule and network. People are thrilled about it, including me!

As we await to see the positive impacts that free public transportation will have on the working-class folks of Dallas, I’m asking you for a moment to envision possibilities even further BEYOND this exciting new free trial — _because I believe that we must be brave and bold enough to demand more._

**With measures like a Green New Deal, we can make public transit a permanent reality and sustainable part of everyday lives.**

Not only would GND provide green jobs and infrastructure to help thrive and prosper, but public transportation is a key component of Bernie’s plan — with a goal of boosting ridership by 65% nationwide on affordable, reliable, quick, and environmentally efficient by the year 2030.

Now that this new pilot program is underway in Dallas, it’s clearer than ever that comprehensive policies like GND — once considered by many as too radical or too far-fetched — are closer within reach than ever before.

**I’m hopeful that with your help, progressives are on their way to making bold and sweeping changes for the working class. But we can’t turn these plans into reality without leaders in Congress who are courageous enough to champion them.** ****[And that’s exactly what I plan to do, friends. Can I count on you to pitch in to help me fight for ambitious progressive policies like a Green New Deal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41052756/327127432/-1288899752?refcode=220125_FR_freepublictransit_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkwYWYxNC0yMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWFs_62uYSJegE6O6tM4D5IZ-L4ap4LDl5jly-AbU5w=)**** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ************[**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41052757/327127433/-1288899752?refcode=220125_FR_freepublictransit_EL10&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkwYWYxNC0yMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWFs_62uYSJegE6O6tM4D5IZ-L4ap4LDl5jly-AbU5w=)************

clean_body: Let’s make this a sustainable model. | | | = Hi Team New Deal! Yesterday, a pilot program for free public transit kicked off in Dallas with a new bus schedule and network. People are thrilled about it, including me! As we await to see the positive impacts that free public transportation will have on the working-class folks of Dallas, I’m asking you for a moment to envision possibilities even further BEYOND this exciting new free trial — because I believe that we must be brave and bold enough to demand more. With measures like a Green New Deal, we can make public transit a permanent reality and sustainable part of everyday lives. Not only would GND provide green jobs and infrastructure to help thrive and prosper, but public transportation is a key component of Bernie’s plan — with a goal of boosting ridership by 65% nationwide on affordable, reliable, quick, and environmentally efficient by the year 2030. Now that this new pilot program is underway in Dallas, it’s clearer than ever that comprehensive policies like GND — once considered by many as too radical or too far-fetched — are closer within reach than ever before. I’m hopeful that with your help, progressives are on their way to making bold and sweeping changes for the working class. But we can’t turn these plans into reality without leaders in Congress who are courageous enough to champion them. **= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ********=******** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** ******** ******** Positive change is on the horizon. body:
No one person — not even Mark himself — can win this election alone. But together... that’s how we’ll get it done and defend this seat.
#

$3.
What does that amount of money mean to you? Now let us ask:
If you knew contributing $3 would mean Mark Kelly would get re-elected to the Senate this year, wouldn’t it be worth it?
How about if you knew that same $3 would keep Mitch McConnell from becoming Majority Leader again? Wouldn’t you give that $3 immediately?
What if you knew that $3 would re-elect a man fighting for voting rights, action on climate, lowering drug prices and more? Wouldn’t it be the best $3 you could spend?
Now, we know $3 doesn’t seem like it can do all that. But when everyone is chipping in, it can.
Cause by the time you reach this point in the email, someone has already chipped in their $3. And in order for this to work, they need you to do the same.
And that’s why we’re asking:
[**Can you please make your first $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to an end in just a few days?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220125-1-7&t=1&refcode2=1987_6688874_oZAAoO&akid=1987%2E6688874%2EoZAAoO)

--- | | **❝Superintendent Marc Thielman has proven his leadership abilities by standing in the face of adversity several times, including keeping his district and school open these past two years and supporting youth who were on the brink of suicide. During a time of unprecedented crises that disrupted thousands of Oregon families and businesses, Superintendent Thielman focused on the welfare of the children and families he represents and safely allowed the Alsea School District to remain open. Additionally—even amidst the crisis—he created a new program for families across the state who wanted to safeguard their children from unhealthy amounts of screen time. Superintendent Thielman is also an advocate for each person’s right to medical autonomy, and returning decision-making to the capable hands of physicians and their patients. It is for these reasons that he has earned my support and vote for Governor of Oregon.** ❞ — Julie Glass, ND Naturopathic Doctor --- --- | |
