clean_body: | | | | Email not displaying correctly? . | | | | ❝Superintendent Marc Thielman has proven his leadership abilities by standing in the face of adversity several times, including keeping his district and school open these past two years and supporting youth who were on the brink of suicide. During a time of unprecedented crises that disrupted thousands of Oregon families and businesses, Superintendent Thielman focused on the welfare of the children and families he represents and safely allowed the Alsea School District to remain open. Additionally—even amidst the crisis—he created a new program for families across the state who wanted to safeguard their children from unhealthy amounts of screen time. Superintendent Thielman is also an advocate for each person’s right to medical autonomy, and returning decision-making to the capable hands of physicians and their patients. It is for these reasons that he has earned my support and vote for Governor of Oregon. ❞ — Julie Glass, ND Naturopathic Doctor | | | Friend, if you agree with Julie Glass, "support the Marc for Oregon campaign"). Together, we can stop the unnecessary suffering from failed policies and poor leadership, and bring Oregon back to a place of accountability and abundance. | | JOIN US | | | | PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

name: Tom Perez
subject: Asking for your input:
body:
I'm reaching out to ask for your input as my team and I look to set our election year priorities in 2022. Marylanders are some of the brightest, most passionate people in America, and your input will help us develop a plan that is truly representative of you and your family's needs.
#

Everyone,

When I announced my candidacy for Governor of Maryland, I promised that if elected, I wouldn't just talk about transparency and accountability in government – I would live those values, making sure that Annapolis really works for Marylanders.

In part, fulfilling that promise certainly means using my experiences as a life-long public servant to make our government equitable and efficient, but more importantly, it means taking the time to listen and learn from the people I hope to serve.

In that spirit, I'm reaching out to ask for your input as my team and I look to set our election year priorities in 2022. Marylanders are some of the brightest, most passionate people in America, and your input will help us develop a plan that is truly representative of you and your family's needs.

**_[We set up a quick survey where you can provide your thoughts about the issues that are top of mind for you right now. I hope you'll take a minute or two to share your thoughts:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41053256/327129647/1016167296?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTJhOTJjMC0yMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VFBGioEkg1iPLwmfAF_0Q5rORmKcuz2AqEUpxm3WJE=&emci=c4c47272-fe7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e12a92c0-217e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)_**
******[Take the 2022 Priorities Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41053257/327129649/1016167296?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTJhOTJjMC0yMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VFBGioEkg1iPLwmfAF_0Q5rORmKcuz2AqEUpxm3WJE=&emci=c4c47272-fe7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e12a92c0-217e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)******
While I'd love to sit down with you and get your input in person, I hope dropping you a quick note to get your thoughts is okay, too. Thanks so much for taking the time to give us your feedback. I'm excited to read your responses.

– Tom

body:
Today, I am releasing my brand-new Safe Streets Plan, and I need you to join me. [](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=173fbc959acd4f8db2ad282fe011d17d&_e=YiQYIN8_nIKEJcW5l8_gOwwU5d9hGbO-PYcONfMwtD0WN-RebFyei2pD1WKyKmg0Bu7EjpMWgQMZhZe6sHPspv9Ehw4CZP-Yu73IAHCVZrvORRNFvCTzzXCdegUttec9-5h7ZtoBQninJ1ojtSHv8UP1ccAynYCtUoaMJ6xUFLgHCwg4TLHscvpZUOMOG6SkWDhuXhcl_i0egAbWfJ91CCN0E8t3XbdC33_ZmDBVoocreGSJI8qG4_ZJ1lYjeBxMHLlXgLN3Sp08sIVN0OjIh0BhVgYiSmhRxhDk4M0O_ZWdx1e0oElf7itIagVNgnEaTB3iZ6OKQBpF93dZvOj0H5ig8ahPTtrVOB14xiCRgZRY74uv0Be63QQ4rrbfTCknu4hpC0kzU9x68fc4y_cXXsDppSjAQ2_CmZaXEq0T8LBiYhBeU7z4Bv-IwH9YN-RLWxbFNFJ2OnWdMdtNAzBXbw%3D%3D) Team, I have a statistic that will shock you. Since the beginning of the pandemic, 12 children have died of COVID-19 in Illinois’ largest city. _In that same time, 228 children were murdered in Chicago._ So why are our leaders only treating one of these problems like an emergency for our kids? Illinois families need immediate, decisive action to restore public safety. Action that only a political outsider can deliver. **As governor, I will prioritize the crime crisis in our state on Day 1. And I want to show you that I mean it by releasing this Safe Streets Plan.** [**READ MY PLAN TO FIGHT THE CRIME CRISIS**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=173fbc959acd4f8db2ad282fe011d17d&_e=YiQYIN8_nIKEJcW5l8_gOwwU5d9hGbO-PYcONfMwtD0WN-RebFyei2pD1WKyKmg0Bu7EjpMWgQMZhZe6sHPspv9Ehw4CZP-Yu73IAHCVZrvORRNFvCTzzXCdegUttec9-5h7ZtoBQninJ1ojtSHv8UP1ccAynYCtUoaMJ6xUFLgHCwg4TLHscvpZUOMOG6SkWDhuXhcl_i0egAbWfJ91CCN0E8t3XbdC33_ZmDBVoocreGSJI8qG4_ZJ1lYjeBxMNfMGZ65gr-EB8S7nWxrKEhrbzyg8IVpZ3cyClXT6onqQb2UBlnzRg7cb64txWVpzJt7HCveaCxIZ8K_jsxTBfsFFYegFefBdMmULFNyODXlxM6S-gawyKQaD7YEFsAb1GbVlBWIxnc9hmop9d5xWG0tSG8seTsRcn8Y62KquSN7lrGZi5kFdiQhAXkOUmwv3Hi-okxknMe4G6c2wsDLvOQ%3D%3D) [**JOIN OUR SAFE STREETS TASK FORCE**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=173fbc959acd4f8db2ad282fe011d17d&_e=YiQYIN8_nIKEJcW5l8_gOwwU5d9hGbO-PYcONfMwtD0WN-RebFyei2pD1WKyKmg0Bu7EjpMWgQMZhZe6sHPspv9Ehw4CZP-Yu73IAHCVZrvORRNFvCTzzXCdegUttec9-5h7ZtoBQninJ1ojtSHv8UP1ccAynYCtUoaMJ6xUFLgHCwg4TLHscvpZUOMOG6SkWDhuXhcl_i0egAbWfJ91CCN0E8t3XbdC33_ZmDBVoocreGSJI8qG4_ZJ1lYjeBxMYFR-qmMRhf20m6SzN0_BrV72h2FVNf8YUCcbGLHte6ekmMUMmZjLW69B8TNZf8G-hq0vmf578zxmJvi-puECJ6wcfAYUVThViaJxEA9ZsQTgSp6WjqURqozi7ZeJmgxhGbY7ZKnxrE3zRpkTiZG8wXrOwXy_bxr9xB14hC0TTLbMUF4BB2NvWx3a0svGkXWP9LbSWoM8eZ31fBgcUGT37g%3D%3D) Illinoisans deserve leaders who will enforce the law, hold criminals accountable, and grow opportunities right here at home. Our system is now failing on all three counts. We must act. [**Please, take a moment to read the plan and join our Safe Streets Task Force.**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=173fbc959acd4f8db2ad282fe011d17d&_e=YiQYIN8_nIKEJcW5l8_gOwwU5d9hGbO-PYcONfMwtD0WN-RebFyei2pD1WKyKmg0Bu7EjpMWgQMZhZe6sHPspv9Ehw4CZP-Yu73IAHCVZrvORRNFvCTzzXCdegUttec9-5h7ZtoBQninJ1ojtSHv8UP1ccAynYCtUoaMJ6xUFLgHCwg4TLHscvpZUOMOG6SkWDhuXhcl_i0egAbWfJ91CCN0E8t3XbdC33_ZmDBVoocreGSJI8qG4_ZJ1lYjeBxM1efT4XRLFfhztT_p70srm-v2r2BkTfWA_NUk7Pge_JMNFWepLvS-C3GktyUcQ2mlHsdVFyT8b8RZNdka5V9zuQ3q0MD149OngEoJOZGDgwUYSQvDuAcCBSK6IrFzr4As8ZcxKzYCcC_TYWtPXyIWklx5hYvi5utF6YUggSxclfJ5CRjWM59YBB44-wJEy4SMvhPJueT63E4_M-AxoYW-Cw%3D%3D) Thank you, Jesse Sullivan |

| | Dear Patriot:

Here in Arkansas, we support our Second Amendment.

The Regime doesn't give us our freedoms.

_God does._

But our God-given right to Self-Defense is under attack like never before from the Left.

**They want to take our guns. They say it every day.

_RINOs like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, are helping them do it by supporting Red Flag gun confiscation._**

They're defunding the police.

They're letting drug dealers, rapists, and murderers go free. George Soros-funded District Attorneys across our country are refusing to enforce the law.

Crime is out of control, and murders are skyrocketing.

**Meanwhile, they want to make sure that normal, decent, patriotic citizens like you and I can't defend ourselves.**

They want to make sure that all we have is a criminal underclass and a totalitarian overclass.

_There has never been more reason to own a gun. You owe it to yourself and, more importantly, to your family._

Be ready to defend them against the predators that the Left is unleashing against all of us.

Neil Robinson Kumar

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Racist politicians and racist redistricting
body:
Justice Democrat Odessa Kelly has been redrawn into a new district.
#
Peter,
2022 has given state legislators the opportunity to redraw Congressional maps, oftentimes to tip the scales, protect political power, and institutionally disenfranchise Black, brown, and low-income voters.
**Gerrymandering is the new Jim Crow, and its effects are being seen across the country as legislators divide diverse communities into separate congressional districts in order to dilute the collective strength of Black and brown voters.**
In Nashville, Republicans have redrawn Justice Democrat Odessa Kelly’s Congressional District. The GOP broke up Nashville into different House districts that favor Republicans in order to destroy a progressive stronghold in the South. Racist politicians have been carving out electoral districts and suppressing the vote at the expense of Black and brown voters for decades, enabled by weak national voting rights laws and the filibuster.
**Will you help us fight back, Peter?** At this moment, we need our movement to stand up against unfair election maps, keep Odessa in the fight, and ensure Black and brown voices are heard in Nashville. [That is why we’re asking you to split a contribution between Justice Democrats and Odessa Kelly’s campaign — so we’re ready for whatever comes next.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90998?refcode=em20220125-21659&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4)
**[Fight back](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90998?refcode=em20220125-21659&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4)**
Nashville is just one example of the impact of gerrymandering, and the need for national comprehensive voting rights legislation. That is why Justice Democrats are working hard, not just to elect Odessa Kelly, but to fight voter suppression and abolish the racist filibuster.
The politicians drawing up these maps know that the collective power of our movement is unstoppable. But at this moment, we need to use that power to fight these racist maps and elect working people to Congress. **[Will you join us by splitting a contribution between Odessa’s campaign and Justice Democrats?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90998?refcode=em20220125-21659&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4)
**[Fight back](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90998?refcode=em20220125-21659&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220125-21659-footer&t=25&refcode2=21659_1203867_9jMfV4&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=21659%2E1203867%2E9jMfV4)

subject: General Flynn to visit Houston TX
body:
A message from General Flynn Join me on January 27th as I welcome General Michael Flynn to Houston. We are bringing America First to the heart of Te
| |

[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=597719.2598.1.a4b185a289be0ce4923fcf06a7e9aef8) |

| | [ A message from General Flynn ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=597719.2599.1.5d7cac4eaea06c042c2e93fbad69a581)
---
**Join me on January 27th as I welcome General Michael Flynn to Houston.** We are bringing America First to the heart of Texas! I am Bianca Gracia, the President of Latinos for Trump. I’ve spent the past five years fighting for President Trump and the America First Agenda; even now I am fighting to have the illegitimate 2020 election overturned. Everything I’ve done up to now has taught me this, no good patriot can sit on the sideline anymore. That’s why I’m not just suing to get the 2020 election overturned I am running to take on the RINOs and Socialists ruining our nation. Will you join me in this fight? Together we can bring America First Back! This Thursday General Flynn is coming to La Porte and I want you to join us. This will be a great opportunity to get to meet the General and I don’t want you to miss it! Only together can we take America back! Will I see you there?
---

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3d5aj--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d5aj-1uxg5-4qqlpo4/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d5aj-1uxg6-4qqlpo5/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d5aj-1uxg7-4qqlpo6/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d5aj-1uxg8-4qqlpo7/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d5aj-1uxg9-4qqlpo8/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d5aj-1uxga-4qqlpo8/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3d5aj-1uxgb-4qqlpo9/ "PompeoEmailFooter")
---

Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC!
Add **info@email.cavpac.com** to your address book!

Instead, we now have inflation rates at a 40-Year high, with gas prices up more than $1 here in New Hampshire. We’ve seen a disastrous, poorly-planned, politically-motivated withdrawal from Afghanistan, and a crisis at the Southern Border that continues to worsen. And he clearly had no secret plan to handle this pandemic, other than a vaccine mandate scheme that the Supreme Court rightly declared unconstitutional. Unfortunately, despite all of this, New Hampshire’s all-Democrat federal delegation has done nothing to push back on Washington’s failures. **We need more 603 and less D.C. - and if Maggie Hassan has chosen to stand in lock-step with Biden and the Washington crowd, then it’s time we get better leadership here in the Granite State.** **[__I hope you’ll support that effort today - otherwise, we’re going to be left with the same challenges when we ask this question again next January.__](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODcxMTA3MTY0NDU0NTI1NTQ4JmM9bThoMyZlPTAmYj04ODE2ODQ1MzQmZD1vOG80ejBr.KH9-WRC0mo983Cuce6O_aj6lfng4uzoTp6jCOOZp50s)**

#

Dan Patrick is vulnerable. His record of failure includes refusing to winterize the grid, destroying our public schools, and denying Texans the right to vote. Texans are ready for change, and they know Mike is the candidate to beat him. **But here’s the****truth, folks:****Dan Patrick has a massive war chest that won’t be easy to beat.** Basically every corporate interest under the sun is working hard to try to save Dan Patrick and buy this election — not to mention the gaggle of billionaires and right-wing mega-donors stuffing his campaign coffers with cash! Why are these shadowy players helping Dan Patrick? They don’t want to lose their favorite lapdog in the lieutenant governor’s office. Since taking office, Patrick has delivered for the wealthy and corporations who invested in his campaign — while forgetting about the good people of Texas. Let’s just say they all got their money’s worth. So, they’re hoping their big investment pays off again this time around. We can’t let them be successful, which is why we’re asking: **[Will you make a contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford ahead of our very FIRST end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022? clean_body: | Dan Patrick is vulnerable. His record of failure includes refusing to winterize the grid, destroying our public schools, and denying Texans the right to vote. Texans are ready for change, and they know Mike is the candidate to beat him. But here’s thetruth, folks:Dan Patrick has a massive war chest that won’t be easy to beat. Basically every corporate interest under the sun is working hard to try to save Dan Patrick and buy this election — not to mention the gaggle of billionaires and right-wing mega-donors stuffing his campaign coffers with cash! Why are these shadowy players helping Dan Patrick? They don’t want to lose their favorite lapdog in the lieutenant governor’s office. Since taking office, Patrick has delivered for the wealthy and corporations who invested in his campaign — while forgetting about the good people of Texas. Let’s just say they all got their money’s worth. So, they’re hoping their big investment pays off again this time around. We can’t let them be successful, which is why we’re asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With the future of our beloved Texas at stake, we can’t afford to fall short on any of our fundraising goals — especially our very first monthly goal of the election year. We appreciate anything you can give today. Thank you, — Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr.
subject: Invitation: Policy + Pints with Pramila Jayapal and me @ Thu Jan 27, 2022 4 p.m. (ET)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Pint optional. Policy non-negotiable.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4268?t=2&akid=12927%2E53494%2EtHJpLH) Friend, I'm excited to announce that later this week, I'll be sitting down with Rep. Pramila Jayapal1 for the next round of Policy + Pints, Evergreen's virtual event series. We're going to discuss why2 and how3 the Senate absolutely must pass the climate investments in the Build Back Better Act—and I'd really love to see you there. [**_Click here to RSVP and join me and Rep. Jayapal on Thursday, January 27 at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4268?t=3&akid=12927%2E53494%2EtHJpLH) |
### **Policy + Pints with Rep. Pramila Jayapal and Rev. Yearwood 4**
Thursday 1/27
4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT
---
| [**RSVP NOW**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4268?t=4&akid=12927%2E53494%2EtHJpLH)
---
I don't care what's in your pint glass—you can join us with beer, seltzer, tea, coffee, even a pint of ice cream.
But for me, the policy is non-negotiable. Here's what I mean: The $555 billion of climate investments we're fighting for isn't some abstract number. It represents real human lives that we can save right here, right now.
The climate crisis is here, and it's hitting communities of color first and worst. Our Black, Brown, and Indigenous neighbors are on the frontlines, and they're counting on us.
We have the chance to make a historic, long-overdue down payment on defeating the climate crisis. We have the chance to defend the most vulnerable and build communities where families can thrive for generations to come. We have the chance to create good-paying clean energy jobs in these very same communities.
And this Thursday, you'll have the chance to hear more about this directly from me and Rep. Jayapal. You won't want to miss it: [**_RSVP to join us on Thursday, January 27 at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT to hear more about the vital importance of these climate investments. We'll raise a glass to getting them passed in 2022!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4268?t=5&akid=12927%2E53494%2EtHJpLH)
See you next Thursday,
Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr.
Evergreen Advisory Board Member
[RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4268?t=6&akid=12927%2E53494%2EtHJpLH)
---
* * *
1 Chairwoman of the House Progressive Caucus, who helped hold the line on climate investments in this bill.
2 In short: Because climate justice is racial justice, and racial justice is climate justice.
3 That's where Rep. Jayapal comes in.
4 We'll also be joined by Evergreen's very own Executive Director Jamal Raad for his Policy + Pints debut.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=12927%2E53494%2EtHJpLH). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

We're going to discuss why2 and how3 the Senate absolutely must pass the climate investments in the Build Back Better Act—and I'd really love to see you there. | Policy + Pints with Rep. Pramila Jayapal and Rev. Yearwood 4 Thursday 1/27 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT | I don't care what's in your pint glass—you can join us with beer, seltzer, tea, coffee, even a pint of ice cream. But for me, the policy is non-negotiable. Here's what I mean: The $555 billion of climate investments we're fighting for isn't some abstract number. It represents real human lives that we can save right here, right now. The climate crisis is here, and it's hitting communities of color first and worst. Our Black, Brown, and Indigenous neighbors are on the frontlines, and they're counting on us. We have the chance to make a historic, long-overdue down payment on defeating the climate crisis. We have the chance to defend the most vulnerable and build communities where families can thrive for generations to come. We have the chance to create good-paying clean energy jobs in these very same communities. And this Thursday, you'll have the chance to hear more about this directly from me and Rep. Jayapal. You won't want to miss it: See you next Thursday, Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr. Evergreen Advisory Board Member * 1 Chairwoman of the House Progressive Caucus, who helped hold the line on climate investments in this bill. 2 In short: Because climate justice is racial justice, and racial justice is climate justice. 3 That's where Rep. Jayapal comes in. 4 We'll also be joined by Evergreen's very own Executive Director Jamal Raad for his Policy + Pints debut.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Timothy?=
subject: Check Out What Conservative Fighters Are Saying About Our Campaign!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3140ac8e8928/check-out-what-conservative-fighters-are-saying-about-our-campaign?e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| |
---
| | **Check Out What Conservative Fighters Are Saying About Our Campaign**
---
|
---
| Read Congressman Hice's full statement below:

“It's been the honor of a lifetime to fight for our values in Washington, but the fight is far from over. The Biden Administration is out of control and now more than ever we need patriots who will stand up for our country. This is why Dee Dee and I are proud to endorse Timothy Barr in Georgia's 10th District. Timothy is a proven fighter who will put America first and be an active member of the Freedom Caucus. We did not take this decision lightly and at the end of the day, it was made as a family with careful consideration and much prayer. The candidate elected will be our Congressman, as well as our children's and grandchildren's. We know you can trust Timothy to represent your family because we trust him to represent ours.”
---
|
---
| Read Congressman Clyde's statement below:

"I am joining Congressman Hice in endorsing Timothy Barr for Congress. There are over a dozen candidates in that race, so there are many choices, but I want someone who has a proven conservative record. Timothy Barr does. In the State House, he withstood the pressure of establishment politicians including threats to take his office and remove him from his committees. I've been on the frontlines in Washington and I can tell you we desperately need conservative fighters like Jody Hice, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Lauren Boebert. I need the 10th District to send us reinforcements, and I'm confident Timothy will join the Freedom Caucus and stand in the gap with us."
---
|
---
| Read Congressman Duncan's full statement below:

"We need fighters in Congress who are willing to stand up to the radical left. Tim Barr is cut from the same cloth as my friend Jody Hice. I'm honored to endorse Tim Barr for Congress and I look forward to having him join me in the House Freedom Caucus as we fight to put America First."
---
|
---
| Read Congressman Norman's full statement below:

“If our nation has learned anything recently, it’s how important strong conservative leadership is in Congress. As urgent as it is to pick up House and Senate seats in 2022, it’s equally as important to maintain Republican holds where they currently exist. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Tim Barr for Georgia’s 10th congressional district. Rep. Jody Hice has set very high standards for principled conservativism in the House, and expectations are very high for his successor. I know Tim Barr will be an excellent choice, and I look forward to seeing him accomplish great things in the U.S. House of Representatives.”
---
|
---
| Read Congressman Brooks' full statement below:

"Too often politicians run as Conservatives and legislate as RINO's. Tim Barr has a proven record of keeping his campaign promises and standing up to the Establishment and special interest groups who corrupt American politics. That is why I'm proud to endorse Tim Barr for Congress."
---
|
---
| |
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Timothy Barr for Congress, Inc.
824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101
Athens, GA 30605

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=cfa662e05a&e=061a1ea0d5&c=a0feede868) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=cfa662e05a&e=061a1ea0d5&c=a0feede868).
---

subject: How is “Bidenflation” Impacting YOU?

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/59ce1c0ab8ecef71/025d80b47b82402dc3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
Peter,

The latest numbers were released earlier this month.

**It’s MORE BAD NEWS for the American people...**

Inflation has now hit a 40-year high thanks to Joe Biden’s failed leadership and the Democrats’ tax-and-spend agenda... _wiping out real wage gains and sending the cost of living through the roof!_

Family budgets are now stressed to the breaking point, with the cost of everything from housing to groceries to home heating to used cars rising and rising with no end in sight. At the same time, we have a supply chain crisis that resulted in empty store shelves.

Today, I want to hear for YOU. I want to know how “Bidenflation” is impacting your family.

[**Follow this link to complete our questionnaire >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/59ce1c0ab8ecef71/6cc27a213b6bb625c3d6b838967d376c/38863)

I’m running to restore real representation for our district and BREAK the Democrats’ grip on power in Washington.

**Together, I know we can _take back our country_ this November and _stop this insanity_!**

Thank you in advance for taking time out to weigh in today.

Toby Anderson
Republican Candidate for Congress (NJ-11)

subject: Erik's Colorado Microbrew Tour Begins!
body:
Yes, all 52 BrewPubs in Jeffco
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ETHYGZJHLEvAKoQYCsDCleCJrgFWo01GxdO5Fn_QTgiwLPzdNa6M962YPs3ZKLxanEvvQhv0BotVybtd3C-f0bVabXL2jR8JOET83_wRozzkAGrsY5penT1UANYKzYDX5ChFPEKiT4D2gnN_BEa670Zm6f_P1KTA&c=Lr0OZItibEf0P3HKrSUwFPX9jrPRTlk6WIX78T4jggf4DXw29a-saA==&ch=kME2V_35OURC1wxoEbkAKieoP4us8nW6HbT2iKibppUk6eLzF1V1Tw==)
---
|
---
|
# The Aadland for Colorado Brewery Tour Begins!
---
Americans--especially Coloradans--love beer. When it comes to craft beer, consumers spend more than $22 billion annually on their favorite brews. But when the pandemic came, craft breweries took a big hit. Two out of three craft brewery employees were laid off, and production fell by 9 percent.
According to brewersassociation.org, models show growth of 6-7% last year over 2020, but production levels still fall below 2019. It appears it will take craft brewing until the end 2022 to recover to its previous levels, but may not fully return to the growth trend it had seen of 3-4% per year.
Breweries are the modern day "town square," where people gather and talk about their day, their families, issues of the times, and the latest sports scores. To celebrate small businesses, and to talk with the people of Congressional District 7, we are traveling the district with our Brewery Tour. We've identified 52 breweries in the district, so we're coming to one near you!
I look forward to meeting with you and talking with you!
---
| [Check the Calendar for Locations and Dates](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ETHYGZJHLEvAKoQYCsDCleCJrgFWo01GxdO5Fn_QTgiwLPzdNa6M94n7En4ufFc8Mvl0fPhN2L7m6G51Q9HlUWNA6HMm_dMrGA_9wyiaJAyGP_Y6AF5_r-mHWFS_J3PqEx2k1X_p6sw4MzktUWEJCdLZSpFQy2tFs8euvkXTukRLiuqH98A3Iw==&c=Lr0OZItibEf0P3HKrSUwFPX9jrPRTlk6WIX78T4jggf4DXw29a-saA==&ch=kME2V_35OURC1wxoEbkAKieoP4us8nW6HbT2iKibppUk6eLzF1V1Tw==)
---
Watch our emails and check our Calendar (above) to know where we're going next.
Tuesday night, I will be at WestFax Brewing Company, 6733 W Colfax Ave, Lakewood. Campaign staff will be at the World's End Brewery Company, 401 Main Street, Canon City.
Wednesday night I will be at Snowpack Taproom and Pizzeria, 11863 Springs Rd #210, Conifer, and the Evergreen Brewery, 2962 Evergreen Pkwy #201 in Evergreen.
Come meet me and share your thoughts, concerns, and hopes; if you're a registered Republican, we'll have pens ready for you to sign our petition and put me on the Primary Election ballot for June 28. I Hope to see you there!
---

clean_body: Yes, all 52 BrewPubs in Jeffco | | | | == | | The Aadland for Colorado Brewery Tour Begins! Americans--especially Coloradans--love beer. When it comes to craft beer, consumers spend more than $22 billion annually on their favorite brews. But when the pandemic came, craft breweries took a big hit. Two out of three craft brewery employees were laid off, and production fell by 9 percent. According to brewersassociation.org, models show growth of 6-7% last year over 2020, but production levels still fall below 2019. It appears it will take craft brewing until the end 2022 to recover to its previous levels, but may not fully return to the growth trend it had seen of 3-4% per year. Breweries are the modern day "town square," where people gather and talk about their day, their families, issues of the times, and the latest sports scores. To celebrate small businesses, and to talk with the people of Congressional District 7, we are traveling the district with our Brewery Tour. We've identified 52 breweries in the district, so we're coming to one near you! I look forward to meeting with you and talking with you! | == Watch our emails and check our Calendar (above) to know where we're going next. Tuesday night, I will be at WestFax Brewing Company, 6733 W Colfax Ave, Lakewood. Campaign staff will be at the World's End Brewery Company, 401 Main Street, Canon City. Wednesday night I will be at Snowpack Taproom and Pizzeria, 11863 Springs Rd #210, Conifer, and the Evergreen Brewery, 2962 Evergreen Pkwy #201 in Evergreen. Come meet me and share your thoughts, concerns, and hopes; if you're a registered Republican, we'll have pens ready for you to sign our petition and put me on the Primary Election ballot for June 28. I Hope to see you there! | | | | | == | | | Stand with Erik Today | Stand with me today by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. Donate today | == You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker about your concerns with government. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | Together we can stand against bad policy and for our future. | | | COLORADO WILDFIRE - HOW YOU CAN HELP | Here are a number of places where you can contribute goods, funding, or even volunteer your time: | == | YMCA is accepting donations (blankets, pillows, dog and cat food) at their location: 2800 Dagny Way, Lafayette, CO 80026. body:
The assault on voting rights is well underway, and we have to act before it’s too late
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054338/327134855/-182240488?refcode=EM_FR_220125EOM_EOM_TC_CC_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWYzMTc3NS0yODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qp83UJCvRyHAmUgxoICOkIRANKHGnsNgTGwmS1gQXX0=)
---
Supporters, Voting is a fundamental function of our democracy. It guarantees that each of us, regardless of our values and beliefs, have an avenue to hold our elected officials accountable. Over the past several years, voting rights have been under attack. Sparking from Trump's lies, lawmakers across the country are using dozens of attempts to delegitimize the sanctity of our electoral process and dilute our democracy. In November, Ohio’s Republican-packed legislature approved gerrymandered maps, reneging on voters' call for fairer representation. As if that wasn't enough, Secretary of State Frank LaRose did nothing, neglecting his duty to defend his constituents in favor of party politics. Republicans are playing with fire, and in order to protect our state, we must act now. The future of Ohio's elections is on the ballot in November, and if we miss this opportunity, Republicans could do irreparable damage. [**We have to raise $5,000 before midnight but we need your help! Will you chip in $10 right now and ensure the future of our democracy and make sure Republicans’ attacks fall flat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054339/327134856/-1374079767?refcode=EM_FR_220125EOM_EOM_TC_CC_5_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWYzMTc3NS0yODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qp83UJCvRyHAmUgxoICOkIRANKHGnsNgTGwmS1gQXX0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054340/327134857/-182240488?refcode=EM_FR_220125EOM_EOM_TC_CC_5_NG_N_el10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWYzMTc3NS0yODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qp83UJCvRyHAmUgxoICOkIRANKHGnsNgTGwmS1gQXX0=)

clean_body: The assault on voting rights is well underway, and we have to act before it’s too late | = Supporters, Voting is a fundamental function of our democracy. It guarantees that each of us, regardless of our values and beliefs, have an avenue to hold our elected officials accountable. Over the past several years, voting rights have been under attack. Sparking from Trump's lies, lawmakers across the country are using dozens of attempts to delegitimize the sanctity of our electoral process and dilute our democracy. In November, Ohio’s Republican-packed legislature approved gerrymandered maps, reneging on voters' call for fairer representation. As if that wasn't enough, Secretary of State Frank LaRose did nothing, neglecting his duty to defend his constituents in favor of party politics. Republicans are playing with fire, and in order to protect our state, we must act now. Susan's campaign runs on grassroots donations. = = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. name: PrimarySinema.com
subject: CNN: How much trouble is Sinema really in?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
It all comes down to us. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwLBpqdlb-u6vwHTzrxPPV0rS9qJtIIyfXJbVqfaBBR6A_CdKG3RaJfbP1yY0SE74Gsms5KmYy-kADpDVGYwwjfoI4Lj0FobKk1JG2fygXOXfbJG4FQY22ZUxgoNUZF3-hxqn_QU6-G4PW8xMY4cJe8Y6oIOnGP1rkxxr_kBVWZm0ZyxNbf92fQoj3U_5M_VvNZ1PDbwUKdeMX4OFU5QOJUQ/3j0/giuis7FCRs-r-i2O-Kr4kw/h0/dkCR_obphsd6qrnqh1w6l_AiVPK3RgvQfc1rhLupSUI)
Peter, CNN is asking the question on everyone’s minds: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSdN0DakrQitz1oFazjlHDTmOnYrlz6PtOSXSEeqRxkIt_FwISyizpeDgDh2EY-bdHwprz8n08AsCj_e1qnEt0fGsPc_G5aPltScC5VfNQxDxzVi2REvaooXumsOH6J4r2IASPnRHPFvFfDoPqzNmz9RbYSUtypHmPNeTrOyvIOfbCuiUFidesSxBuxl8lYvd6rh5OfgMmEoYS0hTVMquw5ADLVYXQ70PP6K3JXHsZzZnNgZuu5mcX5NLp4U0N6eihN7Q3FPSP5POMIBkqsjKeowR0e7LMj8I1pjk3emoDwZQ/3j0/giuis7FCRs-r-i2O-Kr4kw/h1/TQ5TpQfUcMgltZ2xrsOSQWLM-4YEdOcbfF3GQsejdQs) The truth is, **the answer comes down to us.** Yes, the Arizona Democratic Party just censured Senator Kyrsten Sinema for “her failure to do whatever it takes to ensure the health of our democracy” — which significantly weakens her in-state support. Yes, she’s been dropped by huge Democratic endorsers and institutional fundraisers like EMILY’s List and NARAL. But whether or not she actually loses to her future primary challenge? That will come down to the work we put in NOW to support organizers, reach Arizona voters, and hold Sinema accountable for her betrayal on the filibuster. clean_body: It all comes down to us. | | | Peter, CNN is asking the question on everyone’s minds: The truth is, the answer comes down to us. Yes, the Arizona Democratic Party just censured Senator Kyrsten Sinema for “her failure to do whatever it takes to ensure the health of our democracy” — which significantly weakens her in-state support. Yes, she’s been dropped by huge Democratic endorsers and institutional fundraisers like EMILY’s List and NARAL. But whether or not she actually loses to her future primary challenge? That will come down to the work we put in NOW to support organizers, reach Arizona voters, and hold Sinema accountable for her betrayal on the filibuster. Momentum to oust Kyrsten Sinema from the Senate has never been stronger, but we can’t let it fizzle out before she goes up for re-election. Right now, while her infuriating choice to block voting rights and betray Arizonans is still fresh, it’s a key time to build a powerful primary challenge to replace her in the Senate. Friends,
Here in New Mexico, we’re committed to protecting your vote and making sure all voices are heard. But other states across the US are passing laws that make it EVEN HARDER to vote. **Without national action, some voters are going to get left behind.**
This week I went on **MSNBC** to talk about why we need equal access to the ballot box across the country. Without a bare minimum standard, restrictive and discriminatory voting laws will continue to silence the voices of our fellow Americans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054781/327137068/292729577?refcode=EM_C_220125MSNBC_VR_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQ2ZWMyMi0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fyrqvB9OoFfbJNMP8e5UPcoE15Spa6QXDdc6dT6LVcw=&emci=10b4d002-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aed6ec22-2a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)
**Do you think there should be federally mandated protections for voting rights across the country?**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054782/327137069/651272630?refcode=EM_C_220125MSNBC_VR_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_B1_YES&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQ2ZWMyMi0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fyrqvB9OoFfbJNMP8e5UPcoE15Spa6QXDdc6dT6LVcw=&emci=10b4d002-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aed6ec22-2a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054783/327137070/651272630?refcode=EM_C_220125MSNBC_VR_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_B1_YES&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQ2ZWMyMi0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fyrqvB9OoFfbJNMP8e5UPcoE15Spa6QXDdc6dT6LVcw=&emci=10b4d002-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aed6ec22-2a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054784/327137071/651272630?refcode=EM_C_220125MSNBC_VR_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_B2_NO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQ2ZWMyMi0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fyrqvB9OoFfbJNMP8e5UPcoE15Spa6QXDdc6dT6LVcw=&emci=10b4d002-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aed6ec22-2a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054787/327137074/651272630?refcode=EM_C_220125MSNBC_VR_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_B2_NO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQ2ZWMyMi0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fyrqvB9OoFfbJNMP8e5UPcoE15Spa6QXDdc6dT6LVcw=&emci=10b4d002-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aed6ec22-2a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)**
On the anniversary of the insurrection, Governor Grisham and I introduced a bill to strengthen voting rights in NM. Our bill includes expanding online voter registration, providing further protections for Native voters, making Election Day a state holiday, and extending the early voting period. **We’re doing everything we can to make sure you can vote safely and easily, and we’re ensuring we protect ballot integrity while we do it. Unfortunately, not all states can say the same. We need national voting rights protection NOW.**
Thank you,

Maggie
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

I wanted to write to say thank you for everything you’re doing to help defeat Ron DeSantis. Florida can’t afford another four years of his divisive politics in the governor’s office, and I appreciate your support in this race.

Whether we have a governor who will fight climate change, protect our communities from COVID-19, and defend our most precious constitutional rights will depend on the outcome of this election. Gov. DeSantis wants to use the governor’s office to advance an extreme, far-right agenda that he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president, and we can’t let that happen.

But while he has out-of-state billionaires writing check after check to his campaign, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in whatever you can to help me fight back. **[If you can, please click here to make a donation to support my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054863/327137156/-1631200372?refcode=20220125_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2Q2ZWMyMi0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdwrZAKcngl4gCoTTL6BD2O6olgDIGeiZrjb7dXbq4I=)**

Thank you again for your support. By working together, I know we can win this race and finally build a Florida that works for ALL Floridians.

subject: Republicans in 7 states signed false documents to certify the 2020 election for Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [SIGN THE PETITION: Prosecute Republicans who signed and submitted false elector certificates in the 2020 election >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2598e4d4-3551-4ebe-94cb-38737271a6f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0b00663-6f92-480b-9ecd-e455fd5c3615/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | In December 2020, Trump campaign officials directed illegitimate Republican electors to submit false documents certifying the election for Trump in seven states that Trump lost. Led by Rudy Giuliani, this scheme was part of the Trump campaign’s plot to overturn President Biden’s victory in a free and fair election. After President Biden had already won the election, but before each state’s electoral votes were certified, Rudy Giuliani and his team tried to replace real electors with fake ones. This coordinated plot led to the violent attack on January 6th. This was a direct attempt to overthrow the will of the American people, and an attempted coup. Everyone who participated in this scheme must be held accountable – we cannot allow this to happen again. [Sign your name: Demand the Republicans who submitted and signed false elector certificates in the 2020 election be prosecuted >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e4cc3d5-9121-467f-ad61-399fb9e23b1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We’re up against candidates who outraised us by a lot last quarter.
#

Friends,
We’re emailing to ask you to contribute $3 to Malcolm Kenyatta’s campaign for Senate today.
We know we ask often. So could you please give us a moment to say why your contribution — especially today — is so important to Malcolm?
We’re up against candidates who outraised us by a lot last quarter. That puts us at a big disadvantage going into the next phase of our race.
Now, Malcolm has been the underdog and won before. In fact, he beat a 14-term incumbent State Representative in his first election in 2018.
But the only way he was able to do that was through lots of grassroots support from folks like you who chipped in a few bucks at a time.
We’re running this campaign the same way. Malcolm isn’t accepting any corporate PAC money, so he is relying on lots of people contributing what they can in order to win this primary, flip this Senate seat, and give Democrats a real majority in the Senate.
That is why we’re asking:
[Can Malcolm count on you to make your first online donation before midnight? Small-dollar donations are how we’re funding this campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41054956/327137748/-358086307?refcode2=1e73e172-2a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220125-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTczZTE3Mi0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-4XfsACsK1l1wPBOZjUX3eqgIR7PgTysbmP7sjCGK8=)

clean_body: We’re up against candidates who outraised us by a lot last quarter. Friends, We’re emailing to ask you to contribute $3 to Malcolm Kenyatta’s campaign for Senate today. We know we ask often. So could you please give us a moment to say why your contribution — especially today — is so important to Malcolm? We’re up against candidates who outraised us by a lot last quarter. That puts us at a big disadvantage going into the next phase of our race. Now, Malcolm has been the underdog and won before. In fact, he beat a 14-term incumbent State Representative in his first election in 2018. But the only way he was able to do that was through lots of grassroots support from folks like you who chipped in a few bucks at a time. We’re running this campaign the same way. Malcolm isn’t accepting any corporate PAC money, so he is relying on lots of people contributing what they can in order to win this primary, flip this Senate seat, and give Democrats a real majority in the Senate. name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: As long as the gender wage gap exists, we'll be fighting for equal pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| This week, we remember the anniversary of President Barack Obama signing the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act into law, a massive step forward in the fight for equal pay. But we still have a ways to go before we close the wage gap once and for all.

In Ohio, women on average earn 79 cents for every dollar their male co-workers earn for performing the same job -- and the statistics are even worse for women of color.

If you compare the annual wages of all men and women working full-time in Ohio, the annual wage gap adds up to $10,855. That's money that could go toward paying for childcare, health care coverage, student loans, and so much more -- but women are being left behind.

The reality is that in 2022 we shouldn't still be fighting for equal pay, but we are.

It's our mission at the Ohio Democratic Party to continue to fight for equal pay. As long as employers continue to underpay their female employees, we will continue to fight for equal pay. As long as women are undervalued for their work, we will continue to fight for equal pay. And as long as there is a huge racial pay gap among women, we will continue to fight for equal pay.

[**It's time for change. Add your name and join us in the fight for equal pay in the workplace.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41055021/327137817/-1919785798?ms=em22_220125_eqpay_adv_gq_act___lw_ettx&refcode=em22_220125_eqpay_adv_gq_act___lw_ettx&source=em22_220125_eqpay_adv_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220125_eqpay_adv_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Px64078TSWC2hW8JWgKB0driAyKdd8dwDkkAJbI4YE1zW6eRoeKQshGjFiSx27PQxAvRKaAqT9Sg8gYOTTipzBl78Uvi%2BpAZG%2FZyy3tNKawqgoM4J6BMLeRf%2Fpi5uzyxZ0Vc5TiNEVjNOpc3Kr3lXQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI3Y2M1OS0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0x3Fn_BkZc6yD1154J1H6CbqvSJyXn1Gif_DILqxpg=&emci=4d3da73f-0e7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8fb7cc59-2a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25291327)

clean_body: | This week, we remember the anniversary of President Barack Obama signing the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act into law, a massive step forward in the fight for equal pay. But we still have a ways to go before we close the wage gap once and for all. In Ohio, women on average earn 79 cents for every dollar their male co-workers earn for performing the same job -- and the statistics are even worse for women of color. If you compare the annual wages of all men and women working full-time in Ohio, the annual wage gap adds up to $10,855. That's money that could go toward paying for childcare, health care coverage, student loans, and so much more -- but women are being left behind. The reality is that in 2022 we shouldn't still be fighting for equal pay, but we are. It's our mission at the Ohio Democratic Party to continue to fight for equal pay. As long as employers continue to underpay their female employees, we will continue to fight for equal pay. As long as women are undervalued for their work, we will continue to fight for equal pay. And as long as there is a huge racial pay gap among women, we will continue to fight for equal pay. Thank you, Liz Liz Walters Team ODP The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Ohio Democratic Party 340 E Fulton St Columbus, OH 43215 United States | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Demings, Val
subject: This is my story, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.

I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2224-fr-text

That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.

I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2224-fr-text

Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.

Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.

This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.

So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2224-fr-text

Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire.

Val Demings

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d07357bf-047b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/992f5ad2-2a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTJmNWFkMi0yYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sb66ewwSDmqWPW6D_0J3Y-_VAsx7L67KdEkfHPEL0Xo=&id=123159867

Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

Val Demings for U.S. Senate
P. O. Box 536926
Orlando, FL 32853
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Travis "Bull" Johnson for Congress Committee_
body:
|

| | |

**Folks, the time is now.** We need to take our government back from the political elites and put it back into the hands of the people. Between the frigid weather and a downed goat, that needed around-the-clock care to give her a fighting chance, I've been struggling to keep up.
If more politicians had to go through what a livestock farmer does in a Minnesota winter, they may not sit so high on their horse. This year has been especially trying due to the high price of hay and corn as a result of the drought. Propane prices are double what they were last year. I am humbly asking (again) for your help to get to DC. The swamp is in sore need of some sanity and dry ground. If you are able to contribute to the campaign, thank you! If not, as I understand that the economic pressure is hitting us all, please share this ask in your circles. Every little bit helps... even $5 - $10 dollars a month adds up.
Bull

Fellow Conservative,

Nancy Pelosi just sent out an email blast to her ENTIRE rolodex of Democrat donors, practically begging them to pitch in to save my opponent, Susie Lee, from defeat. _Take a look..._

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=39cf6b3ff4ed44e6bfe52dc718b81f62&_e=eCSWposmX2InVgzg2uHCccjqG6rOgD6m5Kz4FtUeaXAlyScECSL6KwyobO2g40kjKT3p0zOyGOVnG9dytky64d5e5BJOiqdz3n2L03v-XvJCjGaj8PR9gVbGYTPA6_YFczL59TRgV7KhW90jCQW5jh006FSCEFiA6Shu6Ml6NxuABF81k5BFiI5mVZM_65Om8e3rXfhb1WQCprAvcAY6bgvagM-CeHuqtQH73mXqHCt7J8idSD5PSFnij-pYdqslIoTfzGcQq46CUM2xDa1T5hmG3RmFTgk71KXm9Iv8ulnhmBtQLhzxGemRtPdMVGU9FM0axOALyoFRVGUeYRgmJcBEV6i2sxXX2qCS76mI9rlxQmwHPR5x0Oa9Quf1FwKy6Jcqp-htWHDfHZ5E7uYD_yJq7vf1yx6DKXo9bLOwc9y6gHmbckn7YjC3xXrVm-pMHinEtCBLL3K82sblLzLCjwS8JYaBXg1Ja24KJxRPXJ4%3D)

clean_body: | | Peter, I know that it may seem like we are asking a lot from y’all. But I’m going to be honest with you, we have a real chance to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene and to do that we need your help whenever we can get it. Marjorie Taylor Greene has turned into something no one could have imagined. She has been spreading conspiracies, spreading hate, and turning our country against each other. Marge has got to go, and all of the support in and out of the district has shown us that we can accomplish the impossible. I won’t take too much more of your time, but if you can = Your = directly funds all of the efforts we are putting into the district. We aren’t just name dropping Marge and doing nothing with that money. We are actually making everlasting change so that someone like Marjorie Taylor Greene can’t win here ever again. GA-14 will turn Blue, and it will be because of supporters like you. Thank you, Holly McCormack. | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv88orj5tnu8sd9gdqi2d1p3upisqb41v071ujro_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chgm9o74clh2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme five years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrl454339h1ocqn4vjajb6c93lm2lev14i909v18_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chgm9o74clh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjfgitfs3i735vf7qsjocikrl17mgcaas2trj858_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chgm9o74clh2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhilb7kddi0nr255apfh4pjv1ic0b3a52qbqavs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chgm9o74clh2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf5pr8ab7vfgvahmbvjnr4u9l369gan983s1hbc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chgm9o74clh2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgkvgcs880pibmbb1a6tpd7n2dtg3is5bgnd18no_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chgm9o74clh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zekq4l4rei6c3qthajfm3pl1s50oro6j7d1pd6j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chgm9o74clh2bs) Thank you for your support, God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278

At a time when everyday people are struggling more than ever before, Representatives like Danny Davis should be feeling our community’s struggle every day, but instead they just feel the steady flow of corporate cash. We are tired, we are frustrated, and we've had enough. We need leaders who stand up for people not profits, and govern with a clear understanding of who they represent: the people. Thank you, Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Team Greitens
subject: Judge Orders Soros-Funded Prosecutor Turn Over Communications with Soros, Political Insiders in False Case Against Eric Greitens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Judge Orders Soros-Funded Prosecutor Turn Over Communications with Soros, Political Insiders in False Case Against Eric Greitens
---
| ST. LOUIS, MO-- A Missouri judge ordered St. Louis Circuit Attorney Kim Gardner to turn over records relating to Gardner's false case against former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens, including Gardner's private communications with George Soros and his associates and Missouri political insiders.
Gardner, a Soros-funded prosecutor, has fought tooth-and-nail to keep secret records requested by former Fox News contributor and [Just the News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017WpMUHel4jyi6tokeyKmT9dRw1f8xwWob8pmgrUVHLEyoilnEo1oYK3eThei0dfWL8LrrPoAJa_9tTQ9aTD32co5w4XpdR95Tdk9bfmtXJ4n8XQDZuS8M-ehPyhtlnimrg0yOYPtrITJTBum17odTw==&c=mGdiwgjXPqKd-paHMSkvG0tfE-WAkPc0Ya53wGwQyRYTmJR299EEqg==&ch=ofpoWEPdBUL7yLfsROGFt-NpITw8ASHkBTc0PLNypvJ7QFtzfVLiCA==) Editor-in-Chief John Solomon.
All charges against Greitens were dismissed as prosecutors were unable to provide any evidence of wrongdoing by Governor Greitens. As [reported by CNN,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017WpMUHel4jyi6tokeyKmT9dRw1f8xwWob8pmgrUVHLEyoilnEo1oYK3eThei0dfWv9KtItODxQuzfnWTBMI9cSju4BIYGRQiJlyTAw-bfzWaEV6PNvL-rvbAkIxe78_7d6ckKGppIxhBq0gotntShoAXq3Mcs_dAeNro28-LStQo20gZZ5u7YoFaLSm3HMRjI9KINIOOzltGO8o8ChfbkN2cJUOFqLrqpyFsh-dLByp6pNYC9sJjdvQK5cOqJoHLfYteg_35KKw=&c=mGdiwgjXPqKd-paHMSkvG0tfE-WAkPc0Ya53wGwQyRYTmJR299EEqg==&ch=ofpoWEPdBUL7yLfsROGFt-NpITw8ASHkBTc0PLNypvJ7QFtzfVLiCA==) the Missouri Ethics Commission conducted a a 20-month investigation and ultimately found "no evidence of any wrongdoing on the part of Eric Greitens."
As [reported by KSDK](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017WpMUHel4jyi6tokeyKmT9dRw1f8xwWob8pmgrUVHLEyoilnEo1oYK3eThei0dfWHbgRg4BB5fqp17Fudt6HBB2TzFeN4iaJJ9us6QPNG0CnBJpY35MQUjIG3LquTei879wx9hDIXSY4BlfGeOpaJZ6E_9VBBLfbnR9CTseufwaI6Gga2d1pXGR92b3F-MEF300QRaTfFW7tD2gigsuiXwOJHa-HgnQlTBdFwXQkhtIwlYG-wGrsEiDb-NH0hRV4hCgbs323OGvRGJL5DfMG9YeTWoCz4TieHwGHjbaOFBgVFHkWbMPkUK-C2T5ydnQM&c=mGdiwgjXPqKd-paHMSkvG0tfE-WAkPc0Ya53wGwQyRYTmJR299EEqg==&ch=ofpoWEPdBUL7yLfsROGFt-NpITw8ASHkBTc0PLNypvJ7QFtzfVLiCA==): St. Louis Circuit Judge Christopher McGraugh determined Gardner "purposefully violated the Sunshine law," ordered Gardner to search for and produce open public records responsive to Solomon's request within 30 days, fined Gardner's office $5,000 for violating the open records law and criticized Gardner's office for "reckless, dilatory and intentional refusal to timely file a responsive pleading," to Solomon's lawsuit - even after being given 30 days to do so, according to court records.
The records ordered to be turned over are to include Gardner and her staff's communications with liberal billionaire George Soros and his associates; Scott Faughn, a convicted felon and political blogger who delivered $120,000 in cash payments to a witness in the case; Al Watkins; Katrina Sneed; Phil Sneed; Democratic State Rep. Stacy Newman; Republican State Rep. Jay Barnes; and several insiders of Missouri's corrupt low-income housing tax credit (LIHTC) program.
Greitens ended the LIHTC program after finding rampant fraud and abuse of Missouri tax dollars. Since being driven from office, the LIHTC program in Missouri has been fully restarted by Greitens' successor-- who has taken excessive contributions from the LIHTC industry.
This comes as Gardner faces a disciplinary hearing on February 28 following an investigation that found Gardner to have committed 68 acts of misconduct that resulted in 72 misrepresentations to the judge, jury, defense attorneys, and even Gardner's own assistant prosecutors.
Gardner's lead investigator has been indicted on 7 felonies for evidence tampering and perjury in the false case against Greitens.
In unprecedented fashion, the Missouri Ethics Commission stipulated that Greitens retains the right to pursue criminal and/or civil action against those that made false allegations against him.
[READ: Soros-backed Prosecutor Ordered to Turn Over Concealed Records to Just The News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017WpMUHel4jyi6tokeyKmT9dRw1f8xwWob8pmgrUVHLEyoilnEo1oYK3eThei0dfWy-TIp-odLk4xJWpT8Imirqw5Yx8L1FQzWeFue6GbrGNYozV-Sas7vhV085yQvlRJLT_qYdPLGJrULTf8EhTMLe2zwajo3CzwdhWofdXpzLo26BZBhnvbCpyujTT7M_O8EyrkLztrw66_F_CwPk358BG_9zz0_7WgezxBJvS6y6OGxmUCROK_BsayEVJNjmyhufmRqxfFt3UHphEc3TdHVA==&c=mGdiwgjXPqKd-paHMSkvG0tfE-WAkPc0Ya53wGwQyRYTmJR299EEqg==&ch=ofpoWEPdBUL7yLfsROGFt-NpITw8ASHkBTc0PLNypvJ7QFtzfVLiCA==)

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, as Steve’s Finance Director, I spend a lot of time asking for money. And I get it — you may wonder what difference your $5, $15, or $25 donation makes. Well, let me tell you why every dollar counts in a race like this. Steve became the first Democratic governor in two decades by building a people-powered movement that invested in every corner of the state. People chipped in whatever and whenever they could to support his campaign and grow this movement into the strong, diverse coalition of Democrats it is today. ****** | | | | | | | | | Steve is preparing to take on 9 MAGA radicals with the GOP war chest at their disposal – and they’ve already spent over $2 million to unseat Steve. If we’re going to Keep Nevada Blue, we have to start laying the foundation for a strong campaign that can take on anything Republicans throw our way. $5 may not seem like a lot, but it could be the difference between winning in and losing in November. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for fueling this campaign, Eva Black Finance Director Steve Sisolak for Governor | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. name: John King
subject: Peter, we can’t let it happen here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Friend,
I’ll be honest with you: the latest news out of Virginia has me worried. Its full of headlines like:

"Virginia schools are melting down" — Slate
"Glenn Youngkin just showed us why he’s already going full Trumpist on schools" — Washington Post

As soon as Glenn Youngkin was sworn in as Governor of Virginia, he began to make his hyper conservative right-wing agenda a reality. Within days, he was issuing executive orders dictating what teachers can teach about history and allowing students to opt out of school mask mandates that keep teachers and students safe. Through these actions, he is already beginning to undermine the advances Virginia made over the last few years on education – reminding us that elections have consequences, and years of progress can be erased at the drop of a hat.

The truth is, the more Glenn Youngkin doubles down on attacking our progress, the harder we need to fight to make sure the same doesn’t happen here in Maryland. Can you help us make sure that doesn’t happen by supporting our campaign today?

PITCH IN: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em?source=email-ngp-20220125-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220125-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220125&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=10&refcode2=03813538-337e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442

This isn’t the first time Youngkin has shown his true colors – he won his election using dog whistle politics and baiting voters with ridiculous anti-Critical Race Theory rhetoric. His rise and successful implementation of dangerous policies should serve as a stark preview of what awaits us if we nominate a candidate who is not equipped to stand up to Republican attacks on public education.

As a lifelong educator, former teacher and principal, and former U.S. Secretary of Education, I am equipped to lead on education, and I’ll work tirelessly to ensure Maryland government is a force for good in people’s lives.

I will never back down when it comes to defending the health and wellbeing of students in this state. I am ready to build on progressive accomplishments here in Maryland and work to provide even more opportunities in education, especially for Black and brown students who have so often been left behind. If you’re with me, I am humbly asking you to pitch in just $10 today to ensure our campaign has the resources to share our message with voters across the state.

The Virginia election should be a wake up call — we can’t let the same thing happen here and we have to spread the word. So please, chip in today to help us build a brighter, more equitable future for Maryland → https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em?source=email-ngp-20220125-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220125-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220125&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=10&refcode2=03813538-337e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442
