subject: [MEMO] Update on Colorado’s Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41056974/327146237/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRjOTg4NC0zMzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQneuvAkl6qS_Xfyx4oVe9LR-DyHgLTG2vx68rB0TFI=)
Hi folks, I’m Justin, Michael’s campaign manager. Now, that the midterm election is here, I wanted to give you an update on our path to re-elect Michael. Grassroots supporters like you are key to this team, so please read through, [**then pitch in $10 before our first fundraising deadline of the election year to re-elect Michael to the Senate and keep Colorado blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41056975/327146238/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220125_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRjOTg4NC0zMzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQneuvAkl6qS_Xfyx4oVe9LR-DyHgLTG2vx68rB0TFI=) **WHAT MICHAEL ACHIEVED LAST YEAR FOR COLORADO** Facing Mitch McConnell-led obstruction and a slim 50-50 Democratic majority, Michael secured big wins for Colorado last year. He led the charge to cut taxes for working parents through monthly Child Tax Credit payments. These monthly payments **kept millions of children out of poverty** nationwide, and Michael is fighting to renew them this year. Michael also clinched the single largest federal high-speed internet investment in our nation’s history. Quick, reliable internet will help bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities as well as help Americans nationwide compete in the global economy. While Michael is fighting to create more good-paying jobs, combat climate change, and more, GOP opponents are on the attack. **THE STATE OF THIS RACE** Michael is running on his record of delivering for working families, but he is facing attacks from all sides. Mitch McConnell and his committee tasked with flipping the Senate have almost double the cash on hand of the Democratic committee that’s defending seats like Michael’s. The National GOP has their pick of his opponents that include:
* An insurrectionist who bragged about crossing the police line on January 6th, has joked about lynching, wants to get rid of vote-by-mail in Colorado, and just last month spoke at a rally rooted in Trump’s Big Lie.
* A wealthy Trump appointee who contributed half-a-million dollars to his own campaign last quarter after railing against the expanded Child Tax Credit that helped millions of children and the infrastructure bill which will repair Colorado’s roads and bridges, while creating scores of jobs.
* The third is so wealthy that he also contributed half-a-million dollars of his own fortune to his campaign last quarter and hired a top Trump consultant to advise his campaign.

There are **_eight_** GOP primary candidates attacking Michael to gain an edge in their race. Your support will help him fend off ongoing attacks. **HOW WE’LL WIN THIS YEAR** Michael doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because he’s seen the inaction that comes from their dark money influence. He’s running a grassroots-driven campaign because he’s fighting for the issues that matter to folks like you. The election year is here, folks, and we have less than a year to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from all sides. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in over $104 million last year and self-funded opponents flooding the airwaves, we have to pick up the pace. **Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — before Monday’s fundraising deadline.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41056976/327146239/-20397165?express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220125_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRjOTg4NC0zMzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQneuvAkl6qS_Xfyx4oVe9LR-DyHgLTG2vx68rB0TFI=)**

clean_body: | = Hi folks, I’m Justin, Michael’s campaign manager. Now, that the midterm election is here, I wanted to give you an update on our path to re-elect Michael. Grassroots supporters like you are key to this team, so please read through, = WHAT MICHAEL ACHIEVED LAST YEAR FOR COLORADO Facing Mitch McConnell-led obstruction and a slim 50-50 Democratic majority, Michael secured big wins for Colorado last year. He led the charge to cut taxes for working parents through monthly Child Tax Credit payments. These monthly payments kept millions of children out of poverty nationwide, and Michael is fighting to renew them this year. Michael also clinched the single largest federal high-speed internet investment in our nation’s history. Quick, reliable internet will help bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities as well as help Americans nationwide compete in the global economy. While Michael is fighting to create more good-paying jobs, combat climate change, and more, GOP opponents are on the attack. THE STATE OF THIS RACE Michael is running on his record of delivering for working families, but he is facing attacks from all sides. Mitch McConnell and his committee tasked with flipping the Senate have almost double the cash on hand of the Democratic committee that’s defending seats like Michael’s. The National GOP has their pick of his opponents that include: An insurrectionist who bragged about crossing the police line on January 6th, has joked about lynching, wants to get rid of vote-by-mail in Colorado, and just last month spoke at a rally rooted in Trump’s Big Lie. A wealthy Trump appointee who contributed half-a-million dollars to his own campaign last quarter after railing against the expanded Child Tax Credit that helped millions of children and the infrastructure bill which will repair Colorado’s roads and bridges, while creating scores of jobs. The third is so wealthy that he also contributed half-a-million dollars of his own fortune to his campaign last quarter and hired a top Trump consultant to advise his campaign. There are eight GOP primary candidates attacking Michael to gain an edge in their race. Your support will help him fend off ongoing attacks. HOW WE’LL WIN THIS YEAR Michael doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because he’s seen the inaction that comes from their dark money influence. He’s running a grassroots-driven campaign because he’s fighting for the issues that matter to folks like you. The election year is here, folks, and we have less than a year to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from all sides. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in over $104 million last year and self-funded opponents flooding the airwaves, we have to pick up the pace. Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — before Monday’s fundraising deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s start this year strong, Justin Justin Lamorte Campaign Manager Bennet for Colorado Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: BREAKING via Team Ryan
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene JUST endorsed…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ][IMG]

BREAKING: Far-right conspiracy theorist Marjorie Taylor Greene endorses JD Vance
in Ohio

Folks, our campaign is on high alert. Trump wannabe and January 6th
agitator Marjorie Taylor Greene’s endorsement is a signal to
Trump-loyalists around the country to go ALL-IN on JD Vance.

We’re only ahead of Vance by 1 point in the polls—so we’re sending out a
rallying cry to our top supporters.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6543?t=1007&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]We need the resources to compete with the flood of money (and attacks!)
her endorsement will bring to our race—so we’ve set a $10,000 Rapid
Response goal that we need to hit TODAY. Can we count on your support to
make sure Ohio flips blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6544?t=1015&amount=25&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6544?t=1016&amount=50&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6544?t=1017&amount=100&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6544?t=1018&amount=200&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6544?t=1019&amount=250&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6544?t=1020&amount=25&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]Other Amount

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6544?t=1021&amount=25&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]JD is 100% pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment and pro-Trump...Washington desperately
needs more America First fighters in the mold of President Trump...

As if a $10 million super PAC boosting Vance’s campaign wasn’t enough—now
he’s got the support of the most prominent member of the far-right. If
this doesn’t show that national Republicans have lost their grip on
reality—we don’t know what does.

Bottom line: This isn’t good for our campaign, folks. We’re
already fending off nasty attacks from GOP mega-donors and this
endorsement will only drum up more support for JD Vance from
Trump-loyalists and big money donors alike.

This is a make-or-break moment for our campaign. We’re counting on our
Democratic grassroots network to help us build the resources we need to
win. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6543?t=1008&akid=2144%2E3611125%2EvMkZpe ]Will you add a donation to fight back against the far-right, flip
Ohio blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

Let’s do this!

—Team Ryan

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: My parents picked crops to give me an American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
Haitian Immigrant. Former Trump official. Republican congressional hopeful asking you for a few minutes of time to tell you my story today |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=b0143f5795cc42d3ae90a785cdfefee9&_t=kb4Ti9vyURIW5QuylVPF8F8XNjb1ILxw63nir1tkuxoy5t4dCq7moxdhNFS_0ZScq1YYhvBXpKby6BVPYOw7Fo0U4i3H_5KxZ-C9x3De2Nz3igoQVmcu22-c20syVsuRQyjBXOP-98wydmSvV2htmlGuZmFxDzQPpKhFvAHdeaE%3D).

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0143f5795cc42d3ae90a785cdfefee9&_e=C_OWGrbiqPsmndlHfSzmzLbGBwzCdaciYjKHpC24QA7E8JS63lpwVK8VgmyjwRMt37M6-_LpXWL1V2cCh8V6bCyDiNg1exeJZ9o3Ho_ciheuBatNrI9uhvWmK32LYXSd__jeGZs7Tc0zYIYiah2BXkC9Ypr0ptHUYi0hSK8BjYX7hGxBFpXhwzDEOaOtVAmo6yl-v84Q45mgC6DjfhHa05stWLTmeVRo0e15BmTryJcBK4DbObWue6ORhD-SqTQQXAeLGsHr3WnVCqta-_7vesl_jjcLoTRUGlZ1qO6cbTXdMu3ciVv-uAJilxLYVU1DE4VIu8Vx3dHzYzRibOfHS1JfhuAhOMsO7yHkdKx2oVoYKV6eWUz8XGk5mwZw3lPu5EQJgGFGhHFMsngdOowALAfZPS60gVPBvDq1cH6h3Puz3JKIdGAHlPNzY2t9XhLAoqhnbrh1TFd_7ovLtmLhGHVcp-XjdAj4pCFeu3FDVDI%3D)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0143f5795cc42d3ae90a785cdfefee9&_e=C_OWGrbiqPsmndlHfSzmzLbGBwzCdaciYjKHpC24QA7E8JS63lpwVK8VgmyjwRMt37M6-_LpXWL1V2cCh8V6bCyDiNg1exeJZ9o3Ho_ciheuBatNrI9uhvWmK32LYXSd__jeGZs7Tc0zYIYiah2BXkC9Ypr0ptHUYi0hSK8BjYX7hGxBFpXhwzDEOaOtVAmo6yl-v84Q45mgC6DjfhHa05stWLTmeVRo0e15BmTryJcBK4DbObWue6ORhD-SqTQQXAeLGsHr3WnVCqta-_7veioUa_2LVssr3euUM_ZpYXZig1UbzWGUYpFTp3Hf93-D6Lz9wY0faTIVVWUy-t3QUht9g5hR5d81qOnZEqCx10x-ualcloWZM_6VkZopyXmUNOE8sTB40GzB0jWbWdNU1jdB8P1_K2Wg3lc2CtDAAUub0GWT9Lf_EwWqnYs8gSQlj-BQL2XJW1eBlBkcifE5xaNjxQbh69mnmvX9lnJtdn8%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0143f5795cc42d3ae90a785cdfefee9&_e=C_OWGrbiqPsmndlHfSzmzLbGBwzCdaciYjKHpC24QA7E8JS63lpwVK8VgmyjwRMt37M6-_LpXWL1V2cCh8V6bCyDiNg1exeJZ9o3Ho_ciheuBatNrI9uhvWmK32LYXSd__jeGZs7Tc0zYIYiah2BXkC9Ypr0ptHUYi0hSK8BjYX7hGxBFpXhwzDEOaOtVAmo6yl-v84Q45mgC6DjfhHa05stWLTmeVRo0e15BmTryJcBK4DbObWue6ORhD-SqTQQXAeLGsHr3WnVCqta-_7vehaImdoNO6mPkngTaCTSLObREEHuQb8o2elgJ7BkMm8LTzAReMu3-H6VZmIlEVIq880lv3CygTlqzCf3en8aSk6aGN3dvOAtfLlPwe_R-kM3DiXlf94e28nc7jcbGBaI_jIZoPT33rwqgkMNnDjbv7ke2HAIXqoIQ36SEvFWAwr18W7hR76uC_YzHIOqr257Sa0WOBgo_wnAW9zO6UuoFEE%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0143f5795cc42d3ae90a785cdfefee9&_e=C_OWGrbiqPsmndlHfSzmzLbGBwzCdaciYjKHpC24QA7E8JS63lpwVK8VgmyjwRMt37M6-_LpXWL1V2cCh8V6bCyDiNg1exeJZ9o3Ho_ciheuBatNrI9uhvWmK32LYXSd__jeGZs7Tc0zYIYiah2BXkC9Ypr0ptHUYi0hSK8BjYX7hGxBFpXhwzDEOaOtVAmo6yl-v84Q45mgC6DjfhHa05stWLTmeVRo0e15BmTryJcBK4DbObWue6ORhD-SqTQQXAeLGsHr3WnVCqta-_7vetk7sYcEXAYCoyOvbAclqu7e3GFmbBqFwjZpDONttSoiQp7gL3gpiYoQWIZbAQ334_ZuLi9ewxfeuGX1jJK4JVKrdIZGAnuUqVbolZpvnzWNFmOIZmzBjY-QWu2L5gfJ5C5mKCGmXtJgKi1GigGi9K0pea8RfhK9YoisMV4O6Y6-4h_yRstTu1j_ayR1H5yWIKPWcB3yzpuAc4FuwrXJbKQ%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0143f5795cc42d3ae90a785cdfefee9&_e=C_OWGrbiqPsmndlHfSzmzLbGBwzCdaciYjKHpC24QA7E8JS63lpwVK8VgmyjwRMt37M6-_LpXWL1V2cCh8V6bCyDiNg1exeJZ9o3Ho_ciheuBatNrI9uhvWmK32LYXSd__jeGZs7Tc0zYIYiah2BXkC9Ypr0ptHUYi0hSK8BjYX7hGxBFpXhwzDEOaOtVAmo6yl-v84Q45mgC6DjfhHa05stWLTmeVRo0e15BmTryJcBK4DbObWue6ORhD-SqTQQXAeLGsHr3WnVCqta-_7vetXjGpefChoKpsp2pdrIIkc_sOROFNbtB1LA0GkEz5foDZYc8u_dKlNwBJw2js4FFCYjQAgbw66WwO7wbHBteP5RZa1OW_lSGeST34Tat652BbFpMPu7P4DmIbcl01nNI9PcaSVMm2wUnYfwQPx4y9lfWy96ONRBoYnt6pxzX6OS8ugoxoxC0yWtIYfa4J4AKFKTEGXfyHnDGRexZd-Fap8%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0143f5795cc42d3ae90a785cdfefee9&_e=C_OWGrbiqPsmndlHfSzmzLbGBwzCdaciYjKHpC24QA7E8JS63lpwVK8VgmyjwRMt37M6-_LpXWL1V2cCh8V6bCyDiNg1exeJZ9o3Ho_ciheuBatNrI9uhvWmK32LYXSd__jeGZs7Tc0zYIYiah2BXkC9Ypr0ptHUYi0hSK8BjYX7hGxBFpXhwzDEOaOtVAmo6yl-v84Q45mgC6DjfhHa05stWLTmeVRo0e15BmTryJcBK4DbObWue6ORhD-SqTQQXAeLGsHr3WnVCqta-_7vejpePIiU6e8WlyOoy9qAsLHyqV_P0MVDZBC5PlxapQ97oAw8SpFgvx-nT3foxM31Ee5XTResTGuznekMiuhPXSediOU1JUuv0x6wSPB464wUzPwFsphC4Jhgof4f5fkYOTUuzrZJY5nMAItBAkgp-_ejpk5UC-7Xa_F3c24kYc1ot5Obto84Zn8oHq8Oj-BohuR9pmYoKFYwXPfOr1qXV8Q%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0143f5795cc42d3ae90a785cdfefee9&_e=C_OWGrbiqPsmndlHfSzmzLbGBwzCdaciYjKHpC24QA7E8JS63lpwVK8VgmyjwRMt37M6-_LpXWL1V2cCh8V6bCyDiNg1exeJZ9o3Ho_ciheuBatNrI9uhvWmK32LYXSd__jeGZs7Tc0zYIYiah2BXkC9Ypr0ptHUYi0hSK8BjYX7hGxBFpXhwzDEOaOtVAmo6yl-v84Q45mgC6DjfhHa05stWLTmeVRo0e15BmTryJcBK4DbObWue6ORhD-SqTQQXAeLGsHr3WnVCqta-_7veg1IycCJsNW8ecKXnf08V6fOutw7zz0kUDOiscEuHh1hb4oegBJjiL4MSdRLWDO9NqqnM9gOLZ5vFfNa9QiiSjpHPwcRmblx_Tb7L1XAIMkWCCByhukRgbJ0bYBQh6c1ow27rtKh-mBbQSqEWhNH75xMnVsXmOeM_aBGr4Pq0q9COK5dKKz8oVegz5iFYFLrvQ0jIdEqKYdDvsGvvooqjsc%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

clean_body: Haitian Immigrant. Former Trump official. Republican congressional hopeful asking you for a few minutes of time to tell you my story today | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Peter, Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans. I’m speaking with authority on the matter: I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. Hello, You’re one of our campaign’s top supporters, so we wanted to give you an update on the state of the race. Below is our most recent campaign memo:
* Senator Hassan has had **more** money spent against her than any other Senate incumbent, but she raised **less**.
* New Hampshire was the closest race in the country in 2016; Maggie Hassan won by 1,017 votes. **It could be closer in an unfavorable environment for Democrats.**
* Losing the Senate race in New Hampshire means losing Democrats’ fragile Senate majority.

We’ve run the numbers. We have a path to victory, but it’s expensive and it requires special investments in targeted regions. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: A Special Message from Nancy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

Thank you for the opportunity to share some thoughts with you, our VIPS - our volunteers in politics, in our ongoing engagement For the People. Thank you for being a constant source of new fresh ideas and political activism to help Democrats deliver and defend Democracy.

Thank you for giving me the privilege to represent our City and our San Francisco values in the Congress: human rights, reproductive justice, LGBTQ equality, respect for immigrants, and care for each other. When people ask me "What are the three most important issues facing the Congress?" I always say the same thing: our children; our children; our children. Their health, their education, the housing and economic security of their families, a clean safe environment in which they can thrive, and a world in peace where all are welcome and in which they can reach their fulfillment. That is my "why" I am in Congress - for the children. That is my story. That is my song. As you hear me say, when you are in the arena you have to be able to take a punch, and throw a punch, for the children.

My first words on the floor of the House were to fight against HIV/AIDS: to fight the disease and discrimination. Working together we passed the Affordable Care Act, strengthened Social Security, Medi-care and Medi-caid, lowered prescription drug prices, and now we are fighting COVID with equity.

In San Francisco, climate is an ethic not an issue. Education, the economy and the environment are all a part of how we address the climate crisis: creating good paying green union jobs, affordable housing, clean energy infrastructure, transportation justice, and educating the next generation to succeed in safe schools with 21st century skills.

Our safe communities require gun violence prevention, addressing the root causes of crime, and supporting law enforcement with justice in policing.

Our vision for a world at peace requires a strong Democracy at home and an example to the world. We are grateful to our men and women in uniform, veterans, and military families - and honor their sacrifice with our insistence on securing voting rights, an end to big dark money in politics, and amplifying the voice of the grassroots.

While we have made progress, much more needs to be done to improve people's lives. Our Democracy is at risk because of assaults on the truth, the assault on the U.S. Capitol, and the state-by-state assault on voting rights. This election is crucial: nothing less is at stake than our Democracy.

We don’t agonize, we organize.

That is why I am running for re-election to Congress and respectfully seek your support. I would be greatly honored by it, and grateful for it.

Thank you,

NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25]
SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]

Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6fd671dc-357e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/7e0377fc-387e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTAzNzdmYy0zODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6_KGIVeZQLrGr0ZiVGQszCVApOqCSqVnLye-VtfJ84=&id=117907000 .

Nancy Pelosi for Congress
700 13TH STREET NW
Suite 800
Washington, DC 20005
United States
Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Russia, Ukraine, Biden, Trump & WW III
body:
As an America, I cannot help but be EXTREMELY frustrated. Former Vice President Joe Biden has made it clear that his intentions are to send US milita
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2166.1.717a911f888dc8631536e044ffabe3da) |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2167.1.6ed0db75685741750ecbbdea3271b7c3)
---
As an America, I cannot help but be **EXTREMELY** frustrated.
**Former Vice President Joe Biden** has made it clear that his intentions are to send **US military troops** to protect the _borders_ of **Ukraine** against **Russia** for what I believe to be for _personal reasons_ (**the Biden Crime Family** is heavily invested in Ukraine).
Yet, **Biden** refuses to protect _the borders of America_.
There is currently an **invasion** taking place at our **Southern border** and DC has failed to act.
This is the _epitome_ of putting America _last_.
It is time that we elect men and women who will place America **FIRST**.
American borders come first!
I pledge to always put **America First**.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2168.1.c721a404c31314d29bb93349c2833449), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2169.1.e92af349ecf4bb0da7545aece51e5291), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2170.1.f864cade588f9f363c660e488633fdb1), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2171.1.693740751a536542344a460cfcf08e94), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2172.1.c1f67a5e829c0ab6a350cf25d1ee282b)).

America's General, **Michael Flynn** , and the legendary, **Roger Stone** , are joining me in **Oklahoma** for _2 Nights in 2 Cities_ (**OKC and Tulsa**)
General Flynn nudged me into running for the US Senate here in Oklahoma and Mr. Stone now leads the **#LahmeyerForSenate** campaign to oust _RINO_ Senator James Lankford.
I would like to invite you to hear what I call, "_Inside Baseball_ " from two men that are in the know. We are releasing the event details today and these two events will be the hottest tickets in Oklahoma.
Reserve your spot ASAP:
**[Oklahoma City](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2175.1.8ff760aab451416822cc526da64fe949)** : Friday, March 4th at 7pm
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2176.1.1f8ece5fb948991098b838779d949dad)
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/641935](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2177.1.21f472dad2759dc104ca13e86bd2c222)
For more questions visit [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/flynn](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2178.1.2f0a5fa293a185c217bc4481e91812ff)
**[Tulsa](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2179.1.c135595192be6a46eb6dcf4360e8d029)** : Saturday, March 5th at 6pm
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2180.1.3685b818f209eedd77349b0b62b94823)
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/641941](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2181.1.2bbade05203e41165b400311b2315ff7)
For more questions visit [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/flynn](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3182124.2182.1.2e77264b43f824219a6965dafcda3cde)
Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com

body:
Our democracy is worth fighting for. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41058455/327155205/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.f1f64602-3c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.f1f64602-3c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWY2NDYwMi0zYzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYm9crk0VtRg1Z0W-JpdQy_Phv77jf2EZ1MFIOkMRyg=) **[Ohio Republicans’ electoral strategy is simple: suppress the vote of anyone who might support the other side. Sign my petition now to condemn GOP voter suppression in our state>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41058456/327155206/1893610513?refcode=ea.f1f64602-3c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.f1f64602-3c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWY2NDYwMi0zYzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYm9crk0VtRg1Z0W-JpdQy_Phv77jf2EZ1MFIOkMRyg=&emci=12e8aa0b-2e7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f1f64602-3c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22604289)**
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41058457/327155207/1893610513?refcode=ea.f1f64602-3c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.f1f64602-3c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWY2NDYwMi0zYzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYm9crk0VtRg1Z0W-JpdQy_Phv77jf2EZ1MFIOkMRyg=&emci=12e8aa0b-2e7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f1f64602-3c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22604289)**
* * *
**A government of, by, and for the people.** That is the promise upon which our nation was built. It is the promise we hand down to our children by raising them with a love of community and of country. It is the promise that we embrace each time we cast a ballot. It is the promise that Republicans have violated again and again by proposing and enacting legislation specifically designed to make it _harder_ for some of us to vote — and prevent some votes from being counted at all. **Here in Ohio, GOP legislators want to require in-person voter registration, end no-excuse absentee voting, restrict the forms of acceptable photo ID, shorten the early voting period, and prohibit ballots returned through a drop box from being counted.** One person, one vote. That’s the only way this country will work. Our government _must_ be one led by the will of the people — _all_ the people. Republicans have failed to uphold that founding principle of our democracy. clean_body: Our democracy is worth fighting for. | = A government of, by, and for the people. That is the promise upon which our nation was built. It is the promise we hand down to our children by raising them with a love of community and of country. It is the promise that we embrace each time we cast a ballot. It is the promise that Republicans have violated again and again by proposing and enacting legislation specifically designed to make it harder for some of us to vote — and prevent some votes from being counted at all. Here in Ohio, GOP legislators want to require in-person voter registration, end no-excuse absentee voting, restrict the forms of acceptable photo ID, shorten the early voting period, and prohibit ballots returned through a drop box from being counted. One person, one vote. That’s the only way this country will work. Our government must be one led by the will of the people — all the people. Republicans have failed to uphold that founding principle of our democracy. It is un-American — and it has to stop. Thank you for standing up for our democracy, John = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. Fellow Conservative,

My progressive opponent, Greg Stanton, is one of Pelosi’s, AOC’s, and Biden’s top allies in Congress.

He was elected to represent progressive and coastal special interests, not the interests of Arizona, or the conservative values that our state holds near and dear.

[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6954ffb9f92b46e6979d9cf01c3abe72&_e=mSi0WqstKuGdPi4HHSHQ73c_UHBV3XSR97qPSpfeUEOBO2zwRLXIP6ibamTLxQyPe3SAcW0yStrARecW3R9d7CNYbju3F0i8F094y68gWNNZkwtrKSCPq37150lKUR0X5TZJl9IfGmzgy5s3HNC4tAFteTfa9PHtBeZHyvvnT-KCGSGS8rKa_gG5uusdkrirY1J6iS5VuCnX63B-rJhyKkwj270sC3H6vpOBI8ZgOs78EHOAAIQENdKj9XACLTde8_FDo0w51AI7aA3EolVVq71HoITh2-enAhmRJbmB0CJUsTlDzKfodtHMrbdPqRBapHdufK9Z4_lMKwP2nAhr9Lnzx2qG-Jm0LZ5YCA0dYx0O8e6KigkyUjZiPuiHJHEhkGioAGfV8xDdEeK-OwN2JpUnlNsC1wZ-ig9_-M8ctprHCleGfX11-fhWJeOFq2bPXJGUY1JYp8aEqZPyw0D2ex8NihO272_fusFDT2FcGck%3D)

Friend, For the past year and a half my hospital has been filled with COVID patients. I have seen children lose their parents, and parents lose their children. To date, 1 in 500 Americans have died from the COVID pandemic. _While my colleagues pulled double shifts to care for all the patients with failing lungs, my opponent was encouraging people to go maskless._ **Assemblyman Kevin Kiley has bragged about “leading” the opposition to Governor Newsom’s COVID protocols and campaigned on overturning California’s mask mandate.** After coming in sixth in the gubernatorial recall election, Kiley’s now trying for another promotion: Congress. As a doctor, I cannot allow that. name: Holly McCormack
subject: Urgent Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,
Team Holly.

name: Dr. Gillian Battino
subject: Why I marched this past weekend…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Battino for U
body:
Republicans are afraid of letting the people vote | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41058804/327161637/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzkzZWVhNi0zZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZuYH7B4evmA-r_DGTfIv1yjtfBc6T0ddu8RM8zV9PQc=&emci=1618c41b-1c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8c93eea6-3e7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25515813) | Team: This weekend, I was proud to stand alongside dozens of Wisconsinites in the March for Fair maps. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41058805/327161638/-945847804?refcode=E13624-20220125-FairMapsMarch-graphic-VotingRightsElections-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzkzZWVhNi0zZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZuYH7B4evmA-r_DGTfIv1yjtfBc6T0ddu8RM8zV9PQc=) Over the past year, 19 states have passed 33 laws to make it harder for Americans to vote, and blatant partisan gerrymandering has taken control of this year’s redistricting process. Then, Republicans in the House and Senate stonewalled The For The People Act and The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act – both of which would have made it harder for states to pass laws aimed at disenfranchising voters of color. | | Hi there,

This is Francis Conole, Navy veteran and candidate for Congress in one of our nation’s most competitive districts.

[**As Republicans continue to disenfranchise Americans across the country, I wanted to share with you my thoughts on the right to vote and ask you to join me in an urgent mission to protect it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41058929/327162933/1760804868?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjM0MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTllMzgxNS0zZjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NU5XlXjiRFhLr1zayFp_L8DtWU7FvwRAk0Q5wSfmFLg=&emci=71dca7f7-317d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=799e3815-3f7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=10659470) | | | [Defend the Right to Vote »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41058930/327162934/413060660?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjM0MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTllMzgxNS0zZjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NU5XlXjiRFhLr1zayFp_L8DtWU7FvwRAk0Q5wSfmFLg=&emci=71dca7f7-317d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=799e3815-3f7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=10659470)

In 2010, I was redeployed to Iraq. At that moment, the Iraqi people had endured years of political violence, lack of economic opportunity, and had little trust in public institutions. However, there was a deep commitment to protect their young and fragile democracy from authoritarianism.

Now in 2021, America faces it’s own challenge to democracy.

Donald Trump’s dangerous lies about the 2020 election led to an insurrection and birthed a new, toxic brand of politics.

GOP state legislators have responded with laws making it more difficult to vote — _an affront on our democratic process and the voice of the American people._

**We cannot sit idly by as these attacks on our country persist. We must take action to defend our democracy and ensure it remains strong and sound for future generations.**

[**So I ask you to join me in defending the right to vote. If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: CAUCUS ALERT!!! - Join the Fight!
body:
| Peter -- We have a decision to make. Tim Walz is weak, and the right candidate can finally break the radical left’s stranglehold on Minnesota. YOU MUST be a part of that decision making process. If you're not, career politicians, special interests, and political insiders will dominate the conversation. They want to send another failed career politician to lose against the DFL yet again. **The first step is going to caucus.** Local precinct caucuses will occur all around the state In One Week on February 1st. Attending and signing up to be a delegate is the ONLY WAY you will be able to have a say in who will face off against Walz in November. Delegates will vote to endorse a candidate at the GOP State Convention in May, effectively replacing the primary election. We need two things from this candidate.
1. Minnesotans NEED an outsider candidate that can reinvigorate the party with fresh blood, and best appeal to the swing vote that will determine the results in November
2. Minnesotans also need a candidate who will govern with principles, NOT according to the political winds at a given moment.

I am the only constitutional conservative candidate with the ability to bring back the suburbs, and clean up Tim Walz’ mess by governing with Conservative Principles - NOT through political games. Senators Jensen, Benson, and Gazelka are politicians that have a history of routinely trading in your liberties for political favors to advance their own political career. **ALL THREE voted in 2019 to pass a $2 Billion spending bill that INCREASED taxpayer funding to Planned Parenthood. (HF2414)** As your next governor, I will not stand for your tax dollars flowing to Planned Parenthood! I will always fight to defend life, which begins at conception. Watch my most recent interview on advancing Pro-Life policy here: [](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYMkSqpzuaGvFMrbR7zh1Cy&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=caucus_alert_pro_life&n=1) For far too long career politicians of both sides have failed in defending life and liberty. It’s time for a different kind of conservative candidate who will defeat Tim Walz, and PROTECT Life and Liberty. **I’m asking you to join the fight with me to Save Minnesota. We will only succeed with your help! We must all go to caucus, and sign up to be delegates. The stakes are simply too high to stand on the sidelines.** Visit electneil.com/endorse to sign up with our team, and for more information. Use Caucusfinder.com to find your precinct caucus location. And bring a friend! If you cannot attend, please consider [chipping in $25, $50, $100 or more](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=caucus_alert_pro_life&n=2) to help us get our message out to Conservative Minnesotans who are ready to Take Action! Thank You! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor electneil.com
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=caucus_alert_pro_life&n=3). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=caucus_alert_pro_life&n=4), software for leaders.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Republicans are pulling out ALL THE STOPS to keep PA red.
#
Derek,
**Ted Cruz is on his way to our great Commonwealth of Pennsylvania _right now._**
He’s headed to a rally with Republican David McCormick, the millionaire former hedge fund CEO who’s registered to vote in Connecticut.
**Here’s why this matters:** Republicans are pulling out all the stops to win this seat, including bringing folks like Ted Cruz -- and all his conservative donors -- to focus on our race.
And don’t forget how Cruz aimed to overturn Pennsylvania’s election results in 2020.
By embracing Ted Cruz’s endorsement, McCormick and his campaign are showing that they will not defend free and fair elections. In fact, they’re willing to support Trump’s Big Lie in order to raise more money for their campaign.
We can’t let McCormick and Cruz get away with this, Derek.
**[Can you rush a donation right now to demonstrate the people power of our campaign for U.S. Senate? We need to raise at least $50,000 today if we’re going to keep up with McCormick, Cruz and their mega-donors.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42073?refcode=ema20220125-4332&t=27&akid=4332%2E434096%2E9BvHt5)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42073?refcode=em20220125-4332&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=46&akid=4332%2E434096%2E9BvHt5)**
The GOP and their super PACs have already spent over $15 MILLION to buy this seat. And with mega fundraiser Ted Cruz now adding his support, we know that number will just continue to go up.
**Good thing we have John Fetterman running...** the _only_ candidate who can flip this seat and beat a Republican in the general election, according to the latest public polling. After all, he’s the _only_ Democrat in the race who has won a statewide election.
Derek, John has what it takes to flip this seat and guarantee a Democratic majority in the Senate. But we need everyone to chip in what they can today so we can hold our own against the GOP.
**[Can you contribute $5 to fight back against Ted Cruz and close the gap on the Republicans?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42073?refcode=ema20220125-4332&t=47&akid=4332%2E434096%2E9BvHt5)**
We know we can win this race with your support.
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220125-4332-footer&t=48&refcode2=4332_434096_9BvHt5&akid=4332%2E434096%2E9BvHt5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=49&akid=4332%2E434096%2E9BvHt5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=50&akid=4332%2E434096%2E9BvHt5)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: | = First: Eight Republican opponents jumped into the race against Michael — including a Trump loyalist who attended the January 6th insurrection, and wealthy CEOs who raised roughly a million dollars each in the last quarter of 2021. One even used his own fortune to plaster the airwaves across Colorado with a misleading attack ad against Michael. Then: We launched the Bennet Defense Fund to counter attacks against Michael, debunk distortions of his record, and close the gap in fundraising because the National GOP has raised over $104 million last year. Now: We’re turning to the Bennet Defense Fund to build the resources we’ll need to fight off attacks and start this critical election year strong. We knew this race wouldn’t be easy, but with attacks coming from all sides and control of the Senate on the line, Michael is counting on grassroots supporters like you. Folks, Michael is the only Senator running for re-election who doesn’t accept a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. He serves your interests not theirs. We’re counting on you, so please pitch in $10 — or whatever you can — before our first end-of-month fundraising deadline this year to help Michael fend off attacks sent from National Republicans and his opponents. We keep thinking that all his corrupt actions have come to light. But there’s always more! Now we know he tried to deploy the military and seize Michigan’s election equipment in 2020! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012522_3]
There’s a reason Trump was friends with so many dictators during his time in office. It’s the same reason we cannot let his cronies win Secretary of State races this November!

New reporting from Politico shows Donald Trump drafted an order to deploy the military [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012522_3] and seize ‘compromised’ voting machines in Michigan. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012522_3]
He wanted to send in the army and take over our democratic process. In other words, a coup . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012522_3]
Enough is enough. How many times do we have to debunk these lies before the GOP gives up?? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012522_3]
Jocelyn Benson, Michigan’s Secretary of State, went on MSNBC to share the truth about her state’s 2020 election:
“There was not and never has been any evidence of widespread fraud or any wrongdoing with our elections. Our election was safe, secure, and an accurate reflection of the will of the people.”
– Jocelyn Benson, MI Secretary of State[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012522_3]
We cannot let Trump’s hand-picked extremists take over Secretary of State offices in November. Their conspiracy theories will infect our elections from the inside out. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012522_3]

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: New Vaccine Mandate for Kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Final Outrage](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopMSL2dtDat17OtVYw5Xwer5-_MZ5aGJTfCeSkcaGtUnQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_25_final&n=1) A state senator is trying to mandate the COVID vaccine for kindergarten and up – without exemptions – starting next year. It’s the same senator whose previous legislation made California a national outlier by eliminating religious exemptions. This is not called science. It’s called an obsession. The new bill comes as the LA Times reports that the number of families choosing to homeschool their kids has doubled. I can’t possibly imagine why. Meanwhile, in New York, the State Supreme Court has struck down the Governor’s mask mandate as unconstitutional. It’s what our high court should have done when Gallagher and I sued Newsom. At least judges in one state are doing their job. 2022 is my last year in the Legislature, and I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop the assault on parental rights. I'll fight with you to make this a turning point: where decency makes a comeback in California. With everything now on the line in our race for Congress, I was grateful to see this tweet from Ric Grenell: “I am proud to endorse Kevin Kiley. No one is better to put America First in the 3rd CD than Kevin. We are all in.” [Help me keep fighting for parent rights ](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_25_final&n=2) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAztkcU3b54oU4J6K-xSOPgE-6c4zTy_Z-SPJcz0FJlIAA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_25_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[ElectKevinKiley.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltV7bfMPCE9ZT2udr1wr_AxY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_25_final&n=4)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Ukraine is another Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden is not qualified to be Commander in Chief |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=33c35b600b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I was a soldier for more than 20 years in combat zones. Here's what I know:

WHEN YOU HAVE TO EVACUATE TWO U.S. EMBASSIES IN SIX MONTHS, YOU ARE A BAD COMMANDER IN CHIEF!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=626759e29b&e=afa21b7626), a swing district south of Orlando. The country apparently needs my military expertise in Congress, because Biden is dangerously incompetent in addition to being illegitimate!**

I can't believe the utter stupidity of this regime in military affairs. It's like they are committed to lose wars and make us look awful while doing so.

First, less than 6 months ago, we had the utter collapse of Afghanistan. We rolled up shop, retreated with our tails between our legs, and let the Taliban have $85 billion of US military equipment in the process.

13 brave soldiers died trying to defend a rushed and poorly planned evacuation.

It was the first embassy evacuation since Saigon. A national disgrace.

**What's so crazy is that he is repeating the mistakes in Ukraine! **
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6719f31eb9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| FOX News reports:

_Last week, U.S. officials told Fox News that the State Department is ordering families of U.S. Embassy staff in Kyiv, Ukraine, to begin evacuating, and that they will encourage Americans to leave the country on commercial flights while they remain available.

Moscow has massed tens of thousands of troops along the Ukraine border, prompting fears of invasion.

The United States has heightened the readiness of some 8,500 U.S. troops amid tensions between Russia and NATO over a potential invasion of Ukraine, but no decisions have been made yet to deploy them.

"Secretary Austin has placed a range of units in the United States on a heightened preparedness to deploy, which increases our readiness to provide forces if NATO should activate" the NATO National Response Force, said Pentagon press secretary John Kirby on Monday._

So, after surrendering to a Taliban force 1/5 the size of ours, Biden wants to guarantee loss again.

Putin has overwhelming force on Ukraine's borders and some inside Ukraine. Tens of thousands of soldiers and heavy armor and fighter jets.

To counter this, Biden wants to send just 8500 brave American soldiers, like my two sons, as.... bait? Human shields?

Gen. Powell showed us, you win wars with overwhelming force and defined mission. _Neither one exists here._

What does it mean? It means Joe Biden has no idea what he's doing, and is gambling with the lives of 8500 of our soldiers for no good reason, to defend a border that isn't ours, against an aggressive madman with overwhelming force against us.

**_If my sons were there, I'd be furious_**!

President Biden and Congressman Darren Soto have failed to protect the American people, and have no idea how to use military force.

They will get Americans killed with reckless weakness and lack of direction. They will retreat and make us look as inept as he is.

_No wars, and no weakness either. We must be strong and peaceful!_
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=92523dd4c2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **_Fun time is over- this is serious now. This lunatic is putting 8500 of our troops in harm's way, with no mission and in grave peril against better armed and much more numerous forces. _**

His weakness got us into this. He invited Putin to invade Ukraine.

_Now he wants to send YOUR SON to die for his weakness._

And Soto is ready to follow Biden off the cliff.

**The swamp doesn't like me, because I call 'em as I see 'em. But right now, someone has to- before Biden gets us all killed.**

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up and fought for our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0347d08989&e=afa21b7626) Help me bring my military experience to Congress.

Help me stand up to Biden and his incompetence! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d38f6d155a&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0a534dcabe&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a1c6bfc0f7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d53d89118a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f9d4e6df1c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=72788bbc7f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=72788bbc7f).

body:

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: What would Geoff say if he were giving the State of the Commonwealth Address tonight?
body:
Please watch Geoff's video message to find out what he has to say.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bhIJ6lGsAPUKvr55DUbpSBoHJt4PTkF-q6rZOJ7TyBKCUmMnvI87b80M_TQWDJVVKz_BsntCO62hXzGzmPTrlW9FKNcqJ65DYIKmf8jGqUy7NW28MfS1vZXV6PKRCAkwNidmuaUWHsdmY3e1nuS10g==&c=Iv96odUCJNfNwqR1xNl97w9S05dGgucO3BPCi-Wt34iphezOyWEneg==&ch=cCTf-kV4soiVtbYYU83uxEvYwhOhXVh-O-79qsVwbo-rN7C0wOUhgA==)
---
Dear Friends,
This evening, Governor Baker delivered his final State of the Commonwealth Address.
Alongside the Governor's address, I have been asked by many people what I would say if I were the one giving a speech tonight. After all, next year's State of the Commonwealth Address hopefully will be up to me.
From my vantage point, the state of the Commonwealth is: Resilient.
Please see more of what I have to say by clicking on the video above or by clicking the button below:
---
---
| [Click Here to Watch Geoff's Video on YouTube](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bhIJ6lGsAPUKvr55DUbpSBoHJt4PTkF-q6rZOJ7TyBKCUmMnvI87b80M_TQWDJVVKz_BsntCO62hXzGzmPTrlW9FKNcqJ65DYIKmf8jGqUy7NW28MfS1vZXV6PKRCAkwNidmuaUWHsdmY3e1nuS10g==&c=Iv96odUCJNfNwqR1xNl97w9S05dGgucO3BPCi-Wt34iphezOyWEneg==&ch=cCTf-kV4soiVtbYYU83uxEvYwhOhXVh-O-79qsVwbo-rN7C0wOUhgA==)
---
---
As we work to recover from the pandemic, let's do more than just rebuild our state. Let's make it even better than it ever was before. Let's make a state we can be proud to not just live in today, but to be the place we want our kids and grandkids to live when they grow up.
I'm convinced we can do it, together.
As always, I gratefully appreciate your support.
Sincerely,
---
---

---

**** You’re an integral part of our team and we wanted to share this top secret campaign plan we’ve devised to take on Kevin McCarthy and elect Bruno, who will actually fight and work for the people of the Central Valley.
**We’re going to tell the truth about him.**
Don’t tell him that we’re going to talk about how he led all his GOP colleagues in voting against sending monthly payments to families to help with child care. Don’t tell him that we’re going to talk about how he voted against sending relief to small businesses through the American Rescue Plan. Don’t tell him that we’re going to talk about how he voted against improving our environmental infrastructure right here in the Central Valley — by voting against the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill that will help clean up the toxic drinking water in Bakersfield. Don’t tell him that we’re going to talk about how he promised to build a new VA clinic in our district over ten years ago, but has yet to make good on any of those promises — all while making toothless statements of support for veterans in an attempt to cover himself up. Don’t tell him that we’re going to talk about how he’s lobbied against raising the minimum wage while working people in our district have faced stagnated wages for years. And most of all, don’t tell him that Bruno Amato — a U.S. Navy veteran, a union member, and working-class champion running on an unapologetically progressive platform — is going to make Kevin fight for his political life all with the power of folks like you. [**Here’s one thing you can do. Chip in to our grassroots campaign right now and help us keep telling the truth so we can defeat him in November.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHSWO7JTkM2Yy0Y2cBbofJFJMgLXEA2zDTZPtDjvshnG0OsdNK-5xGjCcDW71UyUt-6k-bkwUGG7chw0iwfV38rpyKfhtPoKV8J1l0F9FUhkfZ4G4bzQAl2YGDdJNRNQgVuc85k0iPPLRMvEhDEIpUO88ubyss8v5wuunGWYcE7cK-2jzs1RgJBZwUMzP0owzTArwvjGv99YHM8WTzfiQGrhytOAkDcP8E_KL4CWryrCUFi7du7L7Ug28D2rmRTx6kXw-hyk-hXQ5a8L7v5k4ySG6SP75xGujnkMBxlpsg-0TY7Dp49odskmoOJv__iTLVw/3j0/mfMF0ktXToikwP335mA-gQ/h1/bAnIFwYGDn6ag5YbH5sLfdMOPTb7vcONCvHwTbZzLbE)**** Let's do this, Team Bruno For Congress [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHTBXoWlpkChykyoFoCxOjITVf0TW6MT5k7JGe8t7clrqViS-KmDtDy-SMKNK2e4KzucsYgxejP6NB0hEWeUaI7fsjQvNAE9MNtjqr8M9Dpn7K1ofCSuerEIeqWPaTBsG-glkY277h9XrMRQuahP4RM9c8LUHQng07c9dcg5QWGLi8gRI1IIZwVulqkCdSzWdoyw5YnHkPJejvtuGh4Wa5oY2L1vwq6CqdM6vjhay5P9sjFrhkJ039shd_tw0g1feM-vkdfXMHb_ftDqm5vnMaQ6xywF0xYXV_2EGdJdt5Vm2WlQQfq3nC6FAG9SqOQP9Vw/3j0/mfMF0ktXToikwP335mA-gQ/h2/qJOpCE48-8on_8ZiCETG7mkvgj_kt4_8T6cRdZmwxDk)

body:
Join our Election Integrity team TODAY!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npwrd_1&n=1)

**IT’S NATIONAL POLL WORKER RECRUITMENT DAY!**

Friend -- Today is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day! Last year, Republicans across Wisconsin submitted the **largest number of Republican election inspectors in state history at around 5,000!** Thank you to our hardworking grassroots activists for your work in this effort to ensure that communities across Wisconsin have poll workers delivering fair and secure elections. If you weren't submitted as a poll worker, we still need a large amount of poll observers and supplemental poll workers to help monitor elections. **If you’ve ever considered stepping up as a Conservative leader in your area, this is a great opportunity!** There has never been a more important time to get involved. name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: A personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
It’s time to address border security, but I need your help first. Friend, [Did you see my article in the Casa Grande Dispatch?](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=3c71d08069894fb4b93097c6fe7127bc&_e=9sA1hZCWzTaPPCgRc30u7UB961rPHggWGbrwui6yXBD3xQLJPfUAVerPaHpuzdUX5mWFVdESzZl31Kb56I8TxSbDtl61Fys-IG6TfZjycWg7p4weeUDH5Xu6YKvq4z1hsoJoihKHPgttR6tL516idA5Vy1mUddX7yAXRVoN-phIeWY0uaUil-GIitnatqsbIGc9Pw3vb1yqWPxhl2MQczh7iusNM1quBFRi4O0TZeUfOqBssrXGDkkLclcEJ0JoDwNnA8BG6jSK5LgK0K16cneLK03KGLdYBnuQXI9h8nZNKp4D5Z854mm1ErbFT3XZWSbHtjOpG6D38CLRWLvqzxQ%3D%3D) **On our family farm, 90 miles from the border, I am living the horrors of Biden’s failed border policy. I’ve had enough. ** Under Article 1, Section 10, Clause 3, of the US Constitution, states have the Constitutional authority to defend themselves when under invasion or imminent danger. Friend, we are under invasion and it’s time for Arizona to act. **If Joe Biden won’t protect our communities and the rule of law, I will take matters into my own hands. That’s why I’m running to be Arizona’s next Attorney General.** But I need your help to make sure my name is on the Republican primary ballot! [**Will you join thousands of other patriotic Arizonans who have already signed my petition and add your name today?**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=3c71d08069894fb4b93097c6fe7127bc&_e=9sA1hZCWzTaPPCgRc30u7Yhhub9kb6qmPl81J9phQI6EWycCNQPb_qZVPw2ZRpKuxSDsyZj-56EIrNXfqA-S8ZewaMmWHMcKdoqElGFDlOu4i3dy4hkhfr3OmctP7E_Dmir6uSOvAKkf3y9r9SH5QuZiR1_s-c0KJXzJTSYu8GTW6umD4YpVhP8xFCoKi_u4QZT1xpXDyhEaDnGMwCc1u6HdQ1IssU3Pnuj-vRbN4YmtUTfxbN_Y7t7IorgZZJRoqhEWCD5pOJsjQ11VH4vrV_M1qyUDHF4PX33wsocxz-I%3D) **Arizona needs an Attorney General who will stand up to the Biden Administration and is serious about securing our border and eradicating the drug cartels from the face of Arizona.** [**Sign My Ballot Petition To Show That Border Security Comes First**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=3c71d08069894fb4b93097c6fe7127bc&_e=9sA1hZCWzTaPPCgRc30u7Yhhub9kb6qmPl81J9phQI6EWycCNQPb_qZVPw2ZRpKuxSDsyZj-56EIrNXfqA-S8TcPA2_Qh9dz-kooo0emHW_q9FmIlCc2e8t6asgt_6xr9xg-oBGPY0iDx9Y6-r98838ERCje8osO8YUnRvm2xOHa-HRXzAB3Qf6TVN7vF2hcLhW-U_mkcz6A3tOanvYf0ihPKmEg1MOznMyeMFTu-ybpdfUwnUxBH5JIkm5ij3M-bq1d_mCfqShy1WA7ue0i-RALMupwU4qBu7quvJ5yprk%3D) If you agree that we need to secure our border, stand up to Biden, and protect the rule of law, please [**sign my petition**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=3c71d08069894fb4b93097c6fe7127bc&_e=9sA1hZCWzTaPPCgRc30u7Yhhub9kb6qmPl81J9phQI6EWycCNQPb_qZVPw2ZRpKuxSDsyZj-56EIrNXfqA-S8RZ6cLK7bzpbcHKoJY_c4_3PqteEayFOKiJbZKScc-o_ZDYLh6k1t3gJlwS8SYQNUqhqCtswIu05eWlszy6LQdRnMi11C1zlWn3Ozj6STZK2lEMwInBsV1-Yhw6WpmHn-Gbq4xFidA50L-cDZvi8PGTyAlPMCtXNDbHkn-F-40W_M7jMgKWPjmynvsebwf7tLqe21wzIJ0giqmbRnh3Fi8s%3D) today. It’s time to turn the energy from President Trump’s visit to Arizona into action. Thank you, Tiffany PS: Please send this email to five Republican friends in Arizona and ask them to sign my petition as well! Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.

None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace

clean_body: | | | | See you in Florida! | Friend, If you haven’t registered, the deadline is imminent to enter the sweepstakes to come to beautiful Mar-a-Lago in sunny Florida! The campaign event and photograph with President Trump is coming up, and we want you to be our VIP guest. The sweepstakes is about to close – don’t miss your chance! Here’s what you could win: We’ll cover your flight and hotel You’ll attend a campaign dinner event And you’ll even get your picture taken with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago ALL YOU HAVE TO DO IS ENTER! Don’t miss out on this incredible trip to Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida. Thank you, Team Kelly for Alaska | | | | ==

subject: Jerusalem

body:
Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdf5afcbe1084d198ab760091a78c3ba&_e=vVnKU2uqTWcX1lIo7k4Yqh2eVK_ORn7S1RyIZNwoNT6fw-7C5s4UDQQpZ3okN_ibQE3HjNzyGSu0-8VA8uXwkBkn1CM0237hq0Ys6pyMdtWPgEaYdBpdJIMA4iUaD162WVqSq5Lz8j8txz_NUCOkdJ5Prr5B7dUIL3tBOjEq1umxHePts7Hff_1LVhOE_C_NnaK3SczOLRKUPLUnv28KXDsNiqwyKuy7Vh-RXoWYhHA-1tdzlqgBFSIaPRcShwqI9lgolMyjbJopaT5Q5bxoZuvAQtymbNfwXy5ibrDZMibLs7q54jmDB6DQnnJ8L0PpfO34NkZwI3TAn14Wk64Cin09Xp-NsXa21gHkP-7NaXWBvdpPX0jRmppnq86c4yYtX7k1AgZARf3CUg9uiYQD_Dwkw6QreUlgdvX1Ql1HQVAy5FG4-yXTuRq5aL_zLNDSL5XXK6Pxpb3rq2ALetN062Dj6SbiOp6RjGwdEms0rdCehv9kCuJjO9LTsE7oF_Mj)

Hey Fellow American,

I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world.

**Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision.**

I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. **_END OF STORY._**

[** DO YOU AGREE WITH THE DECISION OF OUR 45TH PRESIDENT? **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdf5afcbe1084d198ab760091a78c3ba&_e=vVnKU2uqTWcX1lIo7k4Yqh2eVK_ORn7S1RyIZNwoNT6fw-7C5s4UDQQpZ3okN_ibQE3HjNzyGSu0-8VA8uXwkBkn1CM0237hq0Ys6pyMdtWPgEaYdBpdJIMA4iUaD162WVqSq5Lz8j8txz_NUCOkdJ5Prr5B7dUIL3tBOjEq1umxHePts7Hff_1LVhOE_C_NnaK3SczOLRKUPLUnv28KXDsNiqwyKuy7Vh-RXoWYhHA-1tdzlqgBFSIaPRcShwqI9lgolMyjbJopaT5Q5bxoZuvAQtymbNfwXy5ibrDZMiak7qqEPD0DbdBuys5B2Br8_U7dNvUSPSmWGE8sHMb2Xe3riVnOFVgOnqhpwRzk6GLMuPkd4J1aaC1UT-G0aAqqMdMqL5OS779YJMRveYDOzsesUhITeDf1WyolDXjnNw1fm0OQG4oNRrzGXgx1A5NqMF4e1QmE5OlBP233xRtP7ewS_boNCRPNAMjZ5zB6eGDaY7BQPVhC2tCrZsQEJ_ME)
The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel.

Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. [**Don’t you agree Fellow American?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdf5afcbe1084d198ab760091a78c3ba&_e=vVnKU2uqTWcX1lIo7k4Yqh2eVK_ORn7S1RyIZNwoNT6fw-7C5s4UDQQpZ3okN_ibQE3HjNzyGSu0-8VA8uXwkBkn1CM0237hq0Ys6pyMdtWPgEaYdBpdJIMA4iUaD162WVqSq5Lz8j8txz_NUCOkdJ5Prr5B7dUIL3tBOjEq1umxHePts7Hff_1LVhOE_C_NnaK3SczOLRKUPLUnv28KXDsNiqwyKuy7Vh-RXoWYhHA-1tdzlqgBFSIaPRcShwqI9lgolMyjbJopaT5Q5bxoZuvAQtymbNfwXy5ibrDZMiao5Pvuu5rZz8-_eUFjN9uU8QBZLG5G8YZi64oMGbZEdKqyOr0G6Ei8W_JIPs-jPKLlmXEUDr-ISYWP347iPH1OEfefK6e9WOx68Ij0JBS62Vm6gdmevQuQsj9XSDuCOh06TG08Qd5PPoTQKEE3ISF4XkQumCjxgkxLXzxSx7nwNmNcm56tcl4n6z0IdFsJrjgyUYsjD03ylZovcoC8TSBQ)

**I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**If you agree with me then please help me become the next Republican Senator from Maryland, and let’s finally win back the America we know and love.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdf5afcbe1084d198ab760091a78c3ba&_e=vVnKU2uqTWcX1lIo7k4Yqh2eVK_ORn7S1RyIZNwoNT6fw-7C5s4UDQQpZ3okN_ibQE3HjNzyGSu0-8VA8uXwkBkn1CM0237hq0Ys6pyMdtWPgEaYdBpdJIMA4iUaD162WVqSq5Lz8j8txz_NUCOkdJ5Prr5B7dUIL3tBOjEq1umxHePts7Hff_1LVhOE_C_NnaK3SczOLRKUPLUnv28KXDsNiqwyKuy7Vh-RXoWYhHA-1tdzlqgBFSIaPRcShwqI9lgolMyjbJopaT5Q5bxoZuvAQtymbNfwXy5ibrDZMiaxUI7XZ3ovwkeZlrO9jHYhc6k-LTFex663fQRaIDho5fuSLG3_I4vpfBKBT1nblBUxJJDMKKmX362I7qRdkqKAgGXrKl4oSJGlovvOthxDtCUnXgHIr4HX38nSoUTXGV2W9Ur5b1wHGSSIfKaWEGXonaT7kZHYGS2kLW8jsUbw4qg9YdGjmHvXvGEDKW5SvSXb6zFSrb0ht2I-FNrXj8Qs)

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdf5afcbe1084d198ab760091a78c3ba&_e=vVnKU2uqTWcX1lIo7k4Yqh2eVK_ORn7S1RyIZNwoNT6fw-7C5s4UDQQpZ3okN_ibQE3HjNzyGSu0-8VA8uXwkBkn1CM0237hq0Ys6pyMdtWPgEaYdBpdJIMA4iUaD162WVqSq5Lz8j8txz_NUCOkdJ5Prr5B7dUIL3tBOjEq1umxHePts7Hff_1LVhOE_C_NnaK3SczOLRKUPLUnv28KXDsNiqwyKuy7Vh-RXoWYhHA-1tdzlqgBFSIaPRcShwqI9lgolMyjbJopaT5Q5bxoZuvAQtymbNfwXy5ibrDZMiZigxk9rQ98mzAWHWyP7dX_s2rbJWmQkpAraZ_-sAVGPVcdZRlXvduvzSlgQ3cfw5qddoIf4q3Twf2Uwyqebok6Pb3X3MVfeoY0uhmJNgE-aSlKUT_8hflkS1RfRL50vBRISnp3NRK9QXEbK6dDKjBwAKShQrbn4PXMJwMntzSlFjIpQMTt8N2UmqXKwGcDgj6ue1WtlPOKsLplHO7zfLLw)
**James Tarantin for U.S. Senate**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN FOR SENATE **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdf5afcbe1084d198ab760091a78c3ba&_e=vVnKU2uqTWcX1lIo7k4Yqh2eVK_ORn7S1RyIZNwoNT6fw-7C5s4UDQQpZ3okN_ibQE3HjNzyGSu0-8VA8uXwkBkn1CM0237hq0Ys6pyMdtWPgEaYdBpdJIMA4iUaD162WVqSq5Lz8j8txz_NUCOkdJ5Prr5B7dUIL3tBOjEq1umxHePts7Hff_1LVhOE_C_NnaK3SczOLRKUPLUnv28KXDsNiqwyKuy7Vh-RXoWYhHA-1tdzlqgBFSIaPRcShwqI9lgolMyjbJopaT5Q5bxoZuvAQtymbNfwXy5ibrDZMib_olk17fDye6kGiMLhOIy0V-65TVrz2onXS6HOr3thQLw91khq_dtKcgy3HM8hueDHSi0TjrNIXE1y03CqvVjqTgpbN1oz_BgsoJbYiOpewfFw3x6NiorQQJTNEs5zVdlLg3gM8CTOQHBQ9AOMD-Aalc1iVHzCRLSfP-AYaG1Tr1csoTeCOp_vK1QUuXBTDr_uqej7_teXOlhTgtJtQ68t)
