name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Lahmeyer Calls For Repeal Of McGirt Decision By Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Lahmeyer for Senate
body:
| |
---
[](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=kkwdeocowq01inykw&linkid=0&link=324b27f962564d7a92a3bcf2e37490f4)
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
January 25th, 2022
Contact - John Killian (918) 527-5637 **US SENATE CANDIDATE JACKSON LAHMEYER CALLS FOR CONGRESS TO REPEAL MCGIRT DECISION THREATENING PRIVATE PROPERTY RIGHTS OF OKLAHOMANS** CHALLENGER CALLS ON LANKFORD AND INHOFE TO TAKE ACTION In the wake of the US Supreme Court's decision last Friday to uphold the McGirt decision and to limit their review to issues pertaining to the prosecution of crimes on Native American reservations, Republican US Senate candidate Jackson Lahmeyer today called on Senator James Lankford and Senator James Inhofe to immediately sponsor legislation in the US Congress to repeal the McGirt decision. "In limiting their ruling to the question of the application of criminal law on Native lands, the Supreme Court sidestepped the greater issue of taxation and regulation of private property rights," said Lahmeyer, who is challenging Senator James Lankford in the 2022 Oklahoma Republican US Senate primary. "Under the McGirt decision, the Native American tribes recognized in Oklahoma would have the authority to both tax and regulate the private property, homes, businesses, and farmland of non-Native Oklahomans," said Lahmeyer, whose insurgent Senate candidacy has been endorsed by Oklahoma Republican State Party Chairman John Bennett, former Trump National Security Advisor General Michael Flynn, and longtime national Republican strategist and Trump advisor Roger Stone. "The power to tax and regulate property rights in eastern Oklahoma are at stake here as although tribes don't have jurisdiction over non Indians and their businesses they very well may have tax and regulation jurisdiction over property rights on properties owned by half the citizens of Oklahoma," said Lahmeyer. Under the McGirt decision, the Indian Nations could have the right to tax and regulate private property owned by Oklahoma citizen," said Lahmeyer, a pastor and businessman from Owasso, who is challenging Senator James Lankford and has been critical of Lankford's support of the certification of the election of President Joe Biden, absent any judicial or legislative review of the undeniable irregularities and anomalies in the election results. "The Supreme Court's decision is unacceptable. We need a political leader willing to side with the overwhelming majority of Oklahoma citizens, tribal and non-tribal, who believe we should have equal application of the law as citizens of the state," said Lahmeyer. "The McGirt decision needs to be repealed via Congress." Lahmeyer said that the Supreme Court's position on the application of criminal law on tribal lands is also apparent. "Native Americans were made US citizens in 1924 with equal protection of all laws. Under the 14th Amendment of the Constitution, they were also considered citizens of each state in which they reside as opposed to merely residents," said Lahmeyer. "This means Native American tribal citizens should be subject to the same responsibilities, privileges, and obligations of state law as well as federal and tribal law. The only thing excepted from equal protection was their rights in their Native American property. "The McGirt decision is potentially destroying the private property rights of the average Oklahoman through the Tribe's ability to regulate and tax the land of non-tribal Oklahomans," said Lahmeyer. "The power and influence of Oklahoma's Native American tribes, who donate hundreds of thousands of dollars to members of Congress in both parties, is the reason why none of our elected officials have stepped up to address this very serious threat to the private property rights of Oklahomans, particularly those in eastern Oklahoma," continued Lahmeyer. "I specifically call on Senator James Lankford to take action to protect the private property rights of the people of Oklahoma," said Lahmeyer. "The silence from all of our elected officials is both obvious and disgraceful." "I call on the media who have systematically failed to ask any of our elected officials how they plan to address the very real problems posed by the McGirt decision, where they stand and what they are going to do to protect the private property rights of our non-Native citizens," added Lahmeyer. ### [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=kkwdeocowq01inykw&linkid=1&link=bf8d6d5517134858b8ff54a7a4c80713)
---

name: Team Nelson
subject: No primary debate??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Team, Tom Nelson is calling on the Democratic Party of Wisconsin to host a debate for the primary candidates. The stakes of this Senate race are too high to skip over doing a debate to pick the best Democratic nominee.

We know Tom is the best candidate fit to take on Ron Johnson, but the people need to see it for themselves. name: MS GOP
subject: HELP NEEDED: Protect FREE and FAIR elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:
| |
---
|
---
Fellow Republican,
2022 is flying by, and that means November will be here before we know it. We're working hard to make sure we can bring a RED WAVE across the country this election season, but all our hard work is at risk if our election integrity is compromised. The Dems would love nothing more than to corrupt our electoral process--but we know you won't let that happen.

If we want to preserve election integrity in this great nation, our strongest patriots must step up to the challenge. Join our ELECTION INTEGRITY TEAM to help us ensure that our election process is FREE and FAIR. Sign up today to learn more about how to become a poll worker and help protect America’s future.

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Not many campaigns could do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
A big goal to match Beto’s big vision for Texas.
#
We have exciting news to share from the campaign:
**We’re setting a goal to reach 2 million — yes, 2 million — Texas voters in February.**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52031?refcode=ema20220125-173249&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=173249%2E444211%2EaiyVEk)
Not many campaigns could achieve a goal like this ten months before Election Day. But we need to talk to as many Texans as possible to hear their stories, share Beto’s vision, and empower them to vote under our state’s extreme voter restrictions. It’s the key to competing with — and defeating — Greg Abbott.
The truth is, it’s going to take every tool in our toolkit to hit this goal. Below you can see our Organizing Director’s estimates for how much this plan is going to cost.
**February 2022: 2,000,000 Voter Contact Plan**
---
**Outreach Method** | **Costs** | **Estimate**
Texts | _Texting Platform_ | $50,000
Calls | _Auto-dialer platform_ | $35,000
Canvassing | _Printing, supplies_ | $10,000
If we want to ensure we’re able to reach 2 million voters in 28 days, we need to raise an additional $95,000 for our organizing budget. Every single text, call, and door-knock to Texans in February will be funded by grassroot supporters like you.
**[If you can, will you make a contribution of $3 now to help us raise $95,000 and fund our plan to contact 2 million Texans in February?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52031?refcode=ema20220125-173249&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=173249%2E444211%2EaiyVEk)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52031?refcode=ema20220125-173249&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=173249%2E444211%2EaiyVEk)**
When Beto and our team launched this campaign, we knew one of our biggest challenges would be overcoming the extreme and unjust voter suppression bill that Greg Abbott signed into law last summer.
The challenges of playing on an uneven field are already being felt as we move closer to Election Day — just look at places like Travis County, where officials have had to reject about 50% of mail-in ballot applications under Abbott’s new law.
The good news is, we’ve got a team of over 44,000 volunteers and counting ready to help Texas voters overcome these barriers — we just need to make sure we have the resources to get them on the phones and knocking doors.
**[Help us reach 2 million voters in 28 days by chipping in today. It’s going to take a historic campaign to overcome voter suppression in this election — so we’re counting on you to help us go bigger than ever.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52031?refcode=ema20220125-173249&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=173249%2E444211%2EaiyVEk)**
It’s not just about one election. The only way we’ll turn the tide against the decades-long campaign to undermine democracy in Texas is by electing a Governor who believes in protecting our right to vote.
The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we’re grateful for your support.
Keep fighting,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220125-173249-footer&t=23&refcode2=173249_444211_aiyVEk&akid=173249%2E444211%2EaiyVEk)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=173249%2E444211%2EaiyVEk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=173249%2E444211%2EaiyVEk)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

When Beto and our team launched this campaign, we knew one of our biggest challenges would be overcoming the extreme and unjust voter suppression bill that Greg Abbott signed into law last summer. The challenges of playing on an uneven field are already being felt as we move closer to Election Day — just look at places like Travis County, where officials have had to reject about 50% of mail-in ballot applications under Abbott’s new law. The good news is, we’ve got a team of over 44,000 volunteers and counting ready to help Texas voters overcome these barriers — we just need to make sure we have the resources to get them on the phones and knocking doors. It’s not just about one election. The only way we’ll turn the tide against the decades-long campaign to undermine democracy in Texas is by electing a Governor who believes in protecting our right to vote. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we’re grateful for your support. Keep fighting, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

name: George Logan
subject: Now is the time to help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GEORGE LOGAN
body:
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7217918f5a924c6d97837ff8c58a3940&_e=d5ei5DwDN05C3mWtZeeW-6SF_9fkn9AmjD0KrZSs5dzM5f5c0OchTkIHmucUbbwldiuHi1sbyUBsKJArhFyxhZnMPtI30ftEIEt34_tRhq-Axm5SnVV-UTgCqCo58JAtrs8m9XP52-recPr_amT4hyQeg391dytPTlM37x2QrBjYVu_BF7YUe84GP2TNTnLna94ddVA2NSxmDyCbsSnydJv-vCTvrcFFkVo62CY9Q7I8qRg9HdTHM0EopKoMz8e0CjfLRbHhwlUQ7tLn_iiMN3YFbEhfXE-Rdz-8imWZGReGvI5IeA5Pp_kg76R2Y259SEp-xmVTwS0GMF80m2BFhAF1gn94NQwPk4jyXvadrlpz3ckdiOHW0JJ_NPG9PHMvzdCvguXw9jebEf5FWr6q5g%3D%3D)

---
Peter, if your inbox looks anything like mine, I’m sure it’s full! But I hope you have just a few minutes to read this email from me.

If we haven’t had the chance to meet yet, I’m George Logan. Since I was a kid, I have always had a passion for helping others - it’s how my parents raised me after they came to the United States to grow a family and build a better life. Seeing my community struggle has never sat right with me, which is why I want to do everything in my power to help.

I’ve spent my life finding ways to solve problems big and small. I have never stopped helping those who need it - **and that is why I am running for Congress.**

We are going through rough times with inflation at its highest in nearly 40 years, facing the third year of the COVID-19 Pandemic, and skyrocketing crime rates. _That’s just to name a few._ **Our country needs help.**

I want to help our nation get back on its feet so that you and your family can live a better life. But for me to hit the ground running, I am going to need your help. [**Can I count on you to make a donation to kick off our campaign this year?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7217918f5a924c6d97837ff8c58a3940&_e=d5ei5DwDN05C3mWtZeeW-6SF_9fkn9AmjD0KrZSs5dzM5f5c0OchTkIHmucUbbwl93K4JJDGuBxpLYf0-CjDwbNHoWx9adLKVGw7_8bBskmuwxqe-8fInESwMOeUh5s2LiqURtyrmSgN8N-CLC40TtPwy8KybATNTfSMrD2CPBdjnb0j8_3euR7BA6ChJsYGZKGx_fjOct5ue84yqQakxm2scC7QKanFjeVjxbPJ5s4YI1VglSmEwXgr_yz0L37-7-1uMOVW4A3sEKQz4O1J7EI1axXR42TptkqMbLl7u8mti_w8nmAxXPp-9lIXbu8ixztTvWTeq6J1RxrKDxcJXRhipC-qWRYgCcIubMaJ1cGoCl1D1xOK41LwAfA9Cg0iMCQXPcHRhdqodEKAblAutS326A3zcPz_T2ekl_TEntmWQl7rC8_oTnuOY6qpGSE-8vXwRS6anWj1annJBuoNntZRKWk_xEnU7JD6dmG4ZmE%3D)

| [**DONATE ››**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7217918f5a924c6d97837ff8c58a3940&_e=d5ei5DwDN05C3mWtZeeW-6SF_9fkn9AmjD0KrZSs5dzM5f5c0OchTkIHmucUbbwl93K4JJDGuBxpLYf0-CjDwbNHoWx9adLKVGw7_8bBskmuwxqe-8fInESwMOeUh5s2LiqURtyrmSgN8N-CLC40TtPwy8KybATNTfSMrD2CPBdjnb0j8_3euR7BA6ChJsYGZKGx_fjOct5ue84yqQakxm2scC7QKanFjeVjxbPJ5s4YI1VglSmEwXgr_yz0L37-7-1uMOVW4A3sEKQz4O1J7I60Qgxa0O4lJl5AkCXhF7bTtvMEu_mavmmpfNqvpGMcBfRPyfFr5CgetaOF-j6urGtt6JTNarTuWt1iSiG28tAacE003nM8aL1QTYC0fe4dObD0IND2BT9HLwgAycor3rURT75PE0QH2oNlnxfmP9osJ8AubXrbVQ_SnxML-GVdj_kVPFsAK-auXZxiHijHd4tnxuQLL0NrZNmyHgHCZhM%3D)
---

Serving in the State Senate, I worked hard to keep more money in hard-earned paychecks by fighting against tax hikes and fiscal mismanagement. I tackled issues that directly impacted the well-being of local communities, such as proposing direct solutions for the opioid epidemic.

Giving back is essential to me. I made it my mission to volunteer with the Boys and Girls Club, YMCA, and other neighborhood organizations because their work is vital for our communities to prosper.

Together, we can get our country back on track, but running for Congress comes with a hefty price tag. **Democrats have infinite sources of income from deep-pocketed rich ultra-liberals, which makes running a campaign a breeze for them.** I, on the other hand, as a middle-class Republican from a predominantly blue state, rely on the support of grassroots donors, just like yourself.

[**That is why I am reaching out to you today. Can I count on your help with a donation of $10, $25, $50, or more to help us kick off this year?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7217918f5a924c6d97837ff8c58a3940&_e=d5ei5DwDN05C3mWtZeeW-6SF_9fkn9AmjD0KrZSs5dzM5f5c0OchTkIHmucUbbwl93K4JJDGuBxpLYf0-CjDwbNHoWx9adLKVGw7_8bBskmuwxqe-8fInESwMOeUh5s2LiqURtyrmSgN8N-CLC40TtPwy8KybATNTfSMrD2CPBdjnb0j8_3euR7BA6ChJsYGZKGx_fjOct5ue84yqQakxm2scC7QKanFjeVjxbPJ5s4YI1VglSmEwXgr_yz0L37-7-1uMOVW4A3sEKQz4O1J7KWgoI9HD_KWfK2bNg9g4o1rY0H3oK98KG-SQh0nb0ZJFJyTGMq3uLeisR3XzPGdcUoGwmMynqeq96Nxn2FDhPWUXW4FqJcz6cSi5Wkg5MNHMT058ldNNWbpDX0J3ep5qrrNlTflulypx2bH2S7ptjZrMRk34nbR752pk5XxB_oDnVj4wG8KvtolWHAvG2fmWSdG0a0G9KYA_7RmHJHmyKw%3D)

George S. Logan

name: Wisconsin Senate Alert
subject: Washington Post: "Sarah Godlewski could be the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
| **_Washington Post:_ "Sarah Godlewski could be the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson"** | [Donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41059801/327181120/-959429831?refcode=em22_220125_eom2_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220125_eom2_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWY4NzA0MS00YzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e3vJaiR5ig4FrZvAO-AprahvZSjc5w45GsEqdjYmPjk=)
---

**The headlines are saying what we already know: Sarah Godlewski is our best chance to defeat Ron Johnson.**

She has a track record of taking on powerful Republicans and running successful statewide campaigns in Wisconsin. And the latest head-to-head polling shows she is the only Democrat who can defeat Ron Johnson in the general election.

Our campaign is in the strongest position to beat this guy and return this Senate seat to the people of Wisconsin. We know it, Ron Johnson knows it, and the Republicans know it — which is why we're about to have a huge target on our backs.

Mitch McConnell and his dark money network plan to spend millions of dollars to protect Ron Johnson and attack us. Sarah's not accepting a dime from corporate PACs, which means we're relying on this grassroots team to help us combat the outside attacks from Johnson's allies.

[**Sarah is the Democrat who can defeat Ron Johnson this November, but she can't do it alone. Remember, Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control. Peter,

**Today I officially filed the paperwork to run in the Republican congressional primary in Oregon’s 4th Congressional District!**

To say that were excited about this opportunity is an understatement. I hope my opponents are reading this today because I have one message for them: You’re going to have one hell of a time taking me down.

While we’re no longer running against one of the most senior members of the House, **we know that we’re going to be up against someone who believes in the same policies he worked nearly 40 years to implement** ; we’re also keenly aware that our opponent will be well funded. Alek Skarlatos

name: Donna Imam
subject: Scholarships.
body:
We’re not paying college professors millions in salaries, nor are we rebuilding college campuses every year. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41059822/327181252/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzJmZjBlMy00ZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3MdoB4RoiRRQkN8Ob0J_ZJLyT39m0UxfmXdtxenrQw=)
Friend, I went to college in the small, rural, snowy, conservative, Midwestern rust-belt town of Angola, in the flyover state of Indiana. Why Angola? Scholarships. Like a lot of families, a college education would never have been possible for me without scholarships and working while going to school. Hard work got me a full ride to grad school. I thought I was living the dream, but it was really the opportunity to graduate _debt free_ that made my American dream a reality. Not everyone gets that chance. Instead, we are burdening our next generation with mortgage-sized student loan debt the moment they enter the workforce, preventing them from starting a family, buying a home and living their American dream. **The good news is we can change this.** **[I’m running for Congress so every student can graduate debt-free with my Education for All Proposal. Can you donate to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41059823/327181253/-992561264?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220124_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzJmZjBlMy00ZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3MdoB4RoiRRQkN8Ob0J_ZJLyT39m0UxfmXdtxenrQw=)** Over the past several decades the cost of college has gone up _3000%_. That makes _no_ sense. We’re not paying college professors millions in salaries, nor are we rebuilding college campuses from the ground up every year. In fact, technology should be driving the cost of education down to nothing. Higher education and high skilled training is the single most effective path to innovation and securing our nation's future. Yet, the 2-year tuition-free community college option in the Build Back Better Act was _gutted_ in the House before it could even make it to the Senate. **We need leadership in Congress that will ensure bills pass in the Senate and deliver for the American people. ** **[My Education for All policy proposal ensures everyone in the United States can go to college, trade schools, or certification programs without being in debt forever. I’ll build consensus to deliver. We can’t do this without you, please chip in to my campaign for Congress now so we can get out the vote and win this brand new seat!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41059824/327181254/-992561264?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220124_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzJmZjBlMy00ZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3MdoB4RoiRRQkN8Ob0J_ZJLyT39m0UxfmXdtxenrQw=)** Thanks for your support. – Donna

clean_body: We’re not paying college professors millions in salaries, nor are we rebuilding college campuses every year. | = Friend, I went to college in the small, rural, snowy, conservative, Midwestern rust-belt town of Angola, in the flyover state of Indiana. Why Angola? Scholarships. Like a lot of families, a college education would never have been possible for me without scholarships and working while going to school. Hard work got me a full ride to grad school. I thought I was living the dream, but it was really the opportunity to graduate debt free that made my American dream a reality. Not everyone gets that chance. Instead, we are burdening our next generation with mortgage-sized student loan debt the moment they enter the workforce, preventing them from starting a family, buying a home and living their American dream. The good news is we can change this. = Over the past several decades the cost of college has gone up 3000%. That makes no sense. We’re not paying college professors millions in salaries, nor are we rebuilding college campuses from the ground up every year. In fact, technology should be driving the cost of education down to nothing. Higher education and high skilled training is the single most effective path to innovation and securing our nation's future. Yet, the 2-year tuition-free community college option in the Build Back Better Act was gutted in the House before it could even make it to the Senate. We need leadership in Congress that will ensure bills pass in the Senate and deliver for the American people. = Thanks for your support. – Donna | = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene has no place in Washington and neither does J.D. Vance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
J.D. Vance’s newest endorsement shows just how dangerous his run for Ohio is.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220125-558-footer-ak&t=2&akid=558%2E90090%2EADlGVp)
**J.D. Vance was just endorsed by Marjorie Taylor Greene.**
Yes, the Representative who:
* Is permanently banned from Twitter.
* Promoted the Big Lie about the 2020 election results and was a part of inciting the insurrection that took place at the Capitol.
* Verbally assaulted Congresswoman Cori Bush and her staff, forcing them to move their office out of concern for their safety.
* Continually spreads misinformation about COVID-19 and refuses to abide by federally mandated safety policies — putting her staff, herself, and everyone around her at risk.
* Claims that the tragic and harrowing mass shootings at Sandy Hook and Parkland were “false flag” hoaxes.

[**_Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign right now to help us send a clear message to Marjorie Taylor Greene and J.D. Vance? We’ve got us, and we won’t stop fighting back against their dangerous far-right agenda._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22366?t=3&akid=558%2E90090%2EADlGVp)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22372?refcode=em20220125-558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=558%2E90090%2EADlGVp)**
J.D. Vance and Marjorie Taylor Greene don’t care about the working people of Ohio — and they never will. J.D. Vance sees America as a “joke” and to them, politics is just a game and something to do to spread their hate and lies as far as they can.
We won’t let them. It stops right here in Ohio. We’re working hard to fight back against their hateful rhetoric, harmful policies, and their plans for Ohio.
But we need your help to flip Ohio blue and expand our razor-thin Democratic majority with a Senator who will fight for working Ohioans and their families every day. **That’s Morgan.** **[_Can you donate $5 today to help us send her to the Senate?_](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22366?t=23&akid=558%2E90090%2EADlGVp) **
Thank you,
Morgan Harper HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220125-558-footer&t=24&refcode2=558_90090_ADlGVp&akid=558%2E90090%2EADlGVp)**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I'm asking from the bottom of my heart: I just announced that I will be running for re-election. It would mean so much to me if you could sign your name to lend me your official endorsement before midnight. Republicans are spreading vicious lies to unseat me as Speaker and sabotage my announcement. I need 50,000 Democrats to show they have my back and help me shut down these attacks. Your endorsement would mean so much to me in this critical moment. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ky-wGuZTUEO4MBdFxk4Y5g2?source=20220125_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30]I'm not asking for money today -- what I need more than anything right now is your personal endorsement. I just announced my run for re-election. Will you sign to officially endorse me before midnight? It would mean so much to me.
BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I urgently need 50,000 Democrats to sign their name, lend me their endorsement, and help me shut down Republicans' vicious attempts to unseat me as Speaker. If I don't gather the necessary support by midnight, Republicans will take it as a sign that their attacks are working. Will you sign ASAP? >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ky-wGuZTUEO4MBdFxk4Y5g2?source=20220125_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30]ENDORSE NANCY >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ky-wGuZTUEO4MBdFxk4Y5g22?source=20220125_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30]
I normally reach out to ask you for money. But I just officially announced my run for re-election. And right now -- what I need more than anything -- is your official endorsement. Republicans are spreading vicious lies to unseat me as Speaker and sabotage my announcement. If I don’t gather the necessary support by midnight, Republicans will use it to show their attacks are working -- I can’t let that happen. I need 50,000 Democrats to stand with me before midnight to completely shut down Republicans’ attacks to unseat me. I can’t overstate how much your endorsement would mean to me in this critical moment. Can I count on your signature before midnight? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ky-wGuZTUEO4MBdFxk4Y5g2?source=20220125_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30] Thank you, Nancy
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Pelosi won't let go of power
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/3225d2b55d907086/172cc1b6f6fd02acc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter,

Did you see? Pelosi just announced she’s running for Congress - AGAIN. After decades of failed leadership, Pelosi refuses to let go of power. Pelosi has overseen the largest expansion of the federal government in American history. She’s increased the federal debt to the tune of TRILLIONS of dollars. And here’s the worst part: **she thinks she did a great job.** Pelosi’s policies are toxic, and her legacy will be nothing but destruction. It’s imperative that we kick Pelosi out of power for good - **[are you with me?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/3225d2b55d907086/9c833832270ecfd0c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**
---
[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/3225d2b55d907086/dfd69ba541f7c663c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

subject: Senator Manchin should be EMBARRASSED!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team: Rachel Maddow just SLAMMED Joe Manchin for protecting the filibuster instead of saving the right to vote: [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=6&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y) Maddow is ABSOLUTELY right. If Democrat Joe Manchin would’ve stepped up to ABOLISH the filibuster months ago, the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act would have passed in the Senate!

**Now, voting rights, our Congressional majorities, and Joe Biden’s ENTIRE agenda are on the verge of total collapse.**

[We’re exhausted, and we’re asking for you to STAND with us, and tell Joe Manchin to do what’s right and abolish the filibuster »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=7&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=8&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=9&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y)
---
TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
FROM: A Realistic Democrat
DATE: January 25, 2022

**_Dear Senator Manchin,_**

We need to have a serious talk.

For the last nine months, in state houses across the country, **Republicans have been doing their best to dismantle voting rights.**

**And now, Senate Republicans have BLOCKED the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act, which would protect voting rights at a national level!**

I’m enraged, Senator, so now, I’m personally demanding you step up, meet this moment, and ABOLISH the filibuster to finally SAVE voting rights!

[I’m dead serious – and to prove it, I’m giving a donation of $2 to the Voter Protection Project, an organization founded to protect the right to vote, right now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=10&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=11&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
The Republican war on our democracy isn’t over, Senator.

**In addition to trying to suppress voters, the GOP is trying to block every piece of legislation President Biden is trying to pass — putting the midterms at risk!**

The people of your state and our country deserve more. That’s why I’m imploring you to do the right thing and abolish the filibuster!

[So please, STAND UP, defend our right to vote and abolish the filibuster once and for all. I know I am, and I’ll show it with a $2 donation to VPP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=12&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=13&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Sincerely,

**_x. A Proud American_**
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5308?t=14&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1170%2E878179%2EX1pZ2Y)

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: To make history, we must defy history.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
All signs show that Cheri Beasley in North Carolina is our best chance to flip a seat.

#
Friends -
There’s no denying that the midterms present a historic challenge for Democrats, but all signs show that Cheri Beasley in North Carolina is our best chance to flip a seat.
NBC just said North Carolina was one of the races to watch that could determine which party controls the Senate, saying this about why it’s such a battleground:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22/?refcode=em220125-1-t1&refcode2=299.357359.ZRWiQc&t=2&akid=299%2E357359%2EZRWiQc)
Right after that, CNN’s data analysts showed that Democrats’ best chance to pick up a seat is where a Republican is retiring — “most notably in North Carolina” as they said.
In order to make history, we must defy history. That’s the opportunity we have in North Carolina, so we need to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign to send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate? In one year alone, Joe Biden has done enough damage for a full term, and then some.
[**Help Me Hold Biden Accountable Today**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=41fdb7d32b5e44f9a124337e008817c9&_e=Yo-7XuuCxvdB1x9mpqO4-7Y1RdBSQUIC_p6_IWS0E8x5YkXNd6DmqrA0ToLH6xKtigqDbyediSUCAodYK93MJBa6aMrgbJugYqlRq25_0vgrdl2CZ9LocGSuOUlJlGX7eGdiG4TovuUgY1aPblxcOR3zmLAxUTtNDvnVqBwPjWzygI67LhgvyQr5c3IllYruy9YGZ4HCdZHCZnI__CLFrGhQxcTvYelPsWm248b1AxZIEKkM6bBlY_bADZbt82g8VV0h_7IhSg33visUyYSGuBLep0BXBC2gFIMEEPubNRx4Cie1zf8GaLze9YQ6ipnc2tISi-sxiymzZg1887J2_CgYWe51jZ2CayQPBR67JpFufIGEOV2C8DAnURfFhF4YL00Pz6UDtsjlqPokea0akH9YcRGE8MlJggZ3N7YSZ1w%3D)

clean_body: Don’t ignore this email... | WE SAID: The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to hang on to power in Washington. WE SAID: Nancy Pelosi is RAMMING through a FEDERAL TAKEOVER of our elections. WE SAID: We need Good Republican Patriots (like you!) to step up and help us SAVE AMERICA. | | | | | Don’t forget, if the Democrats pass their FEDERAL ELECTION TAKEOVER they will: End Voter ID Legalize “Ballot Harvesting” by Left-Wing Groups Allow illegal immigrants to vote! | | | | We need your help right away, Peter. name: Laurel Imer
subject: The liberal media has put a target on my back...
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
The liberal media has put a target on my back, and I need your help to stand up to them!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGmpN-ZOFHZiqKA2pIM9b8EheZlDjUHbjeqUFIw_U-griCEE7_FslWVOTAYv2LKlBGY_2lS2JlA3vWWIWnFbY1WJSMSpSX5fhc6cDLdFKD4AU90Q36AtS_1Nn21SF_KOId6wYN4qHIhNyMbRz6JdF-IwHiz1bx3hrzTKsXNET7xrRzppdWrpDpAiCTo7PGSv&c=94f1MVuARWKooD2xg03KL8CfvzwUszealnHrWHdy-5Qa1nt8nKgeJg==&ch=nrjHEaByjpd07AsWmIQz2lC6Rtq-vh_UGgT5M6nvg_rsVg9t12u0gg==)

| |
---
| Friends,
The liberal media has gone on the offensive with their latest attack on my opinions regarding COVID-19 and the government overreach that is taking place throughout our country.
In an article by the Colorado Times Recorder, my thoughts on COVID were labeled as "baseless," even when referencing medical experts, those experts were then labeled as "discredited." View the article [here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGmpN-ZOFHZiqKA2pIM9b8EheZlDjUHbjeqUFIw_U-griCEE7_FslX_GRexvqCtmJ7fdjo1p9cQxwMIDJ1O0_lef91Ea2a5mZ8JnH1n7GeIvVrcHVPzcV_4LdaKVKirOfR-RyYP2ZgqhGRF0wpQgVCzlLDhxtWGTpXogQKIxOn7lzL5ZjzH4A1U_ucl_MMQ8PMCOIRuyefhD0y9mBaqBil8XDDtS4p8WT3Z1do3mGt11_5dLbVxtqFWYmGIVZqJ7VvAZ38N-B4rOSagm831uzJweIonzJ2lKGMBr2tV4RaMmdpHQdBL4WqJ_PVK7mHvymY4HeDQGl_qY0wIqlCU4dw==&c=94f1MVuARWKooD2xg03KL8CfvzwUszealnHrWHdy-5Qa1nt8nKgeJg==&ch=nrjHEaByjpd07AsWmIQz2lC6Rtq-vh_UGgT5M6nvg_rsVg9t12u0gg==)
It seems as though anyone who does not follow the Fauci-Biden narrative of COVID is going to be met with criticism, despite Americans already turning on Biden for his failure to deal with the pandemic. 54% of Americans already disapprove! Why can't the liberal media see that the constantly shifting narrative of COVID is already falling apart?
---
| | | [WE NEED TO STOP THE FEARMONGERING AND CENSORSHIP!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGmpN-ZOFHZiqKA2pIM9b8EheZlDjUHbjeqUFIw_U-griCEE7_FslWVOTAYv2LKlBGY_2lS2JlA3vWWIWnFbY1WJSMSpSX5fhc6cDLdFKD4AU90Q36AtS_1Nn21SF_KOId6wYN4qHIhNyMbRz6JdF-IwHiz1bx3hrzTKsXNET7xrRzppdWrpDpAiCTo7PGSv&c=94f1MVuARWKooD2xg03KL8CfvzwUszealnHrWHdy-5Qa1nt8nKgeJg==&ch=nrjHEaByjpd07AsWmIQz2lC6Rtq-vh_UGgT5M6nvg_rsVg9t12u0gg==)

The Biden Administration needs to be held accountable for their inability to deal with the pandemic. Biden himself claimed during the 2020 campaign that he would stop the virus. Well, now more Americans have died under Biden than Trump. Is that what he calls progress?
My campaign has been about standing up for our God-given rights as Americans, and that includes our medical rights. The ridiculous mandates coming from bureautic elites like Fauci need to go.
Help me get to Congress and stand strong against this type of federal overreach when you make a generous donation to my campaign today:

clean_body: The liberal media has put a target on my back, and I need your help to stand up to them! | | | | | | | == | | | Friends, The liberal media has gone on the offensive with their latest attack on my opinions regarding COVID-19 and the government overreach that is taking place throughout our country. In an article by the Colorado Times Recorder, my thoughts on COVID were labeled as "baseless," even when referencing medical experts, those experts were then labeled as "discredited." View the article == It seems as though anyone who does not follow the Fauci-Biden narrative of COVID is going to be met with criticism, despite Americans already turning on Biden for his failure to deal with the pandemic. 54% of Americans already disapprove! Why can't the liberal media see that the constantly shifting narrative of COVID is already falling apart? | | | == The Biden Administration needs to be held accountable for their inability to deal with the pandemic. Biden himself claimed during the 2020 campaign that he would stop the virus. Well, now more Americans have died under Biden than Trump. Is that what he calls progress? My campaign has been about standing up for our God-given rights as Americans, and that includes our medical rights. The ridiculous mandates coming from bureautic elites like Fauci need to go. Help me get to Congress and stand strong against this type of federal overreach when you make a generous donation to my campaign today: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == Together we can make a difference and keep government out of our bodies. No one should be forced to make a medical decision by government orders. Sincerely, | | == | ---|--- | Laurel Imer Republican Candidate, CO-07 | | == | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress | This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Laurel Imer for Congress and approval by Laurel Imer | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

| Team, we know the AZ GOP has misplaced priorities. But their latest actions show just how **strong their stances against AZ women are.**

Earlier this month, State Rep. Athena Salman was denied the ability to work remotely during this legislative session – despite the fact that Salman was pregnant and was due to deliver at any moment.

The AZ GOP denied Salman’s constituents the representation they deserve, and _they penalized her for being a mother._ It’s ridiculous!

Republicans have repeatedly shown disregard for AZ women and their families. Whether it’s putting our schools at-risk through political games or directly denying a pregnant woman accommodations at work – **enough is enough!**

**[Team, the AZ GOP are not putting our families first. Add your name to tell the AZ GOP you find their treatment of Rep. clean_body: If you can even call it that. Friend, Did you see Joe Biden's press conference (if you can even call it that) the other day? How come he can pick a reporter off a list, in all cases softball questions , and then read the answer? I would never have been allowed to get away with that, nor would I have to. The Fake News media babies Joe Biden and FAILS to get any real update out of him. That would 've never happened in the Trump White House. I've said it once and I'll say it again: Joe Biden is an EMBARRASSMENT to our Country. Do you agree, Friend? I'm looking at the first 20 responses and I want to see YOURS. Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: This has gone beyond political opinions: this is a threat to our public health. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I’m DISGUSTED. Attacks on Dr. Fauci are beyond politics: they threaten our entire public health apparatus. Dr. Fauci’s long-time colleagues have even said this is the most visibly hurt they’ve seen him – he needs our support now more than ever! | As a Congressman and as a doctor myself, I’ve seen the devastating impacts of COVID-19 on our country. I can confidently say that Dr. Fauci’s leadership has been essential in leading us through this pandemic. But anti-science Republicans like Rand Paul will do ANYTHING to destroy his reputation and spread misinformation. So it’s up to us to protect Dr. Fauci’s legacy and continue our fight against COVID-19. Thank you for your support, Dr. Raul Ruiz Cincinnati.com: Rand Paul calls Anthony Fauci a 'menace;' latest in increasingly personal feud | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . We know Mike Lee has access to MILLIONS from deep pockets to fund his campaign.

**We don’t have extreme outside groups funding our race, but we DO have unprecedented grassroots support** from over 600 volunteers, hundreds of events around the state, and thousands of donors like you.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=585397a3ef5f4df683a20f907461bacd&_e=X3SWmmnEy_Tj88Jd_gG_FQ_EGYo6Qnj1wiZSOKrXXpa7vWdW2jFzLfW3gLMBPdiwrwj9YT5pxy3wQhydpRZaeHgEdyLLFncJ7Qk4CHlOw64xNwpUghAHxsGWkz5vzz9mlxT-uxAhu-IUXzed9arvxRMloPAddb1FtNhuGmHTf1C9POBpS6k35UIpOMfXLb03wx-0k6zUCOGFpUtjimiqmQcHf7i9O6nCvAspWD0NmGkO-Deh62lD_vD1SOGI49oxtkN1td1jFrbhchAYlnYW0QlxHjBolPprIfo4uJwBj-loRHt-KbsFxKiORb45Z-XMya4fhGLvv8rNjWnuj8FDzCGrjm2zYF1gyECBbBMWA2nHzUQ8kkxabcUF8_5_-zz5Z5VzieACZGBhW2yOh1UGWdVs1OH-_16qX2quktQuvc6JgTBya4EnmOptf91unh7bJNz5VgO8xrCQM_mJYKBRT9c9f1CXEEeJQmqtZZfVhos%3D)

Peter,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=585397a3ef5f4df683a20f907461bacd&_e=X3SWmmnEy_Tj88Jd_gG_FQ_EGYo6Qnj1wiZSOKrXXpa7vWdW2jFzLfW3gLMBPdiwrwj9YT5pxy3wQhydpRZaeHgEdyLLFncJ7Qk4CHlOw64xNwpUghAHxsGWkz5vzz9mlxT-uxAhu-IUXzed9arvxRMloPAddb1FtNhuGmHTf1C9POBpS6k35UIpOMfXLb03wx-0k6zUCOGFpUtjimiqmQcHf7i9O6nCvAspWD0NmGkO-Deh62lD_vD1SOGI49oxg1Wz78f2MCQwPhoE97lKwGlSdtyfyhMuZsu8hy8XAONBMN63UCqsPOp0fjNze6e_59vJ41lLr2gzbRHsebymjIieANvigKt2x4lkkcby0BkS5yxhtC6w1j4sPXCUwI8b5CrOlzyKCETAJjgtQAp47lKDRXH0mdacphVROrQaiKfSptVBsWPKx5AfU854QsM8L0dr_oXVUq6uvGFI5VfU5Y2zHm_NaDuCdZI9vs1qkuI%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

I appreciate your consideration!

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=585397a3ef5f4df683a20f907461bacd&_e=X3SWmmnEy_Tj88Jd_gG_FQ_EGYo6Qnj1wiZSOKrXXpa7vWdW2jFzLfW3gLMBPdiwrwj9YT5pxy3wQhydpRZaeHgEdyLLFncJ7Qk4CHlOw64xNwpUghAHxsGWkz5vzz9mlxT-uxAhu-IUXzed9arvxRMloPAddb1FtNhuGmHTf1C9POBpS6k35UIpOMfXLb03wx-0k6zUCOGFpUtjimiqmQcHf7i9O6nCvAspWD0NmGkO-Deh62lD_vD1SOGI49ox7wePGqtHoodk5xDI29X38Z5S6Qhj4Zz8hzRb1FnngQGaXyLsODTQnfFBB2hmkiQWHc-fLPQWSNYO_HVC7DmE73NH9-MrvxIZsE0hRdP0lvI0wauDi4Ri3JIBStRsgO-phKPUaNrPJHJM3cPAnAbT5UIxW5dbJfbILy0f1hSuoqry6pc6PJKSh2VTTB0M7ntUc3rgzZSwit7yCRw0BsZSkWxnMl8i1EQ0ohZn-c08NBQ%3D)

name: Charles Booker Research Team
subject: Peter, we have a couple of questions for you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We’ve been on the campaign trail talking to voters, having conversations about what issues matter most to everyday folks, and figuring out what’s the best way to inspire people to believe in the progressive change we’re fighting for.
#
286 days, Peter.
It’s officially less than a year until Election Day and we have _a lot_ of work ahead of us. **The pressure is on to start preparing and make sure we build an inclusive, people-powered movement so we can finally replace Rand Paul with a leader who will fight for us.**
We’ve been on the campaign trail talking to voters, having conversations about what issues matter most to everyday folks, and figuring out what’s the best way to inspire people to believe in the progressive change we’re fighting for.
Every day we hear personal stories from supporters like you about why passing Medicare for All or electing a leader who understands firsthand what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck is why you support Charles in this race.
**Unfortunately, we can’t talk to all of you face-to-face.[But that’s why we’re emailing you today: will you take our Campaign Issues Survey, Peter? We want to directly hear from our supporters about what issues are most important to you this election and how we should grow our movement.](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=1&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm)**
**What issues are most important to you this election?** [⚪ Passing Medicare for All](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=2&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm) [⚪ Protecting Roe v. Wade](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=3&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm) [⚪ Combating the climate crisis](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=4&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm) [⚪ Providing COVID relief](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=5&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm) [⚪ Ending gun violence](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=6&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm) [⚪ Other](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=7&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm) **[Take the Survey →](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=8&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm)**
---
Peter, we’re running because it’s urgently clear we need real change in our politics.
**We must replace Rand Paul and grow our Democratic majority in the Senate so we can finally deliver the people-centric change our communities need.**
_For too long,_ Rand Paul has prioritized pleasing Big Pharma donors and making money off this pandemic over saving the thousands of Kentuckians who have lost their lives to COVID-19.
_For too long,_ Rand Paul has prioritized pleasing Trump and playing political games over passing the urgent policies we need to lift up working families.
_For too long,_ Rand Paul has prioritized protecting his seat and pleasing his fossil fuel donors over addressing the catastrophic climate crisis that’s impending on us if meaningful action is not taken.
**Enough. We’re building a movement that represents everyday folks and working families.** So first, it’s critical we first ask our supporters about what issues we should focus on this election and understand what your priorities are for our campaign.
[**It takes less than five minutes to take our Campaign Issues Survey. It’s important we collect feedback from our supporters to help determine our next steps as a campaign so we can best fight for the change you want to see in our Senate, Peter.**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/campaign-issues-survey-january/?source=em20220125&t=9&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm)
Thank you,
Team Booker

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220125-1496-footer&t=10&refcode2=1496_346206_Y7kipm&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm)**
---
Email us: [info@charlesbooker.org](mailto: info@charlesbooker.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. To contribute via check, please address to PO Box 4369, Louisville, KY 40204.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.charlesbooker.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=1496%2E346206%2EY7kipm)

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

clean_body: Jack and our team has been working HARD one month into this election year, and Matt Rosendale has already raised a ton of money as he gets ready to pu | | | Peter, Jack and our team have been working HARD one month into this election year. And Matt Rosendale has already raised a ton of money as he gets ready to put up a fight against Jack in November. Where does much of that money come from? Wealthy outside donors and conservative groups. There’s no way around it: this will be a tough race. Even though Rosendale doesn’t show up to votes that directly affect his constituents and does nothing to make life better for Montanas, he accepts huge donations from large corporations that put him at a very real advantage. So what are we going to do? We’re going to raise money from Montanans and REAL grassroots donors who want to see real change and who will show up to VOTE MATT OUT in November. name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: One Year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
One year ago today, I launched my campaign to be the next governor of Arkansas. Let’s look back at what we accomplished together... [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=8aeefcd1403745a3a4c9d213a8120606&_e=pQ2lfozluo4wXxnHCK-1m30jCMMtAWWejWqty1vP_mGWAgU3nGNBr0U2wxXNqtYRgQjYs91k-EbbXSbeBwAj0ID032grgk7RhSF0l8t81TsmcLDnSlW06Qbdh1PubEfmYfxKN25MyQ3MaOSziUuSdl7CbA8BpLLbCoHxSEChi4FOSptgnD1Udv4NtIrh2DBQgNW5DW5O4-e3_LZiuTE4rkHiy7-iaFpFX-awpZ7L1KQVfOPOoF8QIw7l0IPQALKePlzbEoHTp42B2oFQ87TsHDvH7zuZ_s4xM8xSLpqSWqeZd5b07wrVt1Z-IBPWgctdnY-4_Ffo3rhsCZcBzeJ9qXH9bIGwFFMBYannZPYMSAYVDQkpu9WEZ3Yb3xrDiW4BDXR2LYplouXV1lmivxaGwCvpr25UjQODg8pFRts8_Io%3D) | |
---
Peter,

One year ago today, I launched my campaign to be the next governor of Arkansas. Let’s look back at what we accomplished together...

We’ve gone big:
🚌 We traveled across Arkansas on an 1,800-mile bus tour, drawing nearly 10,000 people in an outpouring of support.
💸 We smashed fundraising records because of you.
7️⃣5️⃣ We assembled a grassroots army led by coordinators in all 75 counties.
But through it all, I’ve also savored the small moments:
🇺🇸 Thanking our veterans and police officers for their service and sacrifice.
🚗 Bringing my kids with me on the campaign trail to show them how important it is to be involved in public service.
🤝 Meeting all of our supporters from across the state - whether it's at a gas station, grocery store, or campaign rally.
Now let’s look forward ⏩ It’s election year and we’re kicking it into even higher gear. This is the year we take our momentum through the finish line – but I can’t do it without your help.

**[Can you chip in to make this year even better than the last?](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=8aeefcd1403745a3a4c9d213a8120606&_e=pQ2lfozluo4wXxnHCK-1m30jCMMtAWWejWqty1vP_mGWAgU3nGNBr0U2wxXNqtYRgQjYs91k-EbbXSbeBwAj0ID032grgk7RhSF0l8t81TsmcLDnSlW06Qbdh1PubEfmYfxKN25MyQ3MaOSziUuSdl7CbA8BpLLbCoHxSEChi4FOSptgnD1Udv4NtIrh2DBQgNW5DW5O4-e3_LZiuTE4rps4X-4OAShRBFRXtCMsCj7hAreHHxu16Fc75SpLIZTZkhtBDuM-fNdnA1VFhTeMKKKS7XqgoXtFr_RIpq5Si6XZAzMs5k2qlwaY7ndItqxAi-8dWLibuHUe0baoNdV27OQFe5Q6KgEevHhosGvhbjXCio7-Ugkh-hoP7PvCO4eIVvehUq-l2HSiBRJxUgJLfZBYkUJzm1_ZVB7I3hL0uho%3D)**
[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=8aeefcd1403745a3a4c9d213a8120606&_e=pQ2lfozluo4wXxnHCK-1m30jCMMtAWWejWqty1vP_mGWAgU3nGNBr0U2wxXNqtYRgQjYs91k-EbbXSbeBwAj0ID032grgk7RhSF0l8t81TsmcLDnSlW06Qbdh1PubEfmYfxKN25MyQ3MaOSziUuSdl7CbA8BpLLbCoHxSEChi4FOSptgnD1Udv4NtIrh2DBQgNW5DW5O4-e3_LZiuTE4rpt81zAY96xTxNJsgSqn5PpGbkBOEAj49kYothJeDCaihATTRI1aXhKZj0-opb_fiODTEYT3i_EvLQEx15G-lEayHRUbmt0cCEGDdKqWe-JoMot2r6-8NApsPcy2r4WO9weaKHf2pLtHH13psJzlyoT-Cua2LRv-ytvambaCbOd7P0LIYwsVl6IZ8t_s8MX0M2Dp6h2PYt2mBtPqEYSE60Q%3D)
Thank you for making my favorite moments from this past year possible and for being part of Team Sarah.

One year down, 9 months to go. **[Are you with me?](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=8aeefcd1403745a3a4c9d213a8120606&_e=pQ2lfozluo4wXxnHCK-1m30jCMMtAWWejWqty1vP_mGWAgU3nGNBr0U2wxXNqtYRgQjYs91k-EbbXSbeBwAj0ID032grgk7RhSF0l8t81TsmcLDnSlW06Qbdh1PubEfmYfxKN25MyQ3MaOSziUuSdl7CbA8BpLLbCoHxSEChi4FOSptgnD1Udv4NtIrh2DBQgNW5DW5O4-e3_LZiuTE4ruV0siUcLHmMU3tWT-2zelL5bX6l-h0OKbEoAYwBQqHRd8tUxvZpmSk0c9QTKfObM42gCbNttWD_VT07tpYsA2OV8UEKl2JcyN9BYYHQgtkGRtR5mgG8zjiVDYUeojkCf_fw0ReJlhppdN2K62RnLi85DridEf58vggalWY5Cbuhsx8nS-3HlWxSHrqL5Yhr0pJlWInpOXWGBSX2AbZblAY%3D)**

name: Dean Heller
subject: Tent cities, needles, and garbage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
Under Sisolak’s leadership, some of our cities are starting to look more and more like Los Angeles’ Skid Row. It’s a danger to both public health and | |
---

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=613f890653294633b52647d0dc7066dc&_e=BFGMppAdjkSWPjQsI1oaqGLhyjNA6xJVUessEXH36TTguJmUSsEcajEYzc34cTvdHrS90fjyUKrYle0DpYj3BslJIUNWAL4KJPjIS4_dROpYJbHqX5Hu1ZRUyhNEA0NnGexnhLcHHLM-ki2M7dzchaEJtETFhYCQubBDfd0tiQWugUTKiA_YPbmDf7gzLpwonPQAPvd_cnSUFtOBov-HxkU47_Ha-cfwxSJakmOZVJnXQ1FSOy7tBCRK0w0rRSlGCjjNgrcBqVxRxU4vdmBUYG1y2pubeTC6uf4mKdFO_-IgXePFau3LevK14m1AFZAocjz3Fxng06TAU7f9R5WW40-8Qk89PIdeAsTFQji5Qw9e9LORELRh-rwE4MDjFgQfq9WBlcAoVTzK4kP20_R-PkHFuwku5UU6i7PGw_nx9hdOZr33DmQZJSv7bUZZcfVLQa9VLCxt0mRz2MZB4Z6ujonBOKZxaxuTIEE7U6ZwSaOaYvUW6ZWi-FGWNJgDaVVe)

|
---
Peter,

**Many of Nevada’s streets are lined with tent cities, needles, and garbage right now.**

This is happening in Democrat-run cities and states all over the country –– and here in Nevada, these problems have gotten _MUCH_ worse thanks to Governor Sisolak’s inaction.

Under Sisolak’s leadership, some of our cities are starting to look more and more like Los Angeles’ Skid Row. It’s a danger to both public health _and_ safety and we cannot sit by and let these problems spiral any more out of control.

**DO YOU APPROVE OF SISOLAK’S RECORD ON**
**HOMELESSNESS, CRIME, AND DRUGS?**

name: Afi Blackshear
subject: Doug Gansler is the clear choice for Governor of Maryland
body:
Meeting Doug Gansler changed my life. He showed me that there are people that truly care about diversity, equity, and justice in the legal field. That's why I believe Doug would make an amazing Governor of Maryland. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl461VbxsVs7DKXgAILS89KysDzR2SyDR1bDtT9k_HcbSHOzaSth1kD6p-TM3ZJGCB0SqXb6l3pmIlWw_CILd-ldm2XWov55eYcsojnInXjX_ed6tR3DqUkKvQULPWalXzGWPK5CKzpDpUEBLDLb4Jok1mxE5popYLX7WhJx04P7StjKI5CAemoae7pmyzWsY0NdqgxaBtCEsw5DmGDdXjgxNgidLcwhSUQqwaA93KFK5tywuZHYUBbacpBQYEsP9y8RUCn1lSTHdVTcJxSFJUjtiaaa1rxXwhpSQq6vkuc1Kwi5udn14my98bsatFzm54/3j0/NWtpyTtlTfi6mxUQ19PLEw/h0/AgGZ_MEZUZTM9KSlCRdKb0H_yS4lb1YI_CdKZYwakPw)
---
Hi friends, Four years ago, when I was debating whether or not the legal field was the right fit for me, I met Doug Gansler at an event. Surrounded by many important people, Doug chose to sit and talk with me for hours about my decision to attend law school. **That day changed my life.** Not only did it convince me that I could thrive as a Black, gay man in a legal career, but it also showed me that there are people out there who are genuinely committed to diversity, equity, and justice. Since then, I've witnessed Doug be that great person I met that day and I've had the pleasure of calling him a really close mentor ever since. ** ** Now, I'm in my second year of law school at Stanford. Unfortunately, living in California means I won't be able to directly benefit from a Gansler governorship, but it is so exciting to think about all the people in Maryland who would. **For all these reasons and more, I know Doug is the clear choice for Governor.**
---

clean_body: Meeting Doug Gansler changed my life. He showed me that there are people that truly care about diversity, equity, and justice in the legal field. That's why I believe Doug would make an amazing Governor of Maryland. | | Hi friends, Four years ago, when I was debating whether or not the legal field was the right fit for me, I met Doug Gansler at an event. Surrounded by many important people, Doug chose to sit and talk with me for hours about my decision to attend law school. That day changed my life. Not only did it convince me that I could thrive as a Black, gay man in a legal career, but it also showed me that there are people out there who are genuinely committed to diversity, equity, and justice. Since then, I've witnessed Doug be that great person I met that day and I've had the pleasure of calling him a really close mentor ever since. Now, I'm in my second year of law school at Stanford. Unfortunately, living in California means I won't be able to directly benefit from a Gansler governorship, but it is so exciting to think about all the people in Maryland who would. For all these reasons and more, I know Doug is the clear choice for Governor. | With your support, Doug will make Maryland a more equitable and prosperous place for all. Afi Blackshear By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . Friend,

It’s so simple:

Politicians and the government should not be in the business of telling people what to do with their personal, medical decisions.

I’m against mask mandates and vaccine passports. **_Period._**
[](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=f83f07bf70ad47efaad33a528aed12e2&_e=0WpNxb3T8TmuUwob3FggYdT9-6ZV6JpkBPw_84FeAs1-HmqCSx67xaZS0vc64tuEqXo9xdjRGpdGuXDEY6J2XZ6MsXjZ1ZBqRXWt6BC5gTpaJUdNWYw1OIGVY1HP9EC0Ixuqk7Qu_QgK1H8kwVi6IrtM3Ig5hjbARhN_wTxLLtmgxf2Yl8ZKHb3pBNVY6khQuHrh6g_nrraLrAxb4vb68bMsb4mPCtUPbQyvGP3nvJTQCBjv0Nu87XHS1lyxN5NUSjWDkTHDSwimp8zCi1qECCDwGrf2vBg2PaUonYVA3czi-AZtVvdQZOuVfKAnEiEwInkVRYprOxQI4LzXsni3KAC9AOvMEZtNndQ3O_wQHl8LbnvwVqHfGV-Ih--H57E7PiWqYhK7rS5L87UJx8bkbx4XznJKOLt0BsEyRL01D0fBAvtcaSdu8HBxWh94q9H4rvZhbKeXyMNbbd1UfMqNuTxQN1ybBxaSw-lgPn-veME%3D)

This isn’t just about you and me...this is about our children and their future. Our kids need to see each other smile again in school.

**[We live in America. Say YES to FREEDOM! Let’s put the individual back in control.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=f83f07bf70ad47efaad33a528aed12e2&_e=0WpNxb3T8TmuUwob3FggYdT9-6ZV6JpkBPw_84FeAs1-HmqCSx67xaZS0vc64tuEqXo9xdjRGpdGuXDEY6J2XZ6MsXjZ1ZBqRXWt6BC5gTpaJUdNWYw1OIGVY1HP9EC0Ixuqk7Qu_QgK1H8kwVi6IrtM3Ig5hjbARhN_wTxLLtmgxf2Yl8ZKHb3pBNVY6khQuHrh6g_nrraLrAxb4vb68bMsb4mPCtUPbQyvGP3nvJTQCBjv0Nu87XHS1lyxN5NUSjWDkTHDSwimp8zCi1qECLJyda2qYuHtaulJyPKOF-m-QWTh3fzCrzupgK95uoCjv8piWMDynn070tAaUH3fQ2MprpnPgvWCjfoVQWo1gjsE_USlbKQkIO6dQ9pvxhpuI7N0-MLALZ4KAwZsusswEKAlt80_npzeyaMz6pZKsry5al_KvB5yp31fUHL6gBlpMYiYdIr_q-UyB6olHgF2_vsICrRELvaXqFwp-fLk8g4%3D)**

clean_body: Henry Cuellar is not backing down. | | | Peter, We know we’ve been emailing you a lot lately, but as we get closer to the election, we want to keep you updated. Here’s the latest: Despite being investigated by the FBI, Henry Cuellar is still going ALL IN to win: Cuellar is not backing down — not even for a minute. He is up on TV and he is sending misinformation in the mail about our campaign. But he can’t hide his record. He can’t hide the votes he cast that went against the interests of our community. That’s why Jessica is running to unseat him. We’re ALL IN to defeat Henry Cuellar, so we’re finishing what we started. We are doubling down on our efforts. Our people-powered campaign is ready to win. But we refuse to take a dime of corporate money, so we need our grassroots supporters to help us get to the finish line. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Together, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

Friends,

I’m a little concerned. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me feel so honored. This has become a movement to take power out of the hands of Washington and put it back into the hands of working New Yorkers.

Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting. **I couldn’t do it without you.** That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my **Dark Money** opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and advance their Radical Agenda. **This can’t happen.**

subject: Our race could decide Senate control

body:
Democrats are emailing supporters that the Senate seat in Georgia is the “most vulnerable Senate seat up for reelection.” |
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aacb31f9260944bc8228944123a773a0&_e=5q-anGkuLJi64dnLVsg9eSnre_WHnIW56SCtCNKJ1nKml-gxpwQtxbvTuE4EN1W7DxNKZc07cGtpnU_jycZRV21NtUw5o19QELdBBEaPNh8Ea56Qbg3mDZAAc7AN0LzS72J3m9QvSXaHj6Z6kSQATASkADSgxQlag6dCjIwUnmPBqMnfS4pO-1_W7S6IqOa5IMyn6bAVBlxBmXU9hnsrPNPxrkTrzSwPP0yYbTLvzaGBhAyY_GrEzeVEfHwU9BsFRgLzrZgGdu-Xg6cgYnm62ZuSmlS1AX_cW5DA2AIQutp_Djz2nQuZ6CtSvhLCEc6tuQ8KSV6c-e9QKK9WUMMCK0XfWhN8k0iwnPxH6Mc7XjlQGXzYMA5N3pvdm-mm02Aj-lM-84uTsMalA9_wfOeK13IyUpquBf8mdyjj8Z9U4hBxa3E7CNXWaLgyl__B8-otYw-n3XEWS7dIzYe-V-3r1w%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aacb31f9260944bc8228944123a773a0&_e=5q-anGkuLJi64dnLVsg9eSnre_WHnIW56SCtCNKJ1nKml-gxpwQtxbvTuE4EN1W7DxNKZc07cGtpnU_jycZRV21NtUw5o19QELdBBEaPNh8Ea56Qbg3mDZAAc7AN0LzS72J3m9QvSXaHj6Z6kSQATASkADSgxQlag6dCjIwUnmPBqMnfS4pO-1_W7S6IqOa5IMyn6bAVBlxBmXU9hnsrPNPxrkTrzSwPP0yYbTLvzaGBhAyY_GrEzeVEfHwU9BsFRbKMSk89HqyNja1rYZBQDicK4Mg4iWiu-sAEFbBNFW1CT9kfxZ_J0gxwWMYMypiSNZ1xUACWpOn5jOLSQ7t8LuT-H8XbjpYd0a0KQ3-NNyXZuumyoQbUEP8shC5V5Z8u_jjjkA6uJC3Eo7V7IFdKOLH7Bo4QW2u0HBPmq82sfoMHU6ntOsHD9xy9Ur7McSNrCtZOu3T9088CZ_Vobgh3tQ%3D%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

clean_body: Democrats are emailing supporters that the Senate seat in Georgia is the “most vulnerable Senate seat up for reelection.” | Fellow American, Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about. First , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the "most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection." That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line. If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months. Second , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one. We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal. I appreciate your consideration! Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
We've fought too hard for too long to let them take it all away now. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefKZOn2LxzASQa0e38q-km-CTz7jZnIfkCVOYB0LV0Z1w2bpS-FjvnqFrypL4Sl_raat3psgBFpstLjp1Unhvs8MmdVJOunUsSuxqA1MsW2dIYX-2fr9EjHfFDeM4LhJW9hYMvZiS-RA-jiGIpi7QxdEQ0eh8ERF3sn5pQTUOYJvIctlUBSZcPsTTsmkjZ-pNGCHV_asK7wfhKCTI9dZ34jAreUqJOk--pDyotxBf3dZ4gQzBE8clLs0B-fCMu7Mqt3VoyuCFUuBlQIMgBPOV0cZW1aPxMQHwGEi4LO9BNYgW/3j0/gDnALyyUTcy7btXd1bELHg/h0/ddSIJiE_60A3Bg3ruNUPVSnz0QDKHSSn42ZvYlJ31v4) Peter, Late last night, Tennessee House Republicans approved the redistricting plan that cracks Nashville into three congressional districts. I don't have to imagine what it felt like for my parents to have their voices and votes erased in the Jim Crow South anymore — here in Middle Tennessee, we're living through a racist power grab _right now_.
Congressman Jim Cooper, my former opponent, just announced that he would not run for re-election to Congress. And as a life-long resident of Tennessee’s fifth Congressional district, I want to thank him for his years of service to our city.
I joined the Congressman in fighting back against the Tennessee General Assembly’s racist gerrymandering that will erase the voices of Black and brown voters in Nashville. **But I know one thing is true: people-powered movements in this state have been building power for years, and no map is going to slow us down.**
Peter, I’m not giving up. My fire’s been lit. We've fought too hard for too long to let them take it all away. Right now, we need a strong show of fundraising to demonstrate what I know is true: **that this movement can win anywhere**. We can turn this racist, anti-democratic power-grab around on the GOP and win a seat in Congress, but only if we have the resources to compete.
[**_If you’re with me, please chip in whatever you can to help us demonstrate that we have what it takes to win this red-to-blue seat. Right now, I need your support more than clean_body: We've fought too hard for too long to let them take it all away now. | | | Peter, Late last night, Tennessee House Republicans approved the redistricting plan that cracks Nashville into three congressional districts. I don't have to imagine what it felt like for my parents to have their voices and votes erased in the Jim Crow South anymore — here in Middle Tennessee, we're living through a racist power grab right now. Congressman Jim Cooper, my former opponent, just announced that he would not run for re-election to Congress. And as a life-long resident of Tennessee’s fifth Congressional district, I want to thank him for his years of service to our city. I joined the Congressman in fighting back against the Tennessee General Assembly’s racist gerrymandering that will erase the voices of Black and brown voters in Nashville. But I know one thing is true: people-powered movements in this state have been building power for years, and no map is going to slow us down. Peter, I’m not giving up. My fire’s been lit. We've fought too hard for too long to let them take it all away. Right now, we need a strong show of fundraising to demonstrate what I know is true: that this movement can win anywhere. We can turn this racist, anti-democratic power-grab around on the GOP and win a seat in Congress, but only if we have the resources to compete. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m still looking into the recently redrawn district lines and charting a path forward for my campaign. When I decided to run for Congress, it was never about winning a particular district or challenging a particular incumbent — it was about getting a seat at the table for working class Tennesseans and having another organizer in Congress to fight like hell for our future. That hasn’t changed. We won’t ever stop fighting for that. Peter, it’s thanks to supporters like you that I know we can do this. Thank you for being a part of this team. In solidarity, Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

| | Peter,
---
| I cannot thank you enough for your continued support throughout my campaign as your next Governor of New Mexico. Together we will fix the mess in Santa Fe, and I need your help!

In **LESS THAN A WEEK** , I need to get as many signatures as possible to appear on the ballot.

| If you have yet to do so, please sign the nominating petition and collect any additional signatures from fellow Republicans, including friends and family. We need all hands on deck to return conservative values to New Mexico! You can also collect signatures at any church gatherings, local events, or public venues!
**With every helping hand, my campaign can reach the required number of petitions before the deadline!** _Remember that only registered Republicans in the State of New Mexico can sign the petition, and only original petition forms will be valid.**We cannot accept scanned copies.**

To mail your original forms, put them in the mail NO LATER than **January 27th** to the following address:_
---
| | Block For NM
2717 Avenida Corazon SE
Rio Rancho, NM 87124-8826
---
|
---
| I could not have gotten this far without your support! Together, we will reach our signature deadline by January 31st and give New Mexicans the leadership we need!
---
| _Yours in Liberty,_

**_Jay Block_**
Candidate for Governor
Lt Col (Ret), USAF

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: In case you missed it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
We talked about the future of Michigan and the country. It was inspiring. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
Peter:

Last week while working in the campaign office I was reminded about why I’m running for Governor. This young man walked in after a long day on a construction site.

He wanted some “Vote Republican” and “Support the Police” signs. We talked about the future of Michigan and the country.

It was inspiring.
---
|
---
| As I continue to bring my positive message to voters throughout the state – from Detroit to the UP and all across the state – I’m energized everywhere I go. People are ready to Dump Whitmer and the momentum continues to build.
I spent time meeting business owners and voters at the **Detroit Fishing Show** in Novi. So many of our citizens love the outdoor lifestyle like I do.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| It’s great to be able to have honest conversations about policies that impact recreation like Gretchen Whitmer’s ridiculous ban on outdoor activities during the pandemic.

I do have to commend the MSU bass fishing team that had a jersey with my name on it!
---
|
---
| I had a great visit to**Cass County** where I served the citizens in narcotics enforcement and as the Niles Post Commander.

The **4th District Precinct Delegate Round-Up in Clare** was a fantastic event. I truly enjoyed the organization and hospitality of this great event and want to say a big thank you to Judy and her team for allowing me to share my vision on how we can FIX MICHIGAN and turn around this state from the total disaster that Whitmer has been.
---
|
---
---
| It was a great weekend with just a few more miles and many citizens signing up to **DUMP WHITMER**!! Travel this weekend went around the state from southern Michigan in Stevensville, Belding, Marquette, Au Gres, back to Belding, Lowell, and finally back to Stevensville. A retired guy in slippers can’t deal with this kind of campaigning.

I had a great time at the **Marquette County Lincoln Day dinner**. I love the enthusiasm of the Northern Michigan University students.
---
|
---
---
| If you agree that it's time to Dump Whitmer and Fix Michigan, I invite you to join our team. Whether as a volunteer, donor, or simply someone who shares our social media posts, there are many ways you can help the campaign.

I'm in this to win.

Will you join me?

See you on the campaign trail,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor

---
|
---
| [YOUR DONATION OF $25, $50, $100 OR MORE HELPS. DONATE TODAY.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=0657771aae&e=0636b97700 "YOUR DONATION OF $25, $50, $100 OR MORE HELPS. DONATE TODAY.")
